---

Peter — Do _you_ want to learn some of the secrets to running a successful campaign? Well, we have some _really_ exciting news: our next installment of [**Trainer Talks**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTA5MjgyMV90dCZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ.JZWZww9pCJ5I4HzpYdZTKrfnkmUbYc8HuG46bBlR1Lo) is happening _next_ week, and it’s focused on the secrets to working on a campaign! 🎉🎉 _And we want YOU to join us!_ But don’t wait, space is limited. Save your spot now by RSVPing for [**Trainer Talks: Staffer Secrets**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTA5MjgyMV90dCZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ.JZWZww9pCJ5I4HzpYdZTKrfnkmUbYc8HuG46bBlR1Lo) on **October 6 at 8pm ET.** | [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTA5MjgyMV90dCZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ.JZWZww9pCJ5I4HzpYdZTKrfnkmUbYc8HuG46bBlR1Lo)
---
Our guest experts will share their expertise and give you the guidance you _need_ to drive your campaign to victory.
**And you’ll have the chance to ask them your questions!**
[**_So don’t miss out — Click here to RSVP now for Trainer Talks: Staffer Secrets!_**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTA5MjgyMV90dCZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ.JZWZww9pCJ5I4HzpYdZTKrfnkmUbYc8HuG46bBlR1Lo)

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Brief Message About Mandates
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=brief_message_about_mandates&n=1)
---
September 28, 2021
## Your Pressure is Working!
Politicians in St Paul are starting to talk about doing something to stop vaccine mandates in the upcoming Special Session. New Senate Majority Leader, Jeremy Miller, even mentioned that "anything related to vaccine mandates or vaccine passports [...] should be fair game" for the Special Session. Our team has made **over 20,000 phone calls** this month. And supporters like you, from all across the state, have also contacted their state senator and state representative to tell them "don't pass the $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay Bill unless it has the Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment attached to it." Keep making the phone calls and writing the emails. See who [**represents you here**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoeydXsGz92cVrFhOOGKxAVM6_YCm43WSS4uZsz0eMdEnx&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=brief_message_about_mandates&n=2). It makes a HUGE difference! **Jake Duesenberg** **Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=brief_message_about_mandates&n=3 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=brief_message_about_mandates&n=3)
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=brief_message_about_mandates&n=4).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=brief_message_about_mandates&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=brief_message_about_mandates&n=6), software for leaders.

name: Dr Neil Shah
subject: I’ve Heard You Say This
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Dr
body:
| [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_ve_heard_you_say_this&n=1) Peter, It’s been nearly two months now since I got into the race for Governor to help Save Minnesota from career politicians. After countless hours on the phone and attending Republican events, I keep hearing one message over and over again...

_Neil, I’ve lost faith in the MNGOP._

This isn’t something I’ve heard once or twice. Dozens and dozens have said the same thing. Everybody from primary voters, to local party chairs, and even state party central committee members.

**Minnesota is a conservative state, but many conservative Minnesotans are sitting on the sidelines because they gave their talent and treasure to support the MNGOP - only to see career politicians deliver no results!**

For instance, why is the MNGOP not unified with these heroic health care workers who are standing up against the Vaccine Mandates?! Republican politicians in St Paul can’t even deliver a loud, direct message that they will fight to Stop the Biden-Walz Mandates once and for all.

The career politicians running for governor think that we should be good denizens of the swamp and play nice with the DFL. Why would we play nice with people who want to destroy our state, our values, our families and our businesses?

I’m running to Save Minnesota from the career political class. I will stand up for conservative values, even if that means taking the heat. I will not give in to the Radical Left or the career political class.

If you want to build a MN GOP that will stand up for conservatives values, unapologetically fight the DFL and their radical agenda, and set Minnesota on a path to freedom and prosperity, then I am your candidate.

**Help me beat the career politicians and Fire Walz with a donation today.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_ve_heard_you_say_this&n=2 "Donate Today") [Donate Today](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_ve_heard_you_say_this&n=2)
---

It’s time you get a candidate who is willing to take the fight to the Radical Left.
**We keep losing in this state. Republican politicians never cut back the growth of government while in office. They never deliver major victories on gun rights, school choice, or on health freedom. And we lose elections and get outmaneuvered by the media.**
You deserve a lot better!
The message you’ve sent to me since getting in the race is loud and clear. I’m committed to making you proud of the Republican ticket. And when I get elected, I’m committed to advancing your conservative beliefs.
**But I have to get elected first.**
Join me in fighting unconstitutional, state and federal vaccine mandates. Help me get the message out that lockdowns and masks are bad for our country. Please equip this campaign to take the message to voters that unilateral emergency powers should never happen again!
And most importantly - help me FIRE Tim Walz!
[**Please help me Save Minnesota by beating the career politicians with a contribution today. I’m not funded by lobbyists and special interests like my opponents, so a donation of $25, $50 or even $100 goes along way to helping us #SaveSota.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_ve_heard_you_say_this&n=3)
**Thank you!**
****
Sincerely,
Dr. Neil Shah
Conservative Candidate for Governor
[http://www.electneil.com/](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_ve_heard_you_say_this&n=4)
Prepared and paid for by the Dr. Neil Shah for Governor Committee, 855 Village Center Dr #245, North Oaks, MN 55127
-=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · United States

I will stand up for conservative values, even if that means taking the heat. I will not give in to the Radical Left or the career political class. If you want to build a MN GOP that will stand up for conservatives values, unapologetically fight the DFL and their radical agenda, and set Minnesota on a path to freedom and prosperity, then I am your candidate. Help me beat the career politicians and Fire Walz with a donation today. | "Donate Today" It’s time you get a candidate who is willing to take the fight to the Radical Left. We keep losing in this state. Republican politicians never cut back the growth of government while in office. They never deliver major victories on gun rights, school choice, or on health freedom. And we lose elections and get outmaneuvered by the media. You deserve a lot better! The message you’ve sent to me since getting in the race is loud and clear. I’m committed to making you proud of the Republican ticket. And when I get elected, I’m committed to advancing your conservative beliefs. But I have to get elected first. Join me in fighting unconstitutional, state and federal vaccine mandates. Help me get the message out that lockdowns and masks are bad for our country. Please equip this campaign to take the message to voters that unilateral emergency powers should never happen again! And most importantly - help me FIRE Tim Walz! Thank you! Sincerely, Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor Prepared and paid for by the Dr. Neil Shah for Governor Committee, 855 Village Center Dr #245, North Oaks, MN 55127 -=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · United States

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: Open to check your voter registration:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
Today is all about celebrating our right to vote and making sure everyone has the tools they need to make their voice heard.
#
Happy National Voter Registration Day!
**Today is all about celebrating our right to vote and making sure everyone has the tools they need to make their voice heard.**
With critical elections happening this year and in 2022, Powered by People is doing the hard work to get as many people voting as possible. **[So please, will you check your voter registration status today?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46951?t=1&akid=155860%2E444211%2EpCNeYz)**
**[Check my status »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46951?t=2&akid=155860%2E444211%2EpCNeYz)**
As we've seen in Texas, Georgia, and Florida recently, the GOP is coordinating a national attack on our fundamental right to vote. **The best antidote? Engaging in our democracy.** Republicans are counting on us to stay complacent — so we need to do our part to show we will always fight to defend and expand the right to vote.
**[That's why we're asking you to check your voter registration status by clicking here today — and if you've moved or need to update your registration, now's a great time to do so.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46951?t=3&akid=155860%2E444211%2EpCNeYz)**
Once you've confirmed your voter registration status, please forward this email to three friends so we can all celebrate National Voter Registration Day together!
Thank you,
Powered by People

**[Donate »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/44727?refcode=ema20210928-155860&t=4&akid=155860%2E444211%2EpCNeYz)**

Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=155860%2E444211%2EpCNeYz), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=155860%2E444211%2EpCNeYz).

Peter,

Saturday night, my wife and I had an amazing time talking with conservatives at President Donald Trump's rally in Georgia.

[ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=eced6b07eb024b7a9f68eecfefca29ea&_e=CTctENtYBcr0UkQ0QFMOdG8_FJO54pfvydYrz2N1pAxq23-GfAEI_83CkQKRTf5MkbQbINqhHy_bxDlJGeExCg-VlxUvZyUiHM2rb-F9O8-gWcfaxVo8p6-KFKhPjKBuCIacI6hMxDi5nxx1zNA8LksiXdiWo-4OVp-76ua50GBuDbX8dL3ToJfbJ95xDXX9vr8cJLSEuucPvnf3QthgsYMPG00IsX9WKqd7ZUlrGgNN4QZHaGe5x7UCPHL_enaz9TIA8_OMHNfQNYmkQAajfL-IG3U1yZZFiWEq5VsbMzgX1RAqBPmcpMgWAdd0wXb8dzXVEN91SiplC-r8pU5cJ1g0l_Fwil9Yw4IAbvl1sqWAO6JTJQ_jOOu5_GPlFPtShRTAuxPTGf_6q0akz3lXOiWjMVClqtkDGr6O070c0QV2TxgBhJdSDi9C9WEisEWngUu85hBunxPCDF6w9CV2wREET0e5xW45KTUNogGk8aw%3D)

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=eced6b07eb024b7a9f68eecfefca29ea&_e=CTctENtYBcr0UkQ0QFMOdG8_FJO54pfvydYrz2N1pAxq23-GfAEI_83CkQKRTf5MkbQbINqhHy_bxDlJGeExCg-VlxUvZyUiHM2rb-F9O8-gWcfaxVo8p6-KFKhPjKBuCIacI6hMxDi5nxx1zNA8LksiXdiWo-4OVp-76ua50GBuDbX8dL3ToJfbJ95xDXX9vr8cJLSEuucPvnf3QthgsYMPG00IsX9WKqd7ZUlrGgNN4QZHaGe5x7UCPHL_enaz9TIA8_OMHNfQNYmkQAajfO3VbKN_gBp7ClS3H1HNyRwNkpPm2atLmqMmd1AcWYBOtkgaNlRawNEg2hkoP3qe7raiEHQdtQjcyxF64glZvd7Ai9jYJL9QoRSH-CWYBMsaWizrs_T3OHKR0ItC0WNhhI09r6aXMHIulXo7hjsAAhyD9unF4sQIJtgHVfVTt54WYFfXobAGEZe8f1AAM47aLhvItjjX7VYLFmA45Wyc3PI%3D)
I've been in front of large crowds most of my life, but there is something special about speaking to thousands of people rallying for a common political cause - _rather than an athletic one._

Take a look at a quick recap video of Saturday's rally:

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=eced6b07eb024b7a9f68eecfefca29ea&_e=CTctENtYBcr0UkQ0QFMOdG8_FJO54pfvydYrz2N1pAxq23-GfAEI_83CkQKRTf5MkbQbINqhHy_bxDlJGeExCg-VlxUvZyUiHM2rb-F9O8-gWcfaxVo8p6-KFKhPjKBuCIacI6hMxDi5nxx1zNA8LksiXdiWo-4OVp-76ua50GBuDbX8dL3ToJfbJ95xDXX9vr8cJLSEuucPvnf3QthgsYMPG00IsX9WKqd7ZUlrGgNN4QZHaGe5x7UCPHL_enaz9TIA8_OMHNfQNYmkQAajfPXZ7xJE9PoQ1uIZScT9d0m1W6j6XYexQTN2L7GASXqPR6Uh9PC5KAmbbDpNNfxk6dIBJv8EtGnHETnle29MUVYaeSavfPj-m-6DkPuBlVp9PsPoSXJnDA9wjZL8oaUSWDWsUAd0EddeOsFe1odmhUMsvwdYD8FQvSinNRS4pEGMjc4y1FZOKCsAZe5Zezr-udgvHmwvYI07TmTTRx8BbXg%3D)
We're building a movement here in Georgia that is only going to continue to grow between now and November 2022.

**It is an honor to have the support of my longtime friend, President Trump, in our campaign for the United States Senate.**

**Peter, we need your active support of Team Herschel, too.**

One of the most urgent things currently facing our campaign is our very first quarterly fundraising deadline THIS THURSDAY. **[Will you chip in a few bucks right now to make sure we hit our fundraising goal in the next 3 days?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=eced6b07eb024b7a9f68eecfefca29ea&_e=CTctENtYBcr0UkQ0QFMOdG8_FJO54pfvydYrz2N1pAxq23-GfAEI_83CkQKRTf5MkbQbINqhHy_bxDlJGeExCg-VlxUvZyUiHM2rb-F9O8-gWcfaxVo8p6-KFKhPjKBuCIacI6hMxDi5nxx1zNA8LksiXdiWo-4OVp-76ua50GBuDbX8dL3ToJfbJ95xDXX9vr8cJLSEuucPvnf3QthgsYMPG00IsX9WKqd7ZUlrGgNN4QZHaGe5x7UCPHL_enaz9TIA8_OMHNfQNYmkQAajfLN3mXls5SMtnuEP9I0tK7usTvargFjlqyaJqQxa5xqKnGKWRmukdROpjFvjsN9baOQD2717QY7yz7q2kT9yMRHorGRBh2AB1MFmnPuerHcpsQc44gMZb6oNeN8wRXqbwHkBnwDzEniC8XpjTg-M7_8M1pt5wMHsi44crDCzRp9KKA-u1ebsSPb7y28KZ2ORSXUXgzDO-dz4dHE-xmHvmaY%3D)**

[**HELP US HIT OUR QUARTERLY GOAL**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=eced6b07eb024b7a9f68eecfefca29ea&_e=CTctENtYBcr0UkQ0QFMOdG8_FJO54pfvydYrz2N1pAxq23-GfAEI_83CkQKRTf5MkbQbINqhHy_bxDlJGeExCg-VlxUvZyUiHM2rb-F9O8-gWcfaxVo8p6-KFKhPjKBuCIacI6hMxDi5nxx1zNA8LksiXdiWo-4OVp-76ua50GBuDbX8dL3ToJfbJ95xDXX9vr8cJLSEuucPvnf3QthgsYMPG00IsX9WKqd7ZUlrGgNN4QZHaGe5x7UCPHL_enaz9TIA8_OMHNfQNYmkQAajfJREHJpkr9Ft4d4InsymRQzqg6jqjbheB0HCNcEGhyla-pqmoatmRIaviWWja_gcjdds7xwjiHohrXmwLcjV6t3B7UxlVPyoRcgroKiIsfnMy-DasSoMe_4BZzmlbCfSpR7znt_j8OHlrCO90i01wtbBYpHXpawZZrgoOUQODFhDbOTf6VcGsccwBRXkyFwMTj70tK3ngEdBO7FUocxFIkw%3D)
Please stand with President Trump and our team as we try to win a Republican Majority in the Senate - starting in Georgia.

This public filing deadline will be the first real test of our campaign, so we need the help of every member of Team Herschel before midnight on Thursday to put up the best numbers possible.

Peter, I am counting on your help.

Thanks,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=eced6b07eb024b7a9f68eecfefca29ea&_e=CTctENtYBcr0UkQ0QFMOdG8_FJO54pfvydYrz2N1pAxq23-GfAEI_83CkQKRTf5MkbQbINqhHy_bxDlJGeExCg-VlxUvZyUiHM2rb-F9O8-gWcfaxVo8p6-KFKhPjKBuCIacI6hMxDi5nxx1zNA8LksiXdiWo-4OVp-76ua50GBuDbX8dL3ToJfbJ95xDXX9vr8cJLSEuucPvnf3QthgsYMPG00IsX9WKqd7ZUlrGgNN4QZHaGe5x7UCPHL_enaz9TIA8_OMHNfQNYmkQAajfPSvB76zfEh8d25Ic4OOCjEfPZcMZxmOzBvrJvnG4lmcJkTT3cQF-w30cYXjlx2-JI2zx-lN-Dq8FlYiMq9eu1-knMk1M1gqJWDo-ymovhPxJZtbA8zfOIeqCb50ayEJu8WUndAHVn6Tuq0VCK8E80oDaEPAPS-5blGrHtNoDuLd7Aw93N49Uy20KRQfS4tfeP3mgjdfpcy2bt7Ze9QsRGM%3D)

Donald J. Trump September 28th, 2021
Rather than the political January 6th Unselect Committee of Radical Left Democrats and Democrat wannabes (Warmonger Liz Cheney and Cryin’ Adam Kinzinger), Congress should set up a “Commission On the Disastrous Withdrawal From Afghanistan,” to figure out what went wrong, why so many of our Warriors were killed, and why so much money (85 BILLION DOLLARS), in the form of Weapons and Military equipment, was left behind for the Taliban to use—and to sell to other countries. This is without question something that needs to be investigated further. Thirteen dead AMERICAN HEROES, billions of dollars of equipment, and hundreds of Americans still left behind in Afghanistan with the Taliban!

Trump September 28th, 2021 The botched and embarrassingly incompetent withdrawal from Afghanistan had nothing to do with past Administrations or things that happened “from 20 years ago,” (other than we should not have been in the Middle East in the first place!). The horrible “withdrawal” was caused, in particular, because the Military was taken out before American citizens and $85 Billion worth of the highest-grade Military equipment anywhere in the world. This withdrawal was developed by a child’s mind, and only the Biden Administration is responsible for it. When I left office, the Taliban was held at bay, we had as long as we wanted, there was no reason to rush, no soldiers were killed or even shot at for over 18 months, and if they didn’t meet certain conditions, we would have hit them very hard. But then Biden and Milley removed the Military in one of the dumbest Military moves in history, and it all began. So sad for our Nation! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump September 28th, 2021 ICYMI: “Trump invites Marine who pulled baby over Kabul wall onto stage at rally prompting ‘USA!’ chants” Read the full article by Andrew Mark Miller with Fox News . | ---|--- Donald J. Trump September 28th, 2021 ICYMI: “Donald Trump Gets Big Numbers at Georgia Rally as GOP Pushes to Flip State Back to Red” Read the full article by Jeff Poor with Breitbart . | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- We are up against the FAKE NEWS media, their Democrat Partners, and Big Tech who all want to see us FAIL. We need to do whatever it takes to get the TRUTH out. Thank you, Donald J Trump 45th President of the United States P.S. Text TRUMP to 88022 to receive direct updates from yours truly. I'll be sending a text soon, so don't wait. Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Donaldjtrump.com Save America, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915 |

Fellow Conservative,

Saturday night, my wife and I had an amazing time talking with conservatives at President Donald Trump's rally in Georgia.

[ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2f746be78029401b8dc7ec25aaf145b2&_e=rpw382qqi62G_rExmGLpE7WcCjWbzP8ysBn7tceQulC1wzv1JP5kKGsRGKQI4roCJdXqTYJYat3P13q-wMr319lpRvRfbNcBTAylz_xbWjaTb_SE7jHiMVm-EadgrxbQUnAe2hiwwr0yafU3AOVCa1wJ2NTdcuapq_7VxSByvHA2C-htbdIwwBOj4EH5lhayO5S1BefS87Uy_QUQH6t6b9VYdGA0sFoLd81vGiIqvCtBB1bklBsm3M6G65gxwtly_U_zptxCwkrCR-lqkgAyRVvncIpJV2aK9xg3bZrEWwVsnCs6C8r2-ipCbpoAN8NCeTVjc0LhU1BsE9k2B29yduL6rW8MR96QPq_GubTEhy7KdxfqYDt1PMFM8WVQP_dVUJYIthXa1Zcfhgww0Ppvu_0NF6S9vihuVZ4q65zk0DJpX0KRyDvGruF8Ub-IS3foqiHWlsIpRYgx2A8O6CC9KayvdDmsgpaQoOFyeWO8JhY%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2f746be78029401b8dc7ec25aaf145b2&_e=rpw382qqi62G_rExmGLpE7WcCjWbzP8ysBn7tceQulC1wzv1JP5kKGsRGKQI4roCJdXqTYJYat3P13q-wMr319lpRvRfbNcBTAylz_xbWjaTb_SE7jHiMVm-EadgrxbQUnAe2hiwwr0yafU3AOVCa1wJ2NTdcuapq_7VxSByvHA2C-htbdIwwBOj4EH5lhayO5S1BefS87Uy_QUQH6t6b9VYdGA0sFoLd81vGiIqvCtBB1bklBsm3M6G65gxwtly_09maed4endxtkrUCLtt2nZT3FFJMFzoMYbAJ4tLn21pSNd8i2XSAZPtNXWf1tCn2hhxBXsM0ZlEWIa5L1GfMUDnRE6Oq_SZoGwRyo0XV_yHcf_n1pArJlsvXx9P8RLqoeT5rWpfrt29SPAZOz5V36ud_iGam1UsJMTRlyDB-0D4G2uFsX-ODA9vbuZ15bnV7ezOQvrQvmxdD2m4fVR8u8RR-0GAOOrw-LquhOhmwbo%3D)
I've been in front of large crowds most of my life, but there is something special about speaking to thousands of people rallying for a common political cause - _rather than an athletic one._

Take a look at a quick recap video of Saturday's rally:

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2f746be78029401b8dc7ec25aaf145b2&_e=rpw382qqi62G_rExmGLpE7WcCjWbzP8ysBn7tceQulC1wzv1JP5kKGsRGKQI4roCJdXqTYJYat3P13q-wMr319lpRvRfbNcBTAylz_xbWjaTb_SE7jHiMVm-EadgrxbQUnAe2hiwwr0yafU3AOVCa1wJ2NTdcuapq_7VxSByvHA2C-htbdIwwBOj4EH5lhayO5S1BefS87Uy_QUQH6t6b9VYdGA0sFoLd81vGiIqvCtBB1bklBsm3M6G65gxwtlyxhFI_ZofRq0buXs44UX_3_Jqq7uLYQj2P1XpWZ4cj71Cnw1bP-uN1Ib_Y5erW5IGtSRm_E6zgAB4xXnn3W_Ylrbjnj4plQbNfWVmT91b1dSgUGd74apiC6EvAKO6EsqNIT2S_yvDj3MLLIePKOATyieBrSrCb4MHPTM_pc0B8dEtWk0G_baqMtprMJca8s-CcMv1V5iLF6U47-NO7Uj3SlY2rw5M4orr6lfxeptjGy0%3D)
We're building a movement here in Georgia that is only going to continue to grow between now and November 2022.

**It is an honor to have the support of my longtime friend, President Trump, in our campaign for the United States Senate.**

**Fellow Conservative, we need your active support of Team Herschel, too.**

One of the most urgent things currently facing our campaign is our very first quarterly fundraising deadline THIS THURSDAY. **[Will you chip in a few bucks right now to make sure we hit our fundraising goal in the next 3 days?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2f746be78029401b8dc7ec25aaf145b2&_e=rpw382qqi62G_rExmGLpE7WcCjWbzP8ysBn7tceQulC1wzv1JP5kKGsRGKQI4roCJdXqTYJYat3P13q-wMr319lpRvRfbNcBTAylz_xbWjaTb_SE7jHiMVm-EadgrxbQUnAe2hiwwr0yafU3AOVCa1wJ2NTdcuapq_7VxSByvHA2C-htbdIwwBOj4EH5lhayO5S1BefS87Uy_QUQH6t6b9VYdGA0sFoLd81vGiIqvCtBB1bklBsm3M6G65gxwtlybYGBuSOidFVNUo2L9kSjfXDTk3RpjWINYX_rU6Qz2wc0Cq-Ezm8vA9Qviv8kWfpJ8zlmmsIXm0cvBfoa5GXCAat2EEbjRLv4t-CFfAfRel-m5rPsTv-F3AncYHc2as2qLE2RRbw9_HaqmTKrhTuqM1-_SDKIIZRKdZmW1OQWVwKYvP5jfKYPTQ4Yo0kV1tUznQVMGLRu0964bWG06oZvgZXnIIAR3kcXSrqpZchjNcE%3D)**

[**HELP US HIT OUR QUARTERLY GOAL**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2f746be78029401b8dc7ec25aaf145b2&_e=rpw382qqi62G_rExmGLpE7WcCjWbzP8ysBn7tceQulC1wzv1JP5kKGsRGKQI4roCJdXqTYJYat3P13q-wMr319lpRvRfbNcBTAylz_xbWjaTb_SE7jHiMVm-EadgrxbQUnAe2hiwwr0yafU3AOVCa1wJ2NTdcuapq_7VxSByvHA2C-htbdIwwBOj4EH5lhayO5S1BefS87Uy_QUQH6t6b9VYdGA0sFoLd81vGiIqvCtBB1bklBsm3M6G65gxwtly76eh2Tu7CyvL8ygnbVvw9-E5BkyPlV6UL3PL5Tif3VSWIv3Sm-YATLWla6HIt50AUe7n30NnBN8SE9oHPQ5230qQNQ8tmvM_pU4koj2qBBfgtgWh6yWUvwdc6IvAzivz7-y71gOPQrGghB-E5zJ6BEeZQ9618V0L1o4w1HgzYTfa-bBtHRA-Xsxz4l7Ij-u4HRW8ZtZ2oKFPWeNT93x01wZrVZFnpZjtb6WsVDH5c_k%3D)
Please stand with President Trump and our team as we try to win a Republican Majority in the Senate - starting in Georgia.

This public filing deadline will be the first real test of our campaign, so we need the help of every member of Team Herschel before midnight on Thursday to put up the best numbers possible.

Fellow Conservative, I am counting on your help.

Thanks,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2f746be78029401b8dc7ec25aaf145b2&_e=rpw382qqi62G_rExmGLpE7WcCjWbzP8ysBn7tceQulC1wzv1JP5kKGsRGKQI4roCJdXqTYJYat3P13q-wMr319lpRvRfbNcBTAylz_xbWjaTb_SE7jHiMVm-EadgrxbQUnAe2hiwwr0yafU3AOVCa1wJ2NTdcuapq_7VxSByvHA2C-htbdIwwBOj4EH5lhayO5S1BefS87Uy_QUQH6t6b9VYdGA0sFoLd81vGiIqvCtBB1bklBsm3M6G65gxwtlybGBqLJgZpphUdjzDGSfyvngulNghMKgD4CJ7BdB20h_ohGzCiqcsZ0aFE0IqLvAtcqLfVB_7-QwKlrYfTVNLWsaFk05Maj7Bqrkqh2qLUq8nLFj2fMw8idKnXqA9bTAaIKQC3o7vg31VF3WyFrxTG-rZcXlVZw-Hd5pPbYoLixTwvMlEkb1sMyKjLD-U8fAl-zKbbeVKsX3cQiYir603fnxYcKERAkP_SE0evDRF70U%3D)
Herschel Walker

[** Watch Now -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2f746be78029401b8dc7ec25aaf145b2&_e=rpw382qqi62G_rExmGLpE7WcCjWbzP8ysBn7tceQulC1wzv1JP5kKGsRGKQI4roCJdXqTYJYat3P13q-wMr319lpRvRfbNcBTAylz_xbWjaTb_SE7jHiMVm-EadgrxbQUnAe2hiwwr0yafU3AOVCa1wJ2NTdcuapq_7VxSByvHA2C-htbdIwwBOj4EH5lhayO5S1BefS87Uy_QUQH6t6b9VYdGA0sFoLd81vGiIqvCtBB1bklBsm3M6G65gxwtlyF4xseWWZL0Hoz1eQlpkBpu9dAqNBZf3l83YYqWZwLhlBL-0HBn1cQUd8gAwmlvjqNossfVd2OMNmqK-RsJux8H2HEIZZcDPIn5l9Y6jM7_jVNIjuWW4td1p6JnZ59dzO22mu6iF1EX4Mcvo0_TgKTNsj1PxTA175bhJRYDSmcNhz7CpGeW6N-ACZqkEuyGy4CVvqEO2XQBN3am-1rmOtnn-MIbcFo_EWb-gSjVCGdHI%3D)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: humbly asking;
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_)
I'll cut straight to the chase: **[I'm coming to you just 48 hours before our Democrats' critical End of Quarter Deadline to ask for your $3 to defend our House Majority. Can I count on your support before time runs out?](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| [END OF QUARTER DEADLINE: ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_aGxf2xG-)[ 9/30, 11:59PM](https://links.e.dccc.)[
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.)

---

**Your help could not come at a more critical time:**

- Republicans need to flip just **FIVE** seats to defeat our razor-thin House Majority.
- They have broken **SIX** straight fundraising records to do just that.
- And they have nearly **$5 MILLION** more in their war chest than our House Democrats.

Listen: We cannot trust Republicans with power ever again. Ever.

**Not** while they're **UNDERMINING** our democracy.

**Not** while they're **RESTRICTING** our right to vote.

**And not** while they're **DESTROYING** reproductive freedom.

I'm committed to doing everything in my power to stop House Republicans from taking back power. It has never been more apparent what is at stake.

_But I can 't do it alone._

Grassroots Democrats - like you - must unite as one to stop the GOP's momentum in its tracks to protect our House Majority.

**[That's why I'm personally asking for your help: Can you rush in $3 before the DCCC's End of Quarter Deadline to protect our House Majority and defeat Trump's House Republicans?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/er4dfw4K-)**
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-cg_)
---
| [**Chip in $35 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/qkxpQe_)
---
| [**Chip in $50 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/XX_)
---
| [**Chip in $100 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $250 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Or donate another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_aGxf2xG-)
---

Thank you,

Adam Schiff
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45695156&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4NTA0ODc3MAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45695156&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4NTA0ODc3MAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Common Good VA
subject: Virginia could fall to Trumpism

body:

| Be honest with me Peter, are you fed up with all the division that continues to keep our nation from reaching its fullest potential?

[** YES **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=847b7f3c488c4d2d89c41b62300ffeb2&_e=1mcsNaeMcJvDC6ez9X-knDaFWyiuzylOoG7tkr49cX3z__oQ4pVzzbatGphMR-NchulfXE43uQREQ_aKaj0eRCv6shQm7Txgh4uPFATc4e6YtmzV5qfZI8TeSdD3oaODZJX4UIJXnhY2QToTUlZAluzBKQ8EfM4le0DuLaHT2zl9kR6QiLDqBGjKcP_ZioCRJT75XG_3YuzgH9dU2AJ-hKyNQt0EmHeZBaRVO_o-mDYg3IVAaRXbKXpsMXQHfujk-k0kPyeI9YbfVRNc6RNpNU2XB2di3-2Tfcy7o9NELzXLUE9BFPnaLuf-688jXJCJU0NENrA7PJqSpVGtFtN-f71ZGtB10GCG43v5S0_qjH0L5NADGWNCXsK0nBiHNxOVVkoUBpox9F941qKN4zfkCFpjIRhRC_i8CeSyC5ExWYRPKOLbS-p8G4Td5PMa93-9CTdYIPbYkFChvWIRA_Zh9Q%3D%3D) [** NO **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=847b7f3c488c4d2d89c41b62300ffeb2&_e=1mcsNaeMcJvDC6ez9X-knDaFWyiuzylOoG7tkr49cX3z__oQ4pVzzbatGphMR-NchulfXE43uQREQ_aKaj0eRCv6shQm7Txgh4uPFATc4e6YtmzV5qfZI8TeSdD3oaODZJX4UIJXnhY2QToTUlZAluzBKQ8EfM4le0DuLaHT2zl9kR6QiLDqBGjKcP_ZioCRJT75XG_3YuzgH9dU2AJ-hKyNQt0EmHeZBaRVO_o-mDYWWtxvSC3OUr-XOTS12NRElrYRGZkR3jy4Yoxp2WaeDahVpWUc3lNf7oeQEyoS4QiTfiZw0cBCGi5mKIRjxxqk3AbwAGMBn_PKSk1ymthefETJZSz-Vwjl5dAHXJf1PnXCqguZisvtpB5Z_BsaYGx2Oyy00buEdOVkfLLutgzKpTsHw6vBEYqQchzshUPWvPteUlcqpHLfgE_pDgWqU4EJ-OYBljF4Qea2K5V1iR079Q%3D%3D)
Even if you like the division, you can’t honestly tell me you’re happy with how everything is going these days, especially with our government. I mean just look at these politicians in Washington; when was the last time they did a real day’s work instead of bickering amongst themselves or complaining on TV?

Personally, I think there are too many politicians in Congress who treat their duties like a part-time job, and it’s about time we start kicking them out of office. **If you’re willing to help with that, then please support my campaign so we can finally get some real work done on Capitol Hill.**

It doesn’t take a fortune to reach voters these days, but it still costs money to place digital ads or send out a mailer. So, if you’re willing to, **can you pitch in $10, $20, or even $50 to help me get elected so we can get Congress back to working for the people again?**

I can’t do this without you, but together we can get things done. The choice is yours.

Thank you,

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=847b7f3c488c4d2d89c41b62300ffeb2&_e=1mcsNaeMcJvDC6ez9X-knDaFWyiuzylOoG7tkr49cX3z__oQ4pVzzbatGphMR-NchulfXE43uQREQ_aKaj0eRCv6shQm7Txgh4uPFATc4e6YtmzV5qfZI8TeSdD3oaODZJX4UIJXnhY2QToTUlZAluzBKQ8EfM4le0DuLaHT2zl9kR6QiLDqBGjKcP_ZioCRJT75XG_3YuzgH9dU2AJ-hKyNQt0EmHeZBaRVO_o-mDYvrD7Z63E539Tirtq184vika3wQ9kcN0N1EW66_kEHnvpMlfyEbPoS5Ax3wp8VFQe-9uh7Te2lvi-on-k98rPLBvXnrzZDgKwPh03DZ1fou3UoyzFS-7L9XMMjxe6-KtdUkpr6nx68-EDAClg05mq8rVQAc84-1EP7Bdv2LfIvN-zxJw814pguOiI2FPTqnT9ZI2RWzO8RXR5Y68tgd4i3fUtQ-wGoCpXK8k0xpt8TDg%3D%3D)
**Marc Molinaro**
Candidate
New York’s 19th Congressional District

I can’t do this without you, but together we can get things done. The choice is yours.

Thank you,

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36660483/308784910/-2023814932?refcode=20210929.1_EW_9GF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjA4Y2U2OS0xNDIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z56FnDzDoVDy56ZH6me9IIleva8eFQJu6aQE99bpAJU=)

| | Derek, there’s good news and bad news.

The bad news is that we’re not where we need to be to hit our $2 million September goal — and we only have less than 48 hours before our deadline.

**The good news is that I just got approval to launch a one-day donation match opportunity to help close the gap.**

_**[Will you take advantage of this opportunity by chipping in right now? Your contribution will be matched, dollar for dollar — but only if you chip in before midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36660484/308784911/-2023814932?refcode=20210929.1_EW_9GF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjA4Y2U2OS0xNDIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z56FnDzDoVDy56ZH6me9IIleva8eFQJu6aQE99bpAJU=)**_

This couldn’t come at a better time, Derek. The end of September filing deadline is one of our last chances to show our grassroots strength before the end of the campaign.

With Glenn Youngkin pouring millions of dollars from his personal wealth into his campaign coffers, we need to show political experts, Donald Trump, and anyone else watching that we have the resources to compete in the final weeks of the election.

If we don’t, they’ll keep piling on the cash and what is now a tied race will turn into a Youngkin lead in no time.

_**[If you’ve been waiting for the right time to make a contribution, this is it, Derek — there’s never been a better time to double your impact and do your part to fight for Virginia and end Trumpism in our country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36660485/308784912/-2023814932?refcode=20210929.1_EW_9GF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjA4Y2U2OS0xNDIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z56FnDzDoVDy56ZH6me9IIleva8eFQJu6aQE99bpAJU=)**_

Thank you for taking advantage of this limited-time opportunity,

Ellie Warner
Finance Director

| | Peter, We know Jasmine has a strong chance at winning this race against Republican Madison Cawthorn. Why? **Because she’s already won in Buncombe County _twice_ before.** By organizing everywhere, talking to everyone, and doing a whole lot of listening, she won two terms as county commissioner. Peter, she’s ready to put in the work and do it again. [**But first, Jasmine is facing a critical FEC deadline that ends *tomorrow* and she still has $6,476 left to raise. Will you rush $10 or more to help her meet her critical end-of-quarter goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36662336/308788697/1030732756?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210929_FR_EOQ6AlreadyWon_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzRkZGRjOS0xYzIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O7IkKBtUo-mOmd8vGf6kyaUtT-0NYM2EVe4-z5C-HLo=) | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36662337/308788703/1030732756?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210929_FR_EOQ6AlreadyWon_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzRkZGRjOS0xYzIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O7IkKBtUo-mOmd8vGf6kyaUtT-0NYM2EVe4-z5C-HLo=)

Jasmine’s #OrganizingEverywhere tour -- where she will continue door-knocking, writing postcards, and making phone calls in all 17 WNC counties -- is what’s allowing her to connect with voters and make their voices heard. So far our team has knocked doors in six counties, connecting directly with voters about what matters most to them.
Meeting voters where they are doesn’t come cheap, but because of this grassroots team, we are able to make it happen.
**Jasmine’s FEC report will soon become public to everyone, and in order to continue our organizing efforts and show our opponents we have what it takes to win (again), we need your support.**

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Your thoughts on the Second Amendment
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5ti3e5li65m9bgmn0cvuho33qgk16vvmisvn53o_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjh60ob4clh2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1a9h3ksdbpe3ui0t4tgm9u1m4u26o8cc0nrbg60_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjh60ob4clh2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znpdqr5due81i0ffiaes804nd0rqbtqsdanbu0jo_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjh60ob4clh2bs)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr5picov8u7jta4t978usq4a4d1e4ilid879pdmo_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjh60ob4clh2bs)**
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zjv7pfgjlqrrejlaas9lu38tvsgjicduq0pkc2l8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6l54l6lv90qec5v5mo4g6p8u37btn0vbm0pekn8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6c9ie4o31chim49fg)

They tracked down a person I did a school project with when I was 12 years old to see what they thought of me. They interviewed friends of mine from high school; they _even hid behind bushes to take a picture of my childhood home._ [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58432883:6fJLfE2FN:m:1:3103520637:48C86641F1C77C9F8E769B94F321EE84:r "House")The Swamp will stop at nothing to destroy me. **Democrats have been in control for nine months, and in record time, they have destroyed everything President Trump built. Our borders are open, we have been humiliated on the world stage,_and they are rushing through $7 Trillion in government handouts._** I am fighting their push to destroy this nation, and they are desperately looking for a way to stop me. **We need to show them reality: Conservatives in America will never stop fighting to protect our freedoms.** At 11:59 pm on Sept 30th, Federal law requires me to close my books and **report my fundraising to the FEC. Naturally, this report will be closely watched by the left - they are expecting their smear campaign to destroy my support.** **[Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $45 before the deadline will let Big Tech and the media know that their scare tactics won't work on American Conservatives.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58432884:6fJLfE2FN:m:1:3103520637:48C86641F1C77C9F8E769B94F321EE84:r "Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $45 before the
deadline will let Big Tech and the media know that their scare tactics won’t work on American Conservatives.")** **They just want to punish me for standing up for YOU and formally objecting to the 2020 election results.** Their tactics won't work on me; I will never stop fighting - but it helps to know who is still standing with me. You still have hours left to make a massive impact on the Conservative movement in America. Unfortunately, once the month ends, **_we can 't extend this deadline._** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58432883:6fJLfE2FN:m:1:3103520637:48C86641F1C77C9F8E769B94F321EE84:r "Timer") **[Will you please make your most generous contribution of $50 or more before this critical fundraising deadline? Any amount, from $5 to the Federal Maximum of $2,900, is greatly appreciated.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58432883:6fJLfE2FN:m:1:3103520637:48C86641F1C77C9F8E769B94F321EE84:r "Will you please make your most
generous contribution of $50 or more before this critical fundraising deadline? Any amount, from $5 to the Federal Maximum of $2,900, is greatly

I need to be ready the next time they interview someone I shared fingerpaints with when I was five years old. **[Will you help me fend off their ridiculous smears and force leaders in Washington to serve the People, not special interests. Please donate before the end of the quarter.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58432883:6fJLfE2FN:m:1:3103520637:48C86641F1C77C9F8E769B94F321EE84:r "Will you help me fend off their ridiculous smears and

U.S. Senator, Missouri P.S. name: Hendrell Remus
subject: re: the radical right
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]
Peter,
Tennessee's Radical Right won't quit. They've catered to their rabid base at every turn and put our kids at the center of their disaster with Knox County schools closing today due to Republican anti-mask protesters. When will it end?
They're not stopping — but neither are we. Our end-of-quarter deadline is September 30th at midnight, but we need to raise $5,690 to close the gap to meet our $50,000 goal. A generous group of donors knows what we're up against, which is why they've agreed to match EVERY donation made until midnight on September 30th.
But we can't do it without you — can you donate $25 now (which doubles to $50!) to help us meet our September end-of-quarter goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

We've taken huge steps this month thanks to you, but we need to finish September strong so that we can build a party that can put Bill Lee out of a job next year.

Building Back Blue,
Hendrell Remus

| | Hi Peter, Stacey Abrams is not afraid to call out the inequitable, indefensible, un-American status quo in our broken healthcare system. In her latest op-ed for CNN Business, Stacey blasted the “callous leadership” of a dozen states for putting “politics over health.” That includes her home state of Georgia's GOP Governor Brian Kemp, who not only turned down the federal government's incentives to expand Medicaid, he defied all logic by rebuking the Biden administration's offer to help Georgia increase COVID-19 vaccination capacity, saying “I will pursue every legal option available to stop this blatantly unlawful overreach.” Kemp is an absolute disgrace, and 2022 should be his last year ever holding public office. **“One person without adequate health care coverage is one too many. Nearly 2.2 million is a disgrace.” Stacey Abrams** | **[RUN, STACEY, RUN!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36671813/308814929/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210929_GEN_FDR_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmM2I5MzU4LTI5MjEtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTEwYTQwNSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MscittvHa6sGN23etkRwfs71s4eMbF7MkOWLOHQMW54=)**

If we can't raise $1,500 this week, the GOP will see it as a clear sign that they can steamroll Stacey's campaign next year.

subject: I want to hear directly from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laurie Bishop for Montana
body:
Take our survey to share your top issues! | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36674512/308818678/-1578382501?refcode=fl_email_su_20210706welcome2_lb_new_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWY2NDBhYi0yYjIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gvv8_pIJCSs_pZ7nauHTsjMj9XFfpQTaxcJ1AGl0d44=&emci=4baef131-7ade-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a9f640ab-2b21-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=13640636)

Friend, In my experience as a state legislator, education advocate, and nonprofit leader, I firmly believe that in order to create positive social change, we need to go to those closest to the work in our communities, ask what resources they need to thrive and be successful, and _listen._ That’s what I’ve done as Livingston’s representative in Montana’s state legislature for the past five years, and it’s what I aim to do as Montana’s next member of Congress. **I want to hear directly from you on what issues you’d like to see me prioritize.** Whether it's state-specific concerns like protecting our public lands and improving access to mental health care, or national-level issues like the GOP’s widespread attacks on voting rights or raising the federal minimum wage, I want to know what’s most important to you at this moment. **[Will you take a minute to share your thoughts with me by taking our survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36674513/308818679/-1578382501?refcode=fl_email_su_20210706welcome2_lb_new_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWY2NDBhYi0yYjIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gvv8_pIJCSs_pZ7nauHTsjMj9XFfpQTaxcJ1AGl0d44=&emci=4baef131-7ade-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a9f640ab-2b21-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=13640636)** | [TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36674514/308818680/-1578382501?refcode=fl_email_su_20210706welcome2_lb_new_xx_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWY2NDBhYi0yYjIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gvv8_pIJCSs_pZ7nauHTsjMj9XFfpQTaxcJ1AGl0d44=&emci=4baef131-7ade-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a9f640ab-2b21-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=13640636)

— Laurie

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Do you have time today?
body:
Allowing Sleepy Joe to continue driving our country into the ground is NOT an option. You and I must take back the Senate in 2022 and put an end to his radical leftwing agenda.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dEH4LgarpcAp2CmMlFJHosU7IRzby4Eb13BeQBzkBmlSS0B0BrQZ12KB-aSh0laOVb-4w1zWi85abgJ-ugPs7F26fQtdxYlvJC1goVHW_ymon4-EVLOGMMZLVuPLyzEdha7VZNqfGCymrZDGwabghn0OvUiaYN6cT8LoUNLzuz_dWCbe7f87vQ==&c=qDpIE8GTBXkwAm_362Ju1xtOKfj8EM20_-0wn4Lg0GBoJjsaC4jF5w==&ch=NyGSYueGhTJqX0aAe1cIY7HoR69T-VYIZVOSjTEuFCew0nBnxK6Aug==)
---
| Peter,
I sent you an email this week about our URGENT deadline but have not heard back yet.
Do you know what's at stake in this election?

* Biden's open borders policies FLOODING our country with a caravan of illegal immigrants
* Critical Race Theory invading classrooms across America
* $3.5 TRILLION budgets that are bankrupting our future generations
* More foreign policy FAILURES like Biden's Afghanistan withdrawal

Allowing Sleepy Joe to continue driving our country into the ground is NOT an option. You and I must take back the Senate in 2022 and put an end to his radical left-wing agenda.
We are running out of time.
I must raise another $15,000 from online supporters before the midnight deadline on September 30th and I am counting on seeing your name, Peter Willis, on the list of donors before time runs out.

Hey Peter,

I just got out of a meeting with Michele where we went over our quarterly fundraising and totals, and **I'm afraid it's not looking good.**

The FEC's quarterly fundraising deadline is on September 30th, and we are still short of our goal. **[We need at least 50 more online donors to chip in $5 or more before midnight on the 30th. We need your support to fund our digital ad campaigns, volunteer recruitment efforts, and campaign flyers. We need your donation to make it happen at the size and scale it takes to win.

The stakes could not be higher. One of our Republican opponents was just endorsed by Trump himself. We cannot afford to risk our opponents reshaping our country. We can't leave hard-working families behind, or leave people without affordable health care, or give up on protecting our environment.

But doing all of that takes _major_ funds.

name: Patrick Clark, Keystone Progress
subject: They have a new, sneaky plan to take down democracy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,
We were not kidding -- they’re coming to take down democracy.

Trump loyalists have a new, sneaky way to make it easier to overturn future fair elections. They're running pro-"big lie" candidates for Secretary of State in swing states like ours.

If elected, they can manipulate elections in their favor. And there are a lot of them. According to Reuters, TEN of the 15 candidates have either declared that the 2020 election was stolen or called for their state’s results to be invalidated or further investigated.

These candidates are up for election Nov. 8, 2022. The time to fight is NOW.

PA lawmakers are already pursuing partisan audits of the 2020 vote. We are working to educate voters on the importance of voting in midterm elections and how to make sure their votes count, but we need your support.

Please help us meet our end-of-month goal. It’s critical that we raise another $300 today. Will you help us get there by donating below?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=092921&amount=10.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=092921&amount=10.00] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=092921&amount=20.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=092921&amount=20.00] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=092921&amount=50.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=092921&amount=50.00]

Thank you for standing with us,

Pat Clark

Abigail is an outstanding public servant who always puts the needs of Central Virginians first. She has led the charge in Congress to advocate for rural broadband expansion and the lowering of prescription drug prices. I am confident Abigail will continue to do crucial work to move our country forward when elected for another term.

**However, Abigail is a 2022 Frontline Member, which means she will not have an easy road ahead of her.

In fact, Abigail's last race was one of the closest House races in the country. She won by less than 2%!**

Outside groups have already begun running ads attacking her in her district, and we expect the opposition to intensify as we get closer to election day.

**That 's why we need to support Abigail now, before the end-of-quarter deadline. With the proper resources to run the strongest campaign possible, we'll send Abigail back to Congress with a resounding victory in 2022.

name: Kevin Schilling, Political Director
subject: I'll be the first to admit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Hi Peter,

Allow me to introduce myself! My name is Kevin Schilling, and I'm Derek's new political director. I'm so excited to be on Team Kilmer and to be working for such a dedicated public servant.

In this new position, I've already seen firsthand just how hard Derek works to deliver results to his constituents -- and to all American families. He's fighting to create affordable housing, protect our climate, invest in our schools, and so much more.

We're all better off for having Derek in Congress where he's fighting hard for each and every one of us. But keeping Derek there next year is going to take resources, and that's why I'm reaching out to you today.

**[Can Derek count on you to help our team ensure we have the resources we need to re-elect him next year? Please, rush a donation of whatever you can before tomorrow's Federal Election Commission end-of-quarter deadline.](https://act.myngp.com/el/SAy2DWYvdCxn4YhShZC0HzcpJRY-KOzZgM241GL0Agg=/ul5fnCzMlQyTBv-FerbDtssMn76U80ipIlK3BI3VopY=?refcode=em21_210929_EOQ3_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210929_EOQ3_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

Here's what I can tell you: **tomorrow 's deadline is a big deal.** After tomorrow's deadline our finance team will be filing our quarterly fundraising numbers with the Federal Election Commission and those numbers will be made viewable to the public. That means anyone who wants to -- members of the press, political opponents, pollsters, etc. -- can see how much we've raised.

If our numbers are strong, it will send a strong message that this grassroots team has what it takes to win.

**[I'm hoping Derek can count on you to rush a donation today before the deadline. Any amount you can contribute will go a long way.](https://act.myngp.com/el/SAy2DWYvdCxn4YhShZC0HzcpJRY-KOzZgM241GL0Agg=/ul5fnCzMlQyTBv-FerbDtssMn76U80ipIlK3BI3VopY=?refcode=em21_210929_EOQ3_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210929_EOQ3_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

Thanks ahead of time and nice meeting you!

\-- Kevin

Kevin Schilling
Political Director
Derek Kilmer for Congress

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Can you give me a chance to explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
When I launched our campaign for Senate, I made a promise that, if elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate. That’s what I’ve done since winning.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36680286/308837225/859910255?amount=3&refcode=UD_20210929_EMSPL_E1_T0_ND_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyZmRlODE4LTM0MjEtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTEwYTQwNSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Pbm1aoqDBtYLTZvvF24zMXpEsxjGf2HVZQUFzuotTB8=) Peter -

In just a moment, I am going to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign for the U.S. Senate and UniteDemocrats. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.

Here is the truth:

When I launched our campaign for Senate, I made a promise that, if elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate. That’s what I’ve done since taking office.

Now, that approach doesn’t make everyone happy. And we just learned of yet another right-wing dark money group running ads targeting me in Arizona.

So with our end-of-month deadline coming up, I am asking you to contribute $3 to help me fight back.

I know $3 doesn’t sound like the kind of money that can beat multi-million dollar ad campaigns targeting me, but by the time you got to this point in the email, someone else added their own $3. And they’re hoping you do the same.

It all adds up, and that’s how we win: together. So I am asking:

That’s what I’ve done since winning. | = Peter - In just a moment, I am going to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign for the U.S. Senate and UniteDemocrats. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important. Here is the truth: When I launched our campaign for Senate, I made a promise that, if elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate. That’s what I’ve done since taking office. Now, that approach doesn’t make everyone happy. And we just learned of yet another right-wing dark money group running ads targeting me in Arizona. So with our end-of-month deadline coming up, I am asking you to contribute $3 to help me fight back. I know $3 doesn’t sound like the kind of money that can beat multi-million dollar ad campaigns targeting me, but by the time you got to this point in the email, someone else added their own $3. body:
#

Hey folks,
Sorry to bother you again, but it looks like we need a few more folks to chip in before our deadline, and I’m hoping you could be one of them.
Frankly, there are a lot of obstacles standing between me, a gay Black working person from the North Philly projects, and winning this race to replace Pat Toomey in the U.S. Senate.
**But if we reach our 15,000 donation goal by midnight tomorrow, we can build a movement big enough to clear these obstacles not only for me, but for lots of other young working-class champions.**
[So, I’m personally asking: Can I count on you to be one of the grassroots supporters we need to come through with a contribution today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36681008/308840009/-353695395?refcode2=85058bcd-3521-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&refcode=em210929-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTA1OGJjZC0zNTIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nuarq3F6VlG5nRUzmcBlZ-Mtgo7vChfCHMJjn6fBTIA=)

Any amount you give makes a big difference in the momentum we’re building, especially ahead of this deadline when we are legally required to publicly report how much money we've raised.
But, honestly, it’s the fact that you chose to donate that means the most.
Because when you step up to make your first donation, you send a powerful message that says a government that works for working people has working people in it — working people who can speak for ourselves.
**And you join a big, bold coalition of working folks — I’m talking from Philly to Erie — to take our fight for Pennsylvania’s families to Washington.**
[I hope I can count on you to help us make it happen, friend. If you’re able, please consider making your first contribution before our FEC deadline tomorrow.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36681014/308840015/-353695395?refcode2=85058bcd-3521-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&refcode=em210929-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTA1OGJjZC0zNTIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nuarq3F6VlG5nRUzmcBlZ-Mtgo7vChfCHMJjn6fBTIA=)

clean_body: Hey folks, Sorry to bother you again, but it looks like we need a few more folks to chip in before our deadline, and I’m hoping you could be one of them. Frankly, there are a lot of obstacles standing between me, a gay Black working person from the North Philly projects, and winning this race to replace Pat Toomey in the U.S. Senate. But if we reach our 15,000 donation goal by midnight tomorrow, we can build a movement big enough to clear these obstacles not only for me, but for lots of other young working-class champions. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Any amount you give makes a big difference in the momentum we’re building, especially ahead of this deadline when we are legally required to publicly report how much money we've raised. But, honestly, it’s the fact that you chose to donate that means the most. Because when you step up to make your first donation, you send a powerful message that says a government that works for working people has working people in it — working people who can speak for ourselves. And you join a big, bold coalition of working folks — I’m talking from Philly to Erie — to take our fight for Pennsylvania’s families to Washington. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thanks in advance. I’m grateful that we’re in this together. Malcolm * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 22395 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. subject: Why we need Kirsten in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
A local doctor explains why Kirsten is the best choice for Congress. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36681020/308840022/41694283?refcode=X_092921_EOQ_H&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTE1OTNkNC0zNTIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ryp5_VuDpuhQTmjtv7teVM7ZKNUmFT4Y8pmqZAsbB9w=)
---
Hello Friend,
My name is Dr. Lisa Soltani, and in a minute I'm going to ask you to join me in [_**making a contribution to Kirsten Engel's campaign**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36681021/308840023/41694283?refcode=X_092921_EOQ_H&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTE1OTNkNC0zNTIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ryp5_VuDpuhQTmjtv7teVM7ZKNUmFT4Y8pmqZAsbB9w=). But first, let me tell you why she is desperately needed in Congress.

**I've been practicing medicine in Tucson for twenty years.** I've seen firsthand how good healthcare policy, like the Affordable Care Act, can benefit our community by expanding coverage. But there are still far too many uninsured Arizonans. And those who are covered are often gouged by the rising cost of prescription drugs.

I've heard countless times from members of Congress that they'll reign in Big Pharma. But when the time comes to do something about it, the public always seems to get shortchanged.

Here in Southern Arizona, we have the opportunity to elect a woman to Congress who I know will make healthcare a top priority. At the State Legislature, Kirsten Engel worked to expand AHCCCS and to provide healthcare coverage to our most vulnerable populations. In Congress I know she will **fight to protect and expand the Affordable Care Act and lower the cost of prescription drugs.**

[_**We need Kirsten Engel in Congress. I hope you will join me in supporting her with a contribution today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36681022/308840024/41694283?refcode=X_092921_EOQ_H&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTE1OTNkNC0zNTIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ryp5_VuDpuhQTmjtv7teVM7ZKNUmFT4Y8pmqZAsbB9w=)

Thank you,
Dr. Lisa Soltani

But my campaign needs the funds to do that, so any amount that you can pitch in at this moment is crucial to our success. \- Mondaire Jones = | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. body:
I’ve seen Susan’s leadership firsthand, and trust me when I say that we need to keep her powerful voice in Congress.

| Peter,

I’m writing to ask you to contribute to my colleague Susan Wild’s re-election campaign in Pennsylvania’s Seventh Congressional District ahead of her FEC quarterly deadline. Susan is on our DCCC list of 2022 Frontline Members — a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to protecting our Democratic House Majority next year.

I’ve seen Susan’s leadership firsthand, and trust me when I say that we need to keep her powerful voice in Congress. [_**That’s why I’m asking: Will you chip in $10, $25, or more to help Susan build on this moment and protect our Democratic Majority?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36682595/308847338/-1930076705?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210929-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzA5MTY5Yy0zNzIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w_JZvdSbZq0K6QXwimRSGOQAeU3ZUquVGWKzNz0XQj8=)

Peter, thanks to the support of strong grassroots donors like you, we were able to protect our Majority in 2020 so House Democrats can continue to fight for COVID-19 relief, expand access to affordable health care, build our economy back better, and deliver on the issues that really matter to you and your family.

**Now, we’re tasked with holding our Majority once again, and to be frank, our Frontline Members like Susan Wild have a tough fight ahead.** Republican special interests have already made it clear that they’re all-in on curbing our progress and undermining the efforts of everyone who has worked so hard to elect Susan.

**What’s more, Susan won one of the closest House races in the nation in 2020, and she’s facing the same self-funding far-right opponent in what is already being called a "toss-up" election.** I know Susan is up to the challenge, but it’s going to take the full strength of this grassroots movement to push back against outside, special interest influence and deliver another resounding victory for the people of the Greater Lehigh Valley.

[_**So I’m calling on you now to stand with us by rushing a contribution of $10, $25, or more before the FEC quarterly filing deadline to keep Susan Wild in Congress and protect our Democratic Majority >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36682597/308847340/-1930076705?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210929-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzA5MTY5Yy0zNzIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w_JZvdSbZq0K6QXwimRSGOQAeU3ZUquVGWKzNz0XQj8=)

Friend, The polls are tightening every day, and with just over a month until Election Day, our efforts to protect our slim Democratic majority in the House of Delegates and secure another statewide sweep are going to come down to the wire. I'll put it plainly: every dollar we raise between now and Election Day will be spent turning out voters, and if we turn out our voters on November 2, we will win. It's that simple. **[Please contribute as generously as you can before our quarterly fundraising deadline Thursday at midnight so we can keep Virginia blue!](https://act.myngp.com/el/wAMiDZ1h9X5TFlWP-pnYeTgGYYamhOYiB6CPhVx0EhE=/nF3bubpkaNDCllHkyTtsQlIEYFpbnYhVzKbVPxK51zo=)** Glenn Youngkin has already spent over $17 million (!) of his personal fortune in an attempt to buy the Executive Mansion and turn back the clocks on the progress we've made over the past four years. If our grassroots supporters step up today, we can compete with Glenn Youngkin and his bottomless pockets. **_Please_[ join me by making a contribution today so we can keep the progress going!](https://act.myngp.com/el/wAMiDZ1h9X5TFlWP-pnYeTgGYYamhOYiB6CPhVx0EhE=/nF3bubpkaNDCllHkyTtsQlIEYFpbnYhVzKbVPxK51zo=)** \- Ralph Northam

Peter, it's Congressman Dan Crenshaw.

I just had to reach out.

Nancy Pelosi's Majority is hanging on by a thread... _and she 's panicking._ We're in a great position to take back the House, but you know as well as I do that everything can change in an instant.

The Radical Left is already attacking us - they're spending millions against top conservative patriots and investing millions more in their grassroots activist networks.

With every member of the Radical Left determined to see us fail, it's absolutely critical we hit EVERY last fundraising goal. _**Falling short even one time could mean the difference between winning and losing.**_

**[That's why, today, I am coming to you with a humble request: Can I count on you to chip in $10, $25, or even just $1 to ensure we hit our critical mid-month deadline?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58434532:JP009E2Ns:m:1:3253819041:3D8B0882A175D01A7D0765DC4FCCEC90:r "That’s why,

Team,

name: Kelda Roys
subject: My friend Tom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | I’m State Senator Kelda Roys, and was previously the Executive Director for NARAL Pro-Choice Wisconsin. Earlier this year, I had the honor to endorse Tom Nelson for the United States Senate. I’ve known Tom for over 17 years, and one of his greatest strengths is his courage — even when it could have ended his political career.

Despite representing a red area, Tom has always been a stalwart champion of women’s rights and reproductive justice. Unlike other Democrats in the legislature, I never had to question where Tom stood on abortion rights when he was in the Assembly, even though he represented a conservative district. Tom voted pro-choice every single time — even when other Democrats caved, and even when he knew it might cost him his seat.

With the sad anniversary of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsberg’s passing last week, it’s absolutely critical that we focus on electing a US Senator who will defend _Roe v. Wade_ and reproductive freedom. Tom has proven again and again that he stands with women — not the anti-choice forces who want to take us backwards.

We can’t give Ron Johnson another six years to attack our rights and health care. The outrageous Texas abortion ban rewarding bounty hunters who go after anyone assisting women in accessing abortion care shows what’s at stake.

We need to elect Tom to the United States Senate — our fundamental rights depend on it. [Will you chip in right now to support Tom’s campaign and rid the United States Senate of Ron Johnson?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36685282/308856999/594431030?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_3MO_210929_1_8&refcode2=987c5feb-3c21-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODdjNWZlYi0zYzIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ahIAoLBl28C443XSWjdhNENIfuunwJO7Bc0dWtDpMbM=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

I am 100% certain that Tom is the US Senator that Wisconsin needs to fight for all of us and stand up to special interests. Tom knows that restricting healthcare access disproportionately harms marginalized people, like young people, people of color, low income people, and LGBTQ+ people. **His support for Medicare for All proves that he is ready to fix our broken for-profit healthcare system.**

[Chip in now to support Tom’s campaign >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36685299/308857018/594431030?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_3MO_210929_1_8&refcode2=987c5feb-3c21-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODdjNWZlYi0zYzIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ahIAoLBl28C443XSWjdhNENIfuunwJO7Bc0dWtDpMbM=)

clean_body: | | I’m State Senator Kelda Roys, and was previously the Executive Director for NARAL Pro-Choice Wisconsin. Earlier this year, I had the honor to endorse Tom Nelson for the United States Senate. I’ve known Tom for over 17 years, and one of his greatest strengths is his courage — even when it could have ended his political career. Despite representing a red area, Tom has always been a stalwart champion of women’s rights and reproductive justice. Unlike other Democrats in the legislature, I never had to question where Tom stood on abortion rights when he was in the Assembly, even though he represented a conservative district. Tom voted pro-choice every single time — even when other Democrats caved, and even when he knew it might cost him his seat. With the sad anniversary of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsberg’s passing last week, it’s absolutely critical that we focus on electing a US Senator who will defend Roe v. Wade and reproductive freedom. Tom has proven again and again that he stands with women — not the anti-choice forces who want to take us backwards. We can’t give Ron Johnson another six years to attack our rights and health care. The outrageous Texas abortion ban rewarding bounty hunters who go after anyone assisting women in accessing abortion care shows what’s at stake. We need to elect Tom to the United States Senate — our fundamental rights depend on it. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = I am 100% certain that Tom is the US Senator that Wisconsin needs to fight for all of us and stand up to special interests. Tom knows that restricting healthcare access disproportionately harms marginalized people, like young people, people of color, low income people, and LGBTQ+ people. His support for Medicare for All proves that he is ready to fix our broken for-profit healthcare system. = Thank you for stepping up, Kelda Roys State Senator (Madison) = | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin Nelson for Wisconsin PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**

He'll be a fearless advocate for policies that will protect our democracy and transform our economy for the better, and he won't let special interest groups tell him what to do.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36685570/308858113/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_210929EOQ1_EOQ_ZB_5_G_N_Logo&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzhlODg5Yi0zZDIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qTkUOb5WAuXR1SCpSE4ZUrOn3wdx_n7JCOFcECTJrfo=)
