Hi Derek — I'm Zoë. I'd like to tell you a little about my husband Chris, why I'm so excited for him to be the next Congressman from PA-17, and why he needs your help before tomorrow's major fundraising deadline. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36685571/308858116/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_210929EOQ1_EOQ_ZB_5_G_N_P1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzhlODg5Yi0zZDIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qTkUOb5WAuXR1SCpSE4ZUrOn3wdx_n7JCOFcECTJrfo=) Chris and I met in law school nearly a decade ago, and I could never have imagined where we or our country would be today. We've built a family of three amazing young children (plus our adorable pup, Yankee Doodle). Whether it's being a father or using the law to protect people's civil rights, Chris at every turn demonstrates compassion, honesty, and determination. And he never loses sight of what matters the most, for our family and for other families here in western Pennsylvania.

These are the values we need more of in Congress, now more so than ever. No political race is easy — especially for a young family — but I believe strongly in what Chris has to offer western Pennsylvania. **He'll be a fearless advocate for policies that will protect our democracy and transform our economy for the better, and he won't let special interest groups tell him what to do.**

So I'm doing all I can to help this campaign come out of the gate strong. Tomorrow is the first public fundraising deadline since Chris announced his candidacy, and he needs as much support as possible.

[**I know that Chris will be an incredible representative for the people of PA-17. Please donate what you can before tomorrow night to help him win this race — he's just $3,048 away from reaching his goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36685572/308858118/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_210929EOQ1_EOQ_ZB_5_G_N_L1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzhlODg5Yi0zZDIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qTkUOb5WAuXR1SCpSE4ZUrOn3wdx_n7JCOFcECTJrfo=)

Thank you so much,

Zoë | | | **Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy.** ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36685575/308858120/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_210929EOQ1_EOQ_ZB_5_G_N_BioBox&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzhlODg5Yi0zZDIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qTkUOb5WAuXR1SCpSE4ZUrOn3wdx_n7JCOFcECTJrfo=)****

Right now, Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is **_LEADING_** in some polls. Not only that, but national Republicans are pouring money into Virginia to **_out-organize_** Democrats, and **_Republican enthusiasm is at an all time HIGH._**

What’s happening?!

Democrats in Virginia aren’t waking up to how close this election is going to be. If things continue to go the way they’re going right now, Trumpism is going to sweep across Virginia, and we can kiss blue Virginia goodbye.

**[That’s why we’re launching a last minute goal of raising $25,000 before the end of September to make sure Democrats across Virginia know that the future of the entire country is at stake. We can hardly believe it, team.

Governor Kim Reynolds recently said she's "proud to be a governor who places her trust in the people."

With election year around the corner, Reynolds is **pretending** like she actually cares about local governance, she's **denying** that the COVID-19 pandemic hasn't been an _absolute disaster_ for our state, and she's **distracting** from the hypocrisy of her administration.

[**That's her playbook for re-election and if you're ready to chip in $5 right now, Ras can use it before the end of the month to help set the record straight with Iowa voters.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36686471/308862308/975127612?refcode=em-92921-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzdmYTA4MS0zZTIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Ofu5H2yqxRSnW7OemRt7RvqHer3YTY9bwN33k7FZlo=)

Here are the facts:

» Just a few weeks ago, a federal judge issued a restraining order that stopped Reynolds from enforcing her ban on mask mandates. **At least 24 school districts have implemented them since then.**

**» Reynolds rejected $95 million for testing and contact tracing.** She BANNED daily reporting of COVID-19 numbers and her spokesperson has pushed discredited information about masks.

» And here's the icing on the cake, friend: Reynolds used nearly $450,000 in COVID-19 relief money to cover salaries and benefits for staff working in her office, and then turned around and prevented child care providers from using that very same money for... increased pay.

**This isn't the type of leadership you'd expect from someone who supposedly trusts the people -- it's more pandering to the far-right so she can advance her own career at the expense of our health and safety.**

Iowa deserves better. Ras has a proven record fighting for kids and working families -- now we need your help in making sure more people know that he's taking on Kim Reynolds.

clean_body: | = We can hardly believe it, team. Governor Kim Reynolds recently said she's "proud to be a governor who places her trust in the people." With election year around the corner, Reynolds is pretending like she actually cares about local governance, she's denying that the COVID-19 pandemic hasn't been an absolute disaster for our state, and she's distracting from the hypocrisy of her administration. = | = Here are the facts: » Just a few weeks ago, a federal judge issued a restraining order that stopped Reynolds from enforcing her ban on mask mandates. At least 24 school districts have implemented them since then. » Reynolds rejected $95 million for testing and contact tracing. She BANNED daily reporting of COVID-19 numbers and her spokesperson has pushed discredited information about masks. » And here's the icing on the cake, friend: Reynolds used nearly $450,000 in COVID-19 relief money to cover salaries and benefits for staff working in her office, and then turned around and prevented child care providers from using that very same money for... increased pay. This isn't the type of leadership you'd expect from someone who supposedly trusts the people -- it's more pandering to the far-right so she can advance her own career at the expense of our health and safety. Iowa deserves better. Ras has a proven record fighting for kids and working families -- now we need your help in making sure more people know that he's taking on Kim Reynolds. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks in advance, Team Ras = | | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. In Delaware, we’re proud of so many things.

name: Warner HQ
subject: our progress is at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Our end-of-quarter deadline is make or break.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36686870/308864104/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjg1MjllMS0zZTIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FdoqzY-JxU3Q3gRxzoKiMyJYQ0XNLDDADxCdgFUnBbU=&emci=aec0207b-7e20-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=bb8529e1-3e21-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Our end-of-quarter deadline is make or break. Sen. Warner has spent the summer getting COVID relief to Americans in need and negotiating infrastructure and budget legislation that puts families first. This type of progress is only possible when we protect the Democratic majority in the Senate. Whether it’s across Virginia or on Capitol Hill, we’ve seen that support from people like you is essential to helping Democrats keep up the fight for our communities. We need to show our opponents that we’re ready to keep up our fight. **_[We still need to raise $11,724 to reach our end-of-quarter goal. Can you pitch in $5 to help us close the gap? # **Friend — TOMORROW marks our third End of Quarter fundraising deadline of the year! Let me take a moment to explain why it matters.**

---
At the end of each fundraising deadline, how much we’ve raised is made public.

**That number is used as a barometer of how much momentum we have in our fight to defend President Trump’s legacy, hold Joe Biden accountable, and win back the U.S. Senate.**

**Furthermore, how much we raise directly impacts our ability to help conservatives WIN in Kansas and across the country. **

While Democrats have elites and the woke left, I have patriots like YOU. [**Can I count on you to rush a donation of $22 — or even just $5 — right now to help us finish the quarter strong?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/d0c6515298a05e1d/5035b8b9c8479229c3d6b838967d376c)

**There’s never been more on the line for our country’s future than right now.**

Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have created a border crisis and humiliated us on the world stage.

As you read this, their Democrat buddies in Congress are trying to raise your taxes and ram through a $3.5 TRILLION spending bill.

And they’re doubling down in their quest to make our elections less secure and give themselves total power.

**The first thing we can do to stop them is to make an End of Quarter showing that serves notice we’re coming to take our country back.**

[**Can I count you? Please chip in NOW.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/d0c6515298a05e1d/c74f44eabeb6eb15c3d6b838967d376c)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: 40 hours to unravel a Party Puppet!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
body:
You’re amazing and this is so exciting!
| | | [](https://secure.lauraloomerforcongress.com/40hours?utm_source=40hours&utm_medium=housefile&utm_campaign=mb&amount=20)
Patriot,

[](https://secure.lauraloomerforcongress.com/40hours?utm_source=40hours&utm_medium=housefile&utm_campaign=mb&amount=20) You’re amazing and this is so exciting!

With 40 hours left until the end of the quarter, [**we have just $14,082 left to raise**](https://secure.lauraloomerforcongress.com/40hours?utm_source=40hours&utm_medium=housefile&utm_campaign=mb&amount=20).

I mentioned yesterday we’re making an impact, and since I filed to run against him, Do-Nothing Daniel Webster has finally started to show up to his votes in Congress.

**But a little bird told me that Webster is VERY upset that he’s being challenged and is screaming mad about whether I’ll be able to raise more money than him.**

That’s typical for career politicians, like Daniel Webster. He’s had quite a political career, being in various elected offices for 41 years!

Do-Nothing Dan’s sense of entitlement is off the charts, but where is his duty to office? Where is his loyalty to the voters who elect him?

**It’s simply not there . . . and I can prove it.**

[**Help me retire Rep. Webster by backing my campaign in the final stretch of the quarter.**](https://secure.lauraloomerforcongress.com/40hours?utm_source=40hours&utm_medium=housefile&utm_campaign=mb&amount=20)

Aside from missing 28% of his votes in Congress, when Dan Webster does vote, he doesn’t bother to read the legislation . . . **he simply follows the order of party leadership**.

**Do-Nothing Dan is a party puppet who votes in line with Establishment leadership 96% of the time!**

By comparison, Rep. Paul Gosar takes his job seriously and has endorsed my campaign. He’s a true conservative leader that addresses each issue on its own merit, rather than phone in votes like a good party puppet.

When the GOP Establishment voted for Red Flag Laws last week, Gosar didn’t fall for it and voted NO!

**We need more members of Congress who are brave enough to tell the Establishment to pound sand if they stand in the way of Liberty.**

[**You know I’ll be one of them, so with just 40 hours left, help me get there today!**](https://secure.lauraloomerforcongress.com/40hours?utm_source=40hours&utm_medium=housefile&utm_campaign=mb&amount=20)

**Do-Nothing Dan’s career is unravelling, and he’s being exposed for his apathy toward his constituents.[Help me retire him today.](https://secure.lauraloomerforcongress.com/40hours?utm_source=40hours&utm_medium=housefile&utm_campaign=mb&amount=20)**

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

| | [SEND LAURA LOOMER TO WASHINGTON](https://secure.lauraloomerforcongress.com/40hours?utm_source=40hours&utm_medium=housefile&utm_campaign=mb&amount=20)

And I’m personally coming to you today, just over a month before Election Day, to talk to you about the stakes of this race.

[**But before I get into it, I’m going to ask you to chip in $3 toward my friend Hala Ayala’s Democratic campaign for Lt. Governor. Peter, we must elect Hala as Virginia’s Lt. Governor, and here’s why:

**Our Commonwealth is facing an unprecedented threat from extreme Republican forces.** They are targeting voting rights, abortion care, accessible health care, and so much more in a despicable effort to dismantle the historic work of our Democratic majority.

**And I know Hala is perfect for the job.** As a leader in the House of Delegates, she has overseen Medicare expansion to over 400,000 Virginians, passage of the Equal Rights Amendment, raises to teacher pay, and expansion of background checks to protect us all.

**Hala is battle‐tested and ready to fight for all Virginians** — her personal story is a Virginia story. I’m proud to call her a friend.

With all this in mind, Peter, we must support Hala as she enters the most consequential part of her campaign. _If we fail to elect her as Lt. Governor, our Democratic majority will crumble._

[**I know Virginians will be in the best of hands with Hala as Lt. Governor. So I’m personally asking you to chip in $3 or whatever amount you can give to elect Hala as our first woman Lt. Governor — can I count on your donation today, Peter? Hala needs to hit this last $20,000 end‐of‐quarter goal in these next two days. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36688675/308871090/471762423?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20210929_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NThlNmM3ZS00MjIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JWEq11Snhg8iOjz1YIIqZWj4MP6yoOAEfNpBRQjtksk=)

clean_body: | = Hi Peter, I’m Ralph Northam — the 73rd Governor of the Commonwealth of Virginia, husband, father, veteran, and fighter for Virginia’s values. And I’m personally coming to you today, just over a month before Election Day, to talk to you about the stakes of this race. = | = Peter, we must elect Hala as Virginia’s Lt. Governor, and here’s why: Our Commonwealth is facing an unprecedented threat from extreme Republican forces. They are targeting voting rights, abortion care, accessible health care, and so much more in a despicable effort to dismantle the historic work of our Democratic majority. And I know Hala is perfect for the job. As a leader in the House of Delegates, she has overseen Medicare expansion to over 400,000 Virginians, passage of the Equal Rights Amendment, raises to teacher pay, and expansion of background checks to protect us all. Hala is battle‐tested and ready to fight for all Virginians — her personal story is a Virginia story. I’m proud to call her a friend. With all this in mind, Peter, we must support Hala as she enters the most consequential part of her campaign. If we fail to elect her as Lt. Governor, our Democratic majority will crumble. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you for reading this long email, Peter. body:
| Team,

As a Member of Congress, I have consistently stood up for our values. I will continue to stand up to do what’s right. I’ll continue to be your voice in the House of Representatives, but I need your help today.

Tomorrow is the last day of the fundraising quarter. Will you please stand up for me and with me now? [Will you please make a contribution of any size to my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36688880/308871730/1631013932?amount=10&refcode=TD_EM_FR_12MO_210929_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzA2NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmQxMDkyNS00MzIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yYRYsuku-WEz0Iz6EaGcDhfyKTdPCoDoDoSp_EvJp6I=)

Ted

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I need $34 today. Let me tell you why.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I wore jersey number 34 throughout my career. I've switched fields, and now I need YOU to step up and donate $34 to help me build out a winning campaign. |
---
Peter,

Throughout my football career, I wore jersey number 34. It holds a special place in my heart.

I first wore 34 during my college football days at the University of Georgia, and I continued to wear it professionally until my very last NFL game with the Dallas Cowboys.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58434643:JGAl_E29N:m:1:3253819041:7E885F639B5E55E3833DA7409AD2C1F4:r)
For me, 34 isn't just a number - it's part of who I am. It's more than a number on the jerseys I used to wear - I like to think of 34 as an old friend.

In my career as a football player, folks became accustomed to seeing 34 leap across the goal line. **[Now in my campaign for the U.S. Senate, I'm going to use 34 to rally support for our shared conservative values as I work to defeat the liberal Democrat I'm running to unseat.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58434643:JGAl_E29N:m:1:3253819041:7E885F639B5E55E3833DA7409AD2C1F4:r)**

My opponent has amassed a war chest of over **TEN MILLION DOLLARS.** If I'm going to flip this seat RED, I've got to be able to match his fundraising prowess. That's why I'm asking you to make a special $34 contribution today to my campaign to help me level the political playing field.

[** Join Team Herschel
Chip in $34 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58434644:JGAl_E29N:m:1:3253819041:7E885F639B5E55E3833DA7409AD2C1F4:r)
I hope that as we move forward together in this campaign, you'll come to associate the number 34 with victory, as I have over my career.

We have a lot of work ahead of us if we're going to return a Republican majority to the Senate and _actually_ build a better America for hard-working families.

My opponent and national Democrats are leading the nation down the wrong path, undoing some of the great work Republicans have done in the last few years.

And the thing is, millions of liberals are making donations to their campaigns because Democrats are spinning tales of a eutopia that they can't deliver now - or ever - despite throwing TRILLIONS of dollars to fix issues they don't understand.

I have what it takes to WIN the tough fights, **[but I need your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58434643:JGAl_E29N:m:1:3253819041:7E885F639B5E55E3833DA7409AD2C1F4:r)** The future of Georgia and our country depends on what conservatives, like yourself, do today. **[So, if you can, please consider a gift of $34 if you can.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58434643:JGAl_E29N:m:1:3253819041:7E885F639B5E55E3833DA7409AD2C1F4:r)**

[** Join Team Herschel
Chip in $34 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58434644:JGAl_E29N:m:1:3253819041:7E885F639B5E55E3833DA7409AD2C1F4:r)
The Senate majority may come down to who wins in Georgia, so I hope you will consider supporting my campaign. There's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines.

I hope to hear from you soon.

Sincerely,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58434643:JGAl_E29N:m:1:3253819041:7E885F639B5E55E3833DA7409AD2C1F4:r)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

P.S. **[I hope you will stand with me by donating $34 today. But if that's too much for you this month, would you consider $20, $10, or even $3.40?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58434643:JGAl_E29N:m:1:3253819041:7E885F639B5E55E3833DA7409AD2C1F4:r)** As important as the money is, I also want to know you're with me. A donation of any amount will let me know you're on Team Herschel. Thanks so much.

[** Join Team Herschel
Chip in $34 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58434644:JGAl_E29N:m:1:3253819041:7E885F639B5E55E3833DA7409AD2C1F4:r)

[
](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58434645:JGAl_E29N:m:1:3253819041:7E885F639B5E55E3833DA7409AD2C1F4:r)

| | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.
---

body:
First and foremost, I want to say thank you to you, and to Congressman Schiff. |
#
Derek, First and foremost, I want to say thank you to you, and to Congressman Schiff. The number of you who responded to Adam’s calls to action and volunteered to help us defeat the Republican recall is something I appreciate greatly, and is a big part of why we won so decisively. But today, I want to return the favor. Adam has an official FEC fundraising deadline tomorrow at midnight, and I know he is looking for a huge number of individual donations before he’s legally required to report his fundraising numbers. | | Friend,

I need you right now.

Dan Newhouse and the RINOs are working overtime to try to UNDO everything we stand for as Constitutional Conservatives. I don't need to remind you that Newhouse was one of ten RINOs in Congress who voted to impeach President Trump and sided with Nancy Pelosi to form the January 6th Commission that will brand patriots like you and me as domestic terrorists.
_NOW, NEWHOUSE KNOWS HE'S IN BIG TROUBLE AND IS IN JEOPARDY OF NOT WINNING REELECTION -___just look at how active he's become on social media and sending weekly emails to his supporters begging for their support and trying to justify his anti-American voting record__ _._

I’ve set a HUGE goal of raising another **$25,000 in our final two days** , but I can’t do it without you. Your support is so vital to our success and you've never let us down in the past.

Hi friend,

**We're coming up on a big milestone in this race: our first full FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.**

For those of you who have been with us since the start, _thank you!_ For those of you who recently joined the team, thank you too. I was recently reminded of my first official TV interview, and wanted to make sure everyone had the opportunity to see it.

**[Will you watch and share this video? If you like what you hear, consider making a $3 contribution toward my end-of-quarter fundraising goal so we can get the word out to more voters.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36689670/308874387/400250591?refcode=em-92921-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzQ4MGMyOS00NTIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4B1ariu4bcFh6kAJsnkvwAkt_hQg0ToMvhSNNQDRKQM=)**

**I've lived in this community for 35 years and I know how hard my kiddos' families work to make ends meet.** They shouldn't have to choose between food and health care. They should have high quality public schools to send their kids to, and they shouldn't have to question whether their representative is fighting for them in Washington DC.

The only way we're going to defeat Kevin McCarthy is if enough voters here in the Central Valley know I'm the viable Democrat running to replace him.

clean_body: I wanted to make sure everyone had the opportunity to see this. | = Hi friend, We're coming up on a big milestone in this race: our first full FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. For those of you who have been with us since the start, thank you! For those of you who recently joined the team, thank you too. I was recently reminded of my first official TV interview, and wanted to make sure everyone had the opportunity to see it. = = | = I've lived in this community for 35 years and I know how hard my kiddos' families work to make ends meet. They shouldn't have to choose between food and health care. They should have high quality public schools to send their kids to, and they shouldn't have to question whether their representative is fighting for them in Washington DC. The only way we're going to defeat Kevin McCarthy is if enough voters here in the Central Valley know I'm the viable Democrat running to replace him. I'll take every opportunity I can to get in front of new and undecided voters with our message about supporting kids and working families in the Central Valley. This was just the first. = Thanks in advance, Marisa Teacher for Congress = | = Marisa Wood is a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. 2022 is our best shot in decades to finally defeat McCarthy. Consider supporting Marisa's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: Marisa Wood for Congress, PO Box 12103, Bakersfield, CA 93389. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Marisa Wood for Congress PO Box 12103 Bakersfield, CA 93389 United States

name: Patrick Leahy
subject: We can expand on the progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Green Mountain PAC,
body:
I won't split hairs here.

| [](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.) Friend, Fifty seats in the Senate simply aren't enough. I won't split hairs here. With a 50-50 majority and Mitch McConnell doubling down on his notorious obstructionism, Democrats have faced challenge after challenge trying to deliver for the American people. To truly bring about progress, we must expand our Democratic majority. That means rushing crucial funds to the most at-risk Democratic incumbents and most promising challengers before tomorrow's official end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. **[I've created a grassroots fund that directly supports Democratic incumbents and challengers in 2022: Will you contribute today to Green Mountain PAC's "Expand the Senate Majority Fund"?](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)** Let me ask you this: What do protecting voting rights, making major climate investments, and gun control all have in common? Each is a key issue that the Senate has a popular mandate to act on through bold, progressive legislation. But nearly every bill Democrats have tried to pass to address them have languished in the Senate, thanks to Mitch McConnell's desperate obstructionism. Too much is at stake for us to allow the Senate to remain a legislative graveyard. But we can only protect and grow our Senate majority when Americans from across the country raise our voices and come together. **[Will you give what you can today to help us build our Democratic Senate majority in 2022 and expand on the progress we've begun making for the American people? Donate today to Green Mountain PAC's "Expand the Senate Majority Fund" before tomorrow's official end-of-quarter deadline.](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)** Thank you for your generous support. Sincerely, Patrick Leahy
U.S. Senator | [DONATE »](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)

clean_body: Our path to victory. | Friend, Our End-of-Quarter deadline is TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT. This is our first Quarter since Tina launched her campaign for Congress. And now that we are full speed ahead with every Republican across the country, especially here in Virginia, we decided to do something special. Any donation made toward our End-of-Quarter goal will automatically have a MASSIVE IMPACT. Are you going to step up and help us have a historic quarter? Please make a contribution towards our End-of-Quarter goal before 11:59 PM and your gift will have an impact! >> () CONTRIBUTE $50 () CONTRIBUTE $25 () CONTRIBUTE $10 () CONTRIBUTE $5 () CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT () This End-of-Quarter goal sets the stage for the rest of the campaign and is our chance to show the Democrats that we are ready to take back the house! Remember, if you make a contribution towards our End-of-Quarter goal before 11:59 PM and your gift will have an impact! >> () Thank you, Finance Chair Tina Ramirez for Congress CONTRIBUTE $10 () ============================================================ Twitter () Facebook () Website () Tina Ramirez for Congress | Copyright © 2021 Tina Ramirez for Congress, Inc., All rights reserved.

name: Joe Sweeney, Me (2)
subject: re: Amos Tuck Dinner with Senator Tim Scott - 10 Days away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Reserve your tickets today, before they are all gone!
Derek,
I wanted to make sure you saw our email - we're quickly approaching our deadline for ticket sales, and I know you don't want to miss our big dinner next Friday with Senator Tim Scott.
If you haven't yet, please get your tickets securely here: [https://www.nh.gop/amostuckdinner](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nh.gop%2Famostuckdinner/1/0100017c31b990cf-583195d0-7441-4582-817e-f789828c0eb2-000000/WwyUTNHJDVrVfNW9KjP9NTFSjlE=237)
Best,
Joe Sweeney
\---
Derek,
We are only 10 days away from our second annual Amos Tuck dinner with special guest Senator Tim Scott.
We are extremely excited to be welcoming Senator Scott, one of our party's most outspoken and influential leaders. If you have heard Senator Scott speak, you know that this is an event you will not want to miss!
[Reserve your tickets for Amos Tuck 2021](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nh.gop%2Famostuckdinner/2/0100017c31b990cf-583195d0-7441-4582-817e-f789828c0eb2-000000/PyjnL_u4HeAETaRIgfsUIXWQJDA=237)
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nh.gop%2Famostuckdinner/3/0100017c31b990cf-583195d0-7441-4582-817e-f789828c0eb2-000000/FDllJ7idyh6rVatWSpFBfYA0UlM=237)
_This is our largest and most important fundraiser of 2021. _
VIP tickets are available for those who would like to meet and take a photo with the Senator.

We look forward to you joining us on October 8th!

[Reserve your tickets today for Amos Tuck 2021](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nh.gop%2Famostuckdinner/4/0100017c31b990cf-583195d0-7441-4582-817e-f789828c0eb2-000000/DwKGlmswzWI-Lp9PnnD2KUAxpBg=237)

name: Doug Collins
subject: Urgent request
body:
Doug Collins here, reaching out with an urgent request for my friend, Gary Black. Gary is Georgia’s Agriculture Commission
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8ljnvgk2c0tb7rfjir9rk2egua0sg6ami999310_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjj6ao75cjh2bs)
---
Friend, Doug Collins here, reaching out with an urgent request for my friend, Gary Black.
Gary is Georgia’s Agriculture Commissioner. I’ve known him for many years, and I KNOW he’s a true conservative who puts Georgians and Americans first.
Now, Gary’s running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia against Raphael Warnock, the most radical senator in the country. **The end of this month marks the end of the fundraising quarter, and for Gary to win, he MUST raise as much as possible before this crucial deadline.**
**[Can I count on you to stand with Gary and me? Donate whatever you can RIGHT NOW.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdmtdefke89ldlt6gg70t0b2ciheais1dq5ccs3g_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjj6ao75cjh2bs)**
---
[**RUSH DONATE $250**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg332ji8nnqjnggabc9hfg97gb55mvi17lbp8l78_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjj6ao75cjh2bs)
---
[**RUSH DONATE $100**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn7smrohu4jcnnp8ktfchc7de8fj3sukr7rk86u8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjj6ao75cjh2bs)
---
[**RUSH DONATE $15**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zohce3vmjvt82v90p15h0mvstmi05r228jcga908_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjj6ao75cjh2bs)
---
[**RUSH DONATE OTHER****AMOUNT**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zic5l4e71ku5ictav8s9jneusppdie0akns11cv0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjj6ao75cjh2bs)
---
Gary Black knows how to win in Georgia. He’s done it before, and he will do it again. He’s the ONLY Republican who can defeat Raphael Warnock and, with it, restore the Republican Senate majority.
**Raphael Warnock wants to undo everything we accomplished under President Trump.**
**Warnock wants to nationalize our elections and weaken voter ID.** He didn’t say a word when Joe Biden left Americans stranded in Afghanistan. And he fully supports Biden’s agenda of higher taxes, record spending, and **OPEN BORDERS.**
**To defeat Warnock, we must support the Republican who can win, who has the experience to do the job, and who will make conservatives proud.**
**I don’t care who else is running — I’m supporting Gary Black. **He’ll put Georgians and Americans first, champion our values, and end the nightmare that is Democrats running the U.S. Senate.
**Can Gary and I count on you to help us take America back? Too much is at stake for you to sit on the sidelines, Friend.**
**[Please help Gary make a strong End of Quarter showing and donate whatever you can, RIGHT NOW.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfdst21co9vvdb99nti67r3udva3ifjqr55df6e0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjj6ao75cjh2bs)**

Doug Collins

subject: SFC Robert Nicoson - The ambush that cost him everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots |
body:
Today’s story might just be the most infuriating one yet. Sergeant First Class Robert Nicoson was a respected and decorate
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zeoujvdfiq9eqnik7lemba325f2tqss9ut3dilro_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjj6apr4c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sln6oqn2db0clon9cb4c1p66pr3mop38tb2cji6at5he5qn8pj5mdj72obkcljjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pb4phimapm8c3ie5j3ao5ic8r749fg)
| |
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu53jf8ojmspttgrgake9bqqj6cnoh9gfup46uk8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjj6apr4c5h2bs)
|
---
Fellow patriot,

Today’s story might just be the most infuriating one yet.

Sergeant First Class Robert Nicoson was a respected and decorated war hero...until his command used enemy propaganda to prosecute him for simply doing his job.
[**DEMAND JUSTICE FOR SFC ROBERT NICOSON**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu1ouh66sqnlvnk7q230ghiunelefkoqa80ube50_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjj6apr4c5h2bs)
Some people are born to serve their country, and Robert Nicoson is one of those people. Throughout high school, Robert was a member of the JROTC program. This experience inspired him to join the Army after his junior year of high school in the Delayed Entry Program.
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6tdjbjduk2hldoabn9jmaf22lf7kk0i43nic3cg_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjj6apr4c5h2bs)
During his first deployment in support of Operation Iraqi Freedom, Robert quickly proved himself a driven and dedicated soldier. He was promoted to Specialist and served in numerous positions to include Driver, Gunner, and Dismount.

It came as no surprise when, during the middle of this 15-month deployment, Robert reenlisted for another 6 years, asking only one thing - to go through Airborne School so he could become a paratrooper.

After his deployment ended and Robert returned stateside, he discovered that it would take months for slots to open up for Airborne School.

Robert was never one to delay the call of duty, so he learned how to become a paratrooper by asking questions and observing the Scouts in his unit. He breezed through Airborne School and was once again put into a leadership role over several humanitarian relief missions after the devastating earthquake in Haiti. He even escorted President Bill Clinton!
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zai5140ufi3emgu8ufhl5dgsrajvdd312363m8so_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjj6apr4c5h2bs)
A few years and a few promotions later, Robert received word about his next deployment. His wife (also an 8-year veteran) was 6 months pregnant with their second child at the time, but this dutiful soldier did not once complain. Instead, he kissed his wife and daughter and packed his bags for Syria.

In Syria, Robert led countless reconnaissance patrols, and helped develop a new Base Defense Plan for his Troop outpost. One August day, Robert found himself and 16 of his men fighting their way out of a complex ambush during combat operations in Syria after being waved through a checkpoint.

The checkpoint ambush was captured on video with aerial footage showing that the enemy forces opened fire on Robert’s convoy. To give his gunner time to reload during the assault, Robert BRAVELY and HEROICALLY exposed himself to heavy and sustained enemy fire in order to draw attention away from the vehicle.

**The 10-minute firefight resulted in the death of at least one enemy combatant, but thanks to Robert’s decisive leadership, no Americans were killed during the engagement.**

When they returned to base, all initially seemed to be well. Robert was even written up for a Bronze Star with valor award for his actions.

But when the Army launched an investigation into the ambush, they used supposed “intel reports” from the social media accounts of the enemy forces who had launched the attack, charging Robert with wrongful communication, reckless endangerment, obstruction of justice, and failure to follow a lawful order. He was removed from his duty position, and his security clearance was suspended.

_Would the command REALLY believe enemy propaganda over their own troops who were backed with video footage and communications recordings? _

**The answer is yes.**

**[> > If your blood is BOILING, click here to take a stand for this American HERO! <<](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4espc9a7rpi5k8e7ddabbkdo051p2en2k4nk6a8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjj6apr4c5h2bs)**

This patriot just wants to clear his name so he can get back to honorably serving his country. But the legal fees keep piling up, and Robert and his wife are struggling to scrape together enough to keep fighting these UNFOUNDED charges...

**United American Patriots is raising money to help them pay for the rapidly mounting legal fees so Robert can clear his name and return to normal life. **

_**[Fellow patriot - can we count on you to chip in whatever you can to help us cover the legal fees for this WRONGLY ACCUSED Warrior?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkglmavq9qbp6lehcu5ql15ru47egjvir6fmgp20_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjj6apr4c5h2bs)**_
[**CHIP IN RIGHT NOW**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdkohlppias078prhi3mdlth4nl1ejvlfhuiart8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjj6apr4c5h2bs)
Thank you,
United American Patriots
**[UAP.org](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1mc208mn3k74rk4s27a877utikk1lus96r4ovj0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjj6apr4c5h2bs)**

After his deployment ended and Robert returned stateside, he discovered that it would take months for slots to open up for Airborne School. Robert was never one to delay the call of duty, so he learned how to become a paratrooper by asking questions and observing the Scouts in his unit. He breezed through Airborne School and was once again put into a leadership role over several humanitarian relief missions after the devastating earthquake in Haiti. He even escorted President Bill Clinton! A few years and a few promotions later, Robert received word about his next deployment. His wife (also an 8-year veteran) was 6 months pregnant with their second child at the time, but this dutiful soldier did not once complain. Instead, he kissed his wife and daughter and packed his bags for Syria. In Syria, Robert led countless reconnaissance patrols, and helped develop a new Base Defense Plan for his Troop outpost. One August day, Robert found himself and 16 of his men fighting their way out of a complex ambush during combat operations in Syria after being waved through a checkpoint. The checkpoint ambush was captured on video with aerial footage showing that the enemy forces opened fire on Robert’s convoy. To give his gunner time to reload during the assault, Robert BRAVELY and HEROICALLY exposed himself to heavy and sustained enemy fire in order to draw attention away from the vehicle. The 10-minute firefight resulted in the death of at least one enemy combatant, but thanks to Robert’s decisive leadership, no Americans were killed during the engagement. When they returned to base, all initially seemed to be well. Robert was even written up for a Bronze Star with valor award for his actions. But when the Army launched an investigation into the ambush, they used supposed “intel reports” from the social media accounts of the enemy forces who had launched the attack, charging Robert with wrongful communication, reckless endangerment, obstruction of justice, and failure to follow a lawful order. He was removed from his duty position, and his security clearance was suspended. Would the command REALLY believe enemy propaganda over their own troops who were backed with video footage and communications recordings? The answer is yes. This patriot just wants to clear his name so he can get back to honorably serving his country. But the legal fees keep piling up, and Robert and his wife are struggling to scrape together enough to keep fighting these UNFOUNDED charges... United American Patriots is raising money to help them pay for the rapidly mounting legal fees so Robert can clear his name and return to normal life. Thank you, United American Patriots UAP, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. Donations are tax deductible. name: Nikki Fried
subject: The worst part of running for governor
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Friends—Asking for money is my least favorite part of running for Governor. But it’s a necessity in order to do the work that matters most: building a movement from the Panhandle to Key West to break Florida’s rigged system and stop Ron DeSantis.

Here’s where we stand:

1. Ron DeSantis has raised $55 MILLION so far this cycle. 20% of that money came from Wall Street donors.

2. 42.5% of DeSantis donations came from OUTSIDE of Florida.

3. We’ve built a grassroots campaign, and the overwhelming majority of our contributions have come from Floridians . But we need to keep going and keep pace with DeSantis

4. Reaching our September goal is CRITICAL to building a winning movement against DeSantis, but as of right now, we’re still $13,211 short. I’m getting worried, team.

Friends, your donation before tomorrow at midnight helps us stay on track in the fight against DeSantis. If you’re in a position to give, please click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-september-eom?refcode=wed1]

Thank you,

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d98fec02-be20-ec11-981f-501ac510a405/e2df0b26-4b21-ec11-981f-501ac510a405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmRmMGIyNi00YjIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CEI4JYkHOtqkVPfk_f7wD_ItiYKjRuL4bnVKw9pns2c=&id=116879433 .

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Two Reinforcements
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
House Freedom Fund
body:
Anna Paulina Luna, Candidate for Congress, FL-13

Fellow Patriot:

We are proud to announce two more endorsements of
principled, fighting, American First conservatives running to
take back the House of Representatives next year.

First, HFF endorses Anna Paulina Luna for Congress
in Florida's 13th District. This will be an open seat in the 2022
elections, so the path is wide open for a great conservative
candidate to win.

And GREAT is the only word to describe Anna.

She is a warrior, literally. She grew up in some of
the roughest neighborhoods in Los Angeles - and fought her way
out by enlisting in the Air Force after high school. She learned
conservative values the hard way - by watching what government
dependency, illegal immigration, and lawlessness did to her
community.

Anna embodies the American Dream, which is why she
has been endorsed by President Donald Trump.

"Anna is a warrior, she is a winner, and it's time
for all America First Republicans to unite behind her strong
campaign." - President Donald J. Trump

Please support Anna Paulina Luna today!

You may already know Anna from her work with Turning
Point USA as a tireless advocate for conservative principles and
policy. She and her husband, Andy, a fellow veteran who won a
Purple Heart in Afghanistan, work with non-profits serving the
veteran community.

As you may remember, Anna came up just short in this
district in 2020 up against a corporate-backed incumbent. He
doesn't want a rematch, so next year Florida's 13th District will
be an open seat - and conservatives around the country are
rallying to Anna's side.

Please help send Anna Paulina Luna to Congress now!

Eric Burlison, Candidate for Congress, MO-07

We are also proud to endorse Eric Burlison for
Congress in Missouri's 7th District.

Eric is a Missouri state Senator with the #1 most
conservative voting record in the state legislature. He has
fought woke socialists in his state, and now he's ready to take
the fight to Congress.

Eric is not just a true America First conservative.
He's also a proven leader. The Left has hit him with everything
they've got for years - and he's still fighting back, on the
issues that matter most: election integrity, the right to life,
border security, and our constitutional rights.

He won't crack under pressure. Instead, he will
apply much-needed pressure against Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden, and
Kamala Harris.

Please support Eric Burlison for Congress today!

Eric and Anna now join our other priority House
candidates:
✅ U.S. Rep. Yvette Harrell (NM-02)✅ U.S. Rep.
Lauren Boebert (CO-03)✅ U.S. Rep. Scott Perry (PA-10)

With your help, they will all join Jim Jordan, Byron
Donalds, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Andy Biggs, and the rest of the
House Freedom Caucus in the fight for America's future next year.

Please join us in supporting them now. Help Anna,
Eric, and the rest of our priority candidates today!

Thank you for being part of our team and for doing
so much to help us promote principled leadership in Washington.

Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura
Executive Director
House Freedom Fund

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

DONATE

"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates
get the financial support they need to compete with establishment
candidates." - Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)

House Freedom Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington,
DC 20003

House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate
political action committee that helps elect conservative
candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only
supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and
limited government, and who support policies that promote
liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.Paid for by
House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.
Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as
charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or
foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not
permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the
name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year.

PAID FOR BY HOUSE FREEDOM FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY
ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. HOUSEFREEDOMFUND.COM

How much we raise this quarter directly helps us to figure out how many campaigns we can support next year. We’ve won 20 of the 21 ballot measure campaigns we’ve worked on previously, and this success rate is partly due to pouring as many resources as necessary into these campaigns in order to win. subject: The worst Congressman in Congress?
body:
This lunatic needs to be removed NOW
| | | | |
---

# [MADISON CAWTHORN NEEDS TO GO](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5a9958ee-4c97-442f-a950-86a1ae73f0f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | Congressman Madison Cawthorn is getting way out-of-hand: → He tried to bring a gun on a plane, → He brought a knife to an appearance at a school, → He called for “bloodshed” if elections were rigged again (which, SPOILER ALERT, they never were). Madison Cawthorn is a danger to those around him and should not be in Congress, so we’re collecting signatures on a massive petition to KICK HIM OUT!! [REPRESENT PA AND SIGN YOUR NAME TO TELL CONGRESS TO EXPEL CRAZY MADISON >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5bfdbeb2-9758-411c-8393-3ced5bcc124b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36693407/308887394/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20210929_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGQ5MzBjZS00YzIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hDf4Y-iGwlVwgbndfL4NVKSqYbEACymTkesI1xypOPY=&emci=bbd930ce-4c21-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=c0d930ce-4c21-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=252045)

Folks, here’s the deal: The past few months have been tough for fundraising. We get it. Honestly, we hope it’s meant you’re spending more time outside, on a hike or going camping. But after the slow summer months, we’re off track for our end-of-quarter goal tomorrow. That’s a problem because missing our goal could force us to scale back on our investments — like supporting Democrats in local and state elections and battleground Senate races. **Too many folks are counting on us to help deliver real change — we can’t afford to cut back even a little bit.** Thankfully, we still have time to get back on target to meet our goal tomorrow if folks help us do either of the following before midnight tonight:
1. Bring in 103 more contributions

2. Raise $2,027

**Folks, will you chip in what you can to help us close the gap? clean_body: Our campaign is BEHIND on our End-of-Quarter goal, and if we don’t hit it, we’ll lose the momentum we worked so hard for. | | 🚨 RUNNING OUT OF TIME 🚨 SEPTEMBER EOQ DEADLINE | Friend, It’s Team Miyares reaching out with an urgent message from our campaign headquarters... Our campaign is BEHIND on our End-of-Quarter goal, and if we don’t hit it, we’ll lose the momentum we worked so hard for. The latest polls show tight races in Virginia, and we still have the upper hand... but not by much. This is the most crucial pivot in our entire campaign, and Jason is depending on top supporters to help us out today. Will YOU step up and help him beat Mark Herring’s fundraising machine? We can’t let AG Mark Herring outraise us. If we can manage to hit our End-of-Quarter goal, we will WIN this race and bring the RULE OF LAW back to Virginia! It’s so important that we keep this up and usher in a RED WAVE on November 2nd. It’s past time that Virginia returned to LAW & ORDER. This is a longer email, friend, but I hope you'll read it. Right-wing billionaire and Donald Trump's former Secretary of Education, Betsy DeVos, was in New Hampshire to rally Trump's far-right base. She is just one of the many Trump allies trying to unseat me and flip the Senate red. During Betsy DeVos' confirmation hearing for Secretary of Education back in 2017, she demonstrated a complete lack of understanding and support for the public education system – and it was clear that she was unqualified to serve as Secretary of Education. **At her confirmation hearing, I specifically questioned Ms. DeVos on whether she would enforce the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act. Not only did she refuse to say she would, but she also demonstrated that she was unaware that this landmark civil rights law was a federal law.** Unfortunately, she didn’t improve upon that disastrous confirmation hearing during her tenure in the Trump administration -- pursuing policies that undermined public schools in New Hampshire and across the country. From proposed funding cuts to her efforts to implement a voucher system, **DeVos ignored the needs of both educators and students in an attempt to dismantle our public education system.** I’m writing today because it has been my honor to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate, and I’m not done fighting for a more robust public education system. I only won my last election by 1,017 votes, and New Hampshire’s State Senate and State House both flipped from blue to red last year. Republicans know this, and DeVos' visit is a clear attempt to unseat me by rallying Trump's far-right base. **If we lose in New Hampshire, Democrats have no chance of holding our narrow majority.** Having Donald Trump and his allies fully invested in this race is bad news. **[I hate asking for money, but our big FEC deadline is TOMORROW, and my campaign is falling behind. Fellow Conservative,

**Democrats in Washington are hyper focused on my campaign because they know I'm a threat to their Senate majority.**

This is a snippet of an email from the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7550b1950e0742f39bf056e09a6fc890&_e=4H58mz9Zykk3TyAhTg3_6WaAm00R9XqN5KQsYVAe8hSIVELMjrmmNPh3WOkr44SGxWqKvVhGb_4RC6f6Sced1ZCVEQ_VhlfAk8bT7cGzbibMD3BdLmm7XstCjopN41yfWkvMA7bJmDXeNSbLVCLcEj12j9vqRDXPgcQakZg-5sWGcgV3ze3oC1vlcVN9o3TMXi8lY84MOe5WawOuDNz31xgIPSfrqQOGOCXdeoI2KljX73oevpJGHbC1N51ko0I87JWgMkQDUdI5nvt8Mv7VBmcoa6sepSSgjwfVcUEq6ItCvOJRMJb5xqbBgC_puvQcqgaunMiV6j2GU9ilA_CBuNwlmVBRoUQQBFUZpx47591i0u6IxOfSYrn0mlhFqR9-X1uzqxb8weUY1hML7GOOhQ%3D%3D)

Mark Kelly is starting to panic, and his desperation is beginning to show. [**He knows that he is vulnerable and that if he loses his seat, Democrats will lose the Senate**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7550b1950e0742f39bf056e09a6fc890&_e=4H58mz9Zykk3TyAhTg3_6WaAm00R9XqN5KQsYVAe8hSIVELMjrmmNPh3WOkr44SGxWqKvVhGb_4RC6f6Sced1ZCVEQ_VhlfAk8bT7cGzbibMD3BdLmm7XstCjopN41yfWkvMA7bJmDXeNSbLVCLcEj12j9vqRDXPgcQakZg-5sWGcgV3ze3oC1vlcVN9o3TMcmcDey3B97-ADyg-XfvJIK-5_r19XLGrO68XKiaRlhpT7YQ22u8CFPtVB-D5Us-fICq8UQ4g6C5T514cX63ZztnHcu9u25oI0Yu80PNWpXuVksyGrlQ0a0gpoLWjFikx5alIGQxKJWz8oU7uQgqJnFO5nPu6IROvdYTUXNCjlI8OuWV70mSHnEspAmeyTfFP5I4odA2Xk77bGePgAuEpoA%3D%3D)

**His strategy is to throw millions into this race and use the Democratic propaganda machine to discredit our campaign. They've already started sending emails attacking me, and we're still a year away from Election Day.**

Democrats in the Senate are scared, and they should be; even liberal CNN thinks we can take back this seat for Republicans. We need this seat to restore the Senate majority and further President Trump's America First agenda.

The Democrat establishment knows that they can't hold onto the Senate majority without holding Arizona. **I am counting on you,Fellow Conservative , to help us win back the Senate. Kelly is one of the Democrat's top fundraisers, and we need to keep pace with his campaign to show we are serious about winning.**

[**So, today I'm asking you to make a donation of $5 or more. I need to raise $5,000 today, and I hope you'll help me reach my goal by making an immediate gift of whatever you can.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7550b1950e0742f39bf056e09a6fc890&_e=4H58mz9Zykk3TyAhTg3_6WaAm00R9XqN5KQsYVAe8hSIVELMjrmmNPh3WOkr44SGxWqKvVhGb_4RC6f6Sced1ZCVEQ_VhlfAk8bT7cGzbibMD3BdLmm7XstCjopN41yfWkvMA7bJmDXeNSbLVCLcEj12j9vqRDXPgcQakZg-5sWGcgV3ze3oC1vlcVN9o3TMkBxhg79kwwnwKk017BbCYGCPyhfUIkL_VEBRhcKTR1cACbXPZ1h6LFXAzSnx4QIQl0S0iRVaVOR1T_KkYe9t7sT0XithYR8RHsmkKsr9d21PBmU5e6kXN3_EkOb2bDMrMmvFXAJCYzMVHY_rKQESQj6rGO8efKzeceEWnmjzSp3uDRx48SKDlNOKrcbKYJ2joqU9U6wMwhqyzivAFuA7yQ%3D%3D)

| [**$5**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7550b1950e0742f39bf056e09a6fc890&_e=4H58mz9Zykk3TyAhTg3_6WaAm00R9XqN5KQsYVAe8hSIVELMjrmmNPh3WOkr44SGxWqKvVhGb_4RC6f6Sced1ZCVEQ_VhlfAk8bT7cGzbibMD3BdLmm7XstCjopN41yfWkvMA7bJmDXeNSbLVCLcEj12j9vqRDXPgcQakZg-5sUnu6NY1_J4MdkR219wTldTW3KpC33d6Lg5Ka3vZWX-Y1IssdklIJgMAsH-u9Sp1aMPenlXWMrzpGJph26vwCQzCC5A3ddOaFGP3rGS-LQroo_q0NVCtzMfjERx8Jq8TTUcF8kAHOagoc8YymJta54NNzbjWzlQsVmp_DrXPCfKZlHgNL02WuWJ3ktLI7acTxXvxTn-E9rDVTnNRvbwWaQObhmHp5frY9ZVYySzXKq16ni-y_17ITH2WHlwTta2mOKTnCfmU49Rm1P1rfy4QKKcV-0sAyRv95RKYNOLKvz5Sw%3D%3D) | [**$10**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7550b1950e0742f39bf056e09a6fc890&_e=4H58mz9Zykk3TyAhTg3_6WaAm00R9XqN5KQsYVAe8hSIVELMjrmmNPh3WOkr44SGxWqKvVhGb_4RC6f6Sced1ZCVEQ_VhlfAk8bT7cGzbibMD3BdLmm7XstCjopN41yfWkvMA7bJmDXeNSbLVCLcEj12j9vqRDXPgcQakZg-5sUnu6NY1_J4MdkR219wTldTW3KpC33d6Lg5Ka3vZWX-Y3CkxS0ZU-a3uFw144MCKQi6gtGrSosfndzPKg2Fc_T7Ah29Gde7Clg7C3sQHdCjYK8SiJYy8A0qb_jGj7a5yOopIyStI-EvoPvecWwawiqkSKgwVs-Pyva2DRH3VopdLU1Cp3rj8KRPVEieq1Tmn6bqrNJZXjDcXpsPFYA869k1W40NqhNVgGTOVU4my5O0fYMD1bQPmTkbsvzOXgmhxdbgEucuyd7wQLPx20aRDz1fNu-fDhK80wRWjr3i-WonEg%3D%3D) | [**MORE**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7550b1950e0742f39bf056e09a6fc890&_e=4H58mz9Zykk3TyAhTg3_6WaAm00R9XqN5KQsYVAe8hSIVELMjrmmNPh3WOkr44SGxWqKvVhGb_4RC6f6Sced1ZCVEQ_VhlfAk8bT7cGzbibMD3BdLmm7XstCjopN41yfWkvMA7bJmDXeNSbLVCLcEj12j9vqRDXPgcQakZg-5sUnu6NY1_J4MdkR219wTldTW3KpC33d6Lg5Ka3vZWX-Yz7TidNFgiQPgMtDp5prY8N1uO-i9gkt6hsPmtoO-vN_kORazHNdjUynPAUzuLTRc4JLycIP8OKp9ZlHO2q-TDZ0uTfQO-wfzh3py-vido1vELV_K4C0V3Lnt7Jfsth8L1C4DUdVwi3_l-OvqtAnm3CLf1SrpDZejhgeqbbyvtVsjlIuvmrHzVwQnaxLp_B70_C4lM2XXIqlNSrXVJMnHEaZ443hFViFpDGvhaW46tO_)

clean_body: They are worried about my opponent Mark Kelly, and this seat. | Fellow Conservative, Democrats in Washington are hyper focused on my campaign because they know I'm a threat to their Senate majority. This is a snippet of an email from the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee. Mark Kelly is starting to panic, and his desperation is beginning to show. His strategy is to throw millions into this race and use the Democratic propaganda machine to discredit our campaign. They've already started sending emails attacking me, and we're still a year away from Election Day. Democrats in the Senate are scared, and they should be; even liberal CNN thinks we can take back this seat for Republicans. We need this seat to restore the Senate majority and further President Trump's America First agenda. The Democrat establishment knows that they can't hold onto the Senate majority without holding Arizona. I am counting on you,Fellow Conservative , to help us win back the Senate. Kelly is one of the Democrat's top fundraisers, and we need to keep pace with his campaign to show we are serious about winning. | | | ---|---|--- Realistically, this election could be our last chance to protect America from the Left's destruction. Thank you, Blake Masters Republican for U.S. Senate, Arizona | | Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

\----------Forwarded message----------
From: **Conor Lamb**
Date: September 27, 2021
Subject: We need to beat them here

Friend,

**The Big Lie. The lawsuits. January 6th. Attacking Republican election officials and Republicans in Congress who tell the truth.**

On countless levels, Republicans have shown _all of us_ that they're unqualified to run this country.

Now, the party that claims Democrats are coming for your freedoms and privacy are demanding that Pennsylvania voters provide them with their social security numbers, all in the name of a sham #Fraudit. There's no other way to say it: They are attacking our democracy and our entire system of government on all fronts.

**That's why we need to beat them here in Pennsylvania next year, build on our majority, and put an end to this election fraud nonsense. There's too much on the line, and I intend to do everything I can to secure the future of every Pennsylvanian -- and of our country.**

**[This is our chance to turn the tide, friend, and we're counting on supporters like you to help show that we have the grassroots momentum necessary to win this race. Can you donate $5, $10, $15, or more to help us save our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36695643/308895412/773704285?refcode=em21_210929_eoq4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTFmMmU3OS01MDIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5xDBi-JRndcEJ2coZfBLasrDcVE3vJjhHMi8fcVBrVc=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36695644/308895413/773704285?refcode=em21_210929_eoq4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTFmMmU3OS01MDIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5xDBi-JRndcEJ2coZfBLasrDcVE3vJjhHMi8fcVBrVc=)
The other side is still spewing this anti-democratic rhetoric and attempting to smear me because they know that if we make it to the Senate, their charade is over. They're out of new ideas, and poll after poll shows that the majority of Americans support Democrats' policies -- policies that will grow our middle class, protect our elections, save our warming planet, and address the issues that _really matter._

Pennsylvanians are pragmatic and resourceful -- we do what needs to be done, friend. We don't like distractions, yet that seems to be all Republicans care about these days.

**Our campaign is here to put a stop to it, and I hope I can count on your support to help us do it.**

**[We set an ambitious fundraising goal of $100,000 to reach by the end of this month to show everyone that this campaign is here to win, and we're down to $61,274 left to go. Can you help us get there by the end of the month with a donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36695645/308895414/773704285?refcode=em21_210929_eoq4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTFmMmU3OS01MDIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5xDBi-JRndcEJ2coZfBLasrDcVE3vJjhHMi8fcVBrVc=)**

Your support means the world to me, friend. I won't let you down.

\-- Conor Lamb

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: I need you to make a crucial choice in this moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **NBC NEWS: DEMOCRATS ' HOUSE MAJORITY IS IN JEOPARDY**
I'm in complete disbelief.

\-- NBC just announced my House Majority is in **SEVERE** danger.
\-- Republicans only need to flip **FIVE** seats to take it from us.
\-- And I just watched them launch a massive wave of attack ads against **ELEVEN** of my most vulnerable Democrats.

**I have no choice but to take drastic action to fix this. **

**[I'm calling for an emergency response to beat back these attacks, PROTECT our House Majority, and stop Republicans from EVER holding power again. I can fix this, but not without your help and your $3 to defend my House Democrats. If we let Republicans seize the House, I know we could come to regret not fighting back to stop them. Can I count on your $3 before my End of Quarter Deadline in just 24 hours to protect our House Majority? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

body:
In two critical House races, it’s two educators vs two Trump Republicans. The choice was clear on who Elect Educators Everywhere would support in these two races: Democrats Eric Gash and Brandon Mosely are dedicated public leaders and teachers who have experience empowering their communities and following the facts. | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36697046/308899837/640382229?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210929moselygash_EEE_180DO_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlZGM3ZGFkLTUzMjEtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTEwYTQwNSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fmgD10N9YJ2wCx3-mjYLWUt4LZC3P2uUWamXRDAjzx8=)

Educators and allies, In two critical House races, it’s two educators vs two Trump Republicans. The choice was clear on who Elect Educators Everywhere would support in these two races: Democrats Eric Gash and Brandon Mosely are dedicated public leaders and teachers who have experience empowering their communities and following the facts. [_**Send a split donation to Eric Gash (NC-11), Brandon Mosely (CA-42), and EEE to elect educators and defeat the Trump enablers.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36697047/308899838/640382229?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210929moselygash_EEE_180DO_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlZGM3ZGFkLTUzMjEtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTEwYTQwNSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fmgD10N9YJ2wCx3-mjYLWUt4LZC3P2uUWamXRDAjzx8=) Brandon is running to retire Rep. Ken Calvert, a vocal Trump supporter who signed an amicus brief to the U.S. Supreme Court seeking to overturn the 2020 presidential election results. Eric is running against Rep. name: Sen. Raphael Warnock
subject: the honest truth
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to keep Georgia blue.
#

Friend: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to pitch in to my reelection campaign before our critical midnight deadline — so we can keep Georgia blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical — and what could happen to the future of our progressive agenda without it.**
My journey to becoming Georgia's first-ever Black senator was an unlikely one. I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth — I had 11 brothers and sisters and grew up in public housing. But through hard work and the support of my community, I went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, this kid from the housing projects is fighting in the Senate to build a government that works for _everyone_ — not just those at the top.
Since day one, I've made my priorities clear: Defend and expand voting rights to strengthen our democracy, raise the minimum wage to build an economy that works for everyone, and expand affordable health care so filling a prescription doesn't break the bank. But here's the honest truth: I simply can't win these critical fights for justice without grassroots folks like you by my side — so I have to ask:
[**Will you split a $10 donation right now between our campaign and Mark Kelly's so we can hit our crucial FEC fundraising goal, power our reelection campaigns to victory, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-warnock-sept21?refcode=em210929-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1430_6688874_1ge7D2&akid=1430%2E6688874%2E1ge7D2)
With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to put Mitch McConnell back in power — and election experts from _The Washington Post_ to _NBC News_ confirm that I'm the GOP's top target for defeat. This means that Democrats' razor-thin majority in the Senate will be in serious danger if we don't have the resources to keep Georgia blue.
**But right now, we're not on track to raise the $15,000 we need to fight back against GOP attacks and win in Georgia. The ONLY way I can close this budget gap is with your grassroots support, friend.**
My last election was one of the most expensive races in history, and there's no question that the GOP will spend MILLIONS on top of millions to try and crush our people-powered movement again. **We can't let them. If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to keep Georgia blue. So please, I'm personally asking:**
[**Before our critical FEC deadline, will you split a $10 donation between our campaign and Mark Kelly's so we can win in Georgia, protect our Democratic Senate majority and continue fighting for our progressive values?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-warnock-sept21?refcode=em210929-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1430_6688874_1ge7D2&akid=1430%2E6688874%2E1ge7D2)
Thanks for fighting alongside me at moments like these — I appreciate you.
— Sen. Raphael Warnock

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1430%2E6688874%2E1ge7D2).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

body:
|

Team, Your inbox is probably flooded with emails about FEC quarterly deadlines and end-of-quarter goals. You’ve probably even gotten a few from us. So I wanted to quickly explain **why** these quarterly goals are so important. Every quarter, political campaigns and organizations are required to report details about their finances to the Federal Election Commission — how much money we’ve raised, from how many donors, etc. And then these numbers are made public, and the entire world can see them. Once these numbers are published, our opponents can (and will!) use these numbers to make assumptions about the strength of our movement, and will affect the way they allocate resources. That’s why it’s hard to overstate how critical it is that we have strong fundraising numbers to turn over to the FEC at the end of this quarter. **Will you pitch in $10 or more before tomorrow at midnight to show the strength of this movement and boost our numbers before the crucial end-of-quarter deadline?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | **[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36697463/308900983/1460863519?express_lane=true&amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20210929_AM1_V2_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmMzNTJlNi01NDIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qcpf6bUhnxL7S3_uHgo0u4c4yMQDeI6p703Gmc9DuEY=)**

body:
I’ll keep this brief - in every campaign, there are fundraising goals and deadlines. Some of those deadlines are at the end of each quarter. name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: Prayer & Action for Texas House to "Save Girl's Sports"
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/95dd8be8d45b/prayer-action-for-texas-house-to-save-girls-sports?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=3959ce3e4f&e=01c99b7fbd)
---
Click the above image to watch and share a short video message from Dixie Carroll.
| |
# Dear Friends,
**Since September 20th, we’ve been in the fourth session of the 87th Legislature. Praise God that Monday, September 27th, Texas House Bill, HB 25 (By Swanson), was assigned to the Select Constitutional Rights and Remedies Committee. This is a fair committee, so this is a good first step for this common-sense legislation to become Texas law.** **A majority of Texans support protecting female athletes from physical harm, losing scholarships and endorsements. A majority of Texas legislators have authored or co-authored bills to divide school sports teams by biological sex assigned on birth-certificate issued near time of birth. Governor Abbott has put legislation to “Save Girls’ Sports” on the Special Session call three times for 87th Legislature. The Texas Senate has passed it four times. It’s time the Texas House to move this legislation from “filed” to “passed.”** **This issue should be of concern to all Texans as it affects all school-age girls. This issue affects Texans of all races, cultures and backgrounds. According to Texas Education Agency (TEA) statistics for 2019-20 school year at [https://tea.texas.gov/sites/default/files/enroll_2019-20.pdf](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=377855303f&e=01c99b7fbd) there are approximately 862,137 females of African American, Hispanic, and other ethnicities and approximately 318,953 white females. Since the enactment of Title IX in 1972, national statistics show two out of five girls (40%) [https://concernedwomen.org/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/Protecting-Womens-Sports-CWA-fact-sheet-2021.pdf](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=fc16f76f96&e=01c99b7fbd) now participate in school sports. So, school sports for grade 7-12 in Texas accounts for approximately 472,436 Texas girls. These statistics do not include private, parochial or homeschool students. ** **On his first day in office, President Biden issued an executive order saying students should play on sports teams based on their “gender identity.” In a direct attack on women’s rights, the Biden Administration policy overturns nearly 50 years of equal opportunities for women and girls to compete in female-only sports teams. The need for action to protect a fair playing field for female athletes is more urgent than ever.** **Your phone calls make a difference. Please ask your friends and family to make phone calls too. ** **Please Act:**
* **Call the office of Texas House Speaker Dade Phelan, (512) 463-1000, and tell him you want to see Texas girls protected by passing HB 25, by Rep. Valoree Swanson (R-Dist. 150). **
* **Thank the Speakers’ Office for assigning HB 25 to the fair committee of Select Constitutional Rights and Remedies.**
* **Let the Speakers’ Office know that HB 25 must be prioritized on the House Calendar Committee, so it passes the many obstacles that keep bills from becoming laws in Texas. The Third Session of 87th Legislature ends October 19, 2021.**
* **Ask your Representative to act to pass HB 25 and “Save Girls’ Sports”[https://house.texas.gov/members/find-your-representative/](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=910f1657a9&e=01c99b7fbd)**

** Please Pray:**
* **Pray that our young women will not be denied benefits from their God-given talents and abilities.**
* **Pray that the forces of evil will be cut off.**
* **Pray that citizens will wake up to their role in righteousness in government.**

**Texas females need protection in law, and I’d like to provide an example for you. Alanna Smith is an African American high school athlete from Connecticut. She is from a family of exceptionally gifted athletes and is on track to play professional sports unless her opportunity is stolen by an undeserving biological male. Alanna, now a high school sophomore, is a short-distance runner (100m, 200m, and 400m). She was a 3-peat 100 Meter Connecticut state champ in sixth, seventh, and eighth grades. Her freshman year she learned she would be racing at the Connecticut State Open against a male who identifies as a female. No matter how many hours Alanna put into training or how hard she worked on speed, endurance, and strength, she had no chance to beat the physical strength of a biological male who previously ran in the men’s division. Alanna felt defeated before stepping onto the track.** **In Connecticut alone, two biological boys have been running girls off the track since 2017. Between them, they have set seventeen individual state meet records—registering times that females have no hope of breaking. The sheer size and strength they bring to the track has resulted in more than eighty-five missed opportunities for girls to even qualify for the next level of competition. As they have continued breaking records and beating biological girls, it is simply not fair for anyone born as a boy to compete against girls. That unfairness does not go away because of what someone believes about their gender identity. [https://www.nydailynews.com/opinion/ny-oped-i-deserve-a-level-playing-field-20200304-zd36p3jlurfeddfdk6gmuzyv2i-story.html](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=f7bbb5992a&e=01c99b7fbd)** **We must work hard to protect the rights that women have gained since Title IX, when only one in 27 girls participated in school sports. When biological males are allowed to compete in girls only sports, girls’ lives are permanently impacted. ** **“We urge you, brethren, admonish the unruly, encourage the fainthearted, help the weak, be patient with everyone. See that no one repays another with the evil for evil, but always seek after that which is good for one another and for all people.” I Thessalonians 5:14-15**
**Sincerely,**
**Kathaleen Wall** **[www.kathaleenwall.com](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=a215872be1&e=01c99b7fbd)**
---

---
| | [](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=f615c67b17&e=01c99b7fbd)
