name: Team Kasich
subject: RE: It's concerning, but there's hope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
Peter, we just wanted to make sure that you saw Gov. Kasich's earlier email message. Thanks! [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=c1cf0c611624483d9435d83f55b0c0c1&_e=LtucJHMuop-P210VBKr3NurF3_OYDb0roA7xIYF5mk2Q4Y7MqaqaP-ogiQb0nAxQaOY41GYafPcx0HiW-hoA7nURO8iAZBh5ojkYybkSuwrNsowMQwFAFRKTj1KUB7o7_8mQkiIXI4EUdyKmP7UPlqlvmI_kMhBzzqRdeEoUsf1-Zi6cPjobL6DVEjeV_2bztlAWkcpSTug3_1wc-TyPeZojrsc_e4ub_3naumPNbOXEBuD2aqZGiVyGPnP9viqirpPub2D7NC04JzRoGn43pw%3D%3D) Peter, we just wanted to make sure that you saw Gov. Kasich's earlier email message. Thanks! | |
---
**To:** Peter
**From:** John Kasich
**Date:** September 25, 2021

I have to tell you that I am very concerned about what I'm seeing happening in this country with so many people sharing information online that they know to be false. [Watch my recent interview about this](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=c1cf0c611624483d9435d83f55b0c0c1&_e=LtucJHMuop-P210VBKr3NlBoJb3TPIgpKCEbuAl_EvVevWbrrFFTG_flpg6Yc5iAtSuB1aAPz1QCCL7agorg_E9xlZeuS4bWvmfAo-LRb9XsA2DILG0FVJ2sgmhSRE9daejjfPoACDp90D12ojeTWYtnRm1d9Au_TdmMRHRh9bnOs9_6H8r6AmPfVSjHdWLVAPbP7-B6aPp72swKfAN_RMnwHZLBS-Oc2Jx7aKm7aqR62oIcuLoz2V-1g9gryc5A90ShUcOLLBnl9zBuukV8qFdWJ61eFuUf0T0WxaiFSe69rOnqbEAE_csi4WAB_GVY).

For example, take what we're seeing with a majority of Republican voters believing that Joe Biden was not legitimately elected President. It's one thing to not like the outcome but it's something much more concerning when, despite all of the legal challenges, the state audits and the investigations saying definitively that he won, that we have millions of people who believe otherwise.

Now we know this is largely happening because former President Trump continues to peddle false conspiracy theories in an attempt to cling to his waning political power. It's worsened by the fact that so many GOP leaders don't have the courage to stand up to this rhetoric and tell their constituents and the American people the truth.

And as we look ahead to the next election cycle, Republicans have a chance to retake the U.S. House majority. President Biden is really struggling and creating opportunities for the GOP. But what will our Republican candidates run on?

**Are we satisfied with them only running AGAINST things?** What are they running to DO? That used to be how we measured the effectiveness of those who we send to represent us in Washington. [Watch my recent interview about this](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=c1cf0c611624483d9435d83f55b0c0c1&_e=LtucJHMuop-P210VBKr3NlBoJb3TPIgpKCEbuAl_EvVevWbrrFFTG_flpg6Yc5iA3vMUvH3bSrx75Z3uLhJleGZcXBJGqqBFZhPsj7aBlBfumEzChkcybUSSfJV-nN9-98AEx6Q5VWaFo0HobnteBMSamhuxl1jh8Bc6-igZ4cFGoxCYkheo_b_fHHhTuMX6yuMhH9W6FdSqvgHsuyAB0LD_IYA5YdQmiJ-LUbLjl9oXnRiWYFkP3ciAGjoiZQzxXd-nGGTvPnXHOsP-RluWGHXjQHJ4foXvefqhezEhJ-miKhJiGEUT-__wyRzF0Is4).

**Peter, this is what I'm going to continue to talk about and we need more voices in the Republican Party doing the same**. I'm counting on your support to help us keep up this effort.

**I'm out there every day raising awareness about these issues and doing what I can to make a positive impact** \- to restore sanity to Washington. [But I need your help to keep up the fight](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=c1cf0c611624483d9435d83f55b0c0c1&_e=LtucJHMuop-P210VBKr3Nn_OyIHtQr22RJ82JOZs0Egq0BPcfS4P2_a-hlx83DMAWFHHTPZ4e_YNjpCXEF9IuztxbtyOm1tFx6H2xey-1ZXIlslNVRd89JmqWo-Yg7F90-Hk-K__XawQsmjJC_dA1Lt4TOXwuxUPUtQm3r5EdekPRJbDJ9ymT5JuipIgWg-_UcHCkaNAa4Ur4yXx721SsUlVkcC37IciE0wQqtDtCxXR_kXfd4AKkhuH_vHVIp7n3oyHf-6CUjBTgq9Gs_sDuw%3D%3D).

The funds we raise go directly into our advocacy efforts and that's why I'm reaching out today to [ask you to consider making a donation right now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=c1cf0c611624483d9435d83f55b0c0c1&_e=LtucJHMuop-P210VBKr3Nn_OyIHtQr22RJ82JOZs0Egq0BPcfS4P2_a-hlx83DMAvFGd8G941WJlIYY2DHisxHHWNMVuiB2LNdYRSY476OOjb8NykmM1YS4N8EEd6RrrmepdTwMW68v_e7FqQYyRQVfZDL_kDlVX6uCWUa1stDy2Xk5COScjclwSV3onIxNm45jgGc69u8rPcUW29I6I9x2eB1cV1c13IJklcwSWMZKe7m2PzWCVE4AM6Y5jJ3qCf4-3ln3uBMoXDvYWxHGr_Q%3D%3D) to help. I'm counting on you.
[Donate Now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=c1cf0c611624483d9435d83f55b0c0c1&_e=LtucJHMuop-P210VBKr3Nn_OyIHtQr22RJ82JOZs0Egq0BPcfS4P2_a-hlx83DMAVthFfZkWX_K2cYb-GIjxbsN8X7_XCna4_OPgDrVgu_4CdK2_XqWO7P0PkmwmPrcgh2ATqhdwr0uQtOAB5uiUCRU0BauegMFVZcHqBzohntsCZyazTiXLzLGUGMaP5xztHTKKE9IpatVd_4rjHq6epB14tBxXOqwv_RLn9n31YXELyg11FrUtGhzdK_-xpthNXdjFBxBpLRtkFCqrfBflNQ%3D%3D)
I'm so appreciative of all the work you're doing to heal the divisions in our country.

Thank you!

-John

Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
candidate or candidate's committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

[Unsubscribe](http://links.johnkasich.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_s=c1cf0c611624483d9435d83f55b0c0c1&_t=pyZHog05jkiRvCURKyBaPngWL2gOYI573acyTzZ20LwATz5MW5tIfUSqXmfw3ery8FdlyUe5fbxKBICW-TJ1qEXoZBsKy5r7PkhMaHW9ZjU1I1mbqNIgARcI9uE3rO0McTqb-mloDqpQxpnI3QsM6UidCtVAzswkpfaw6ta1Wfo%3D)

With these numbers trending the way the are, we won’t have enough to defeat MAGA Republican Devin Nunes: = | = We promised Phil that he would have enough money to defeat Devin Nunes. But as of 12:00pm, donations hit rock bottom, and now we’re in danger of going completely BUST. We absolutely cannot disappoint Phil when we meet with him Friday. Please, Peter, our movement is at stake. = END OF QUARTER DEADLINE! HELP BEAT NUNES NOW If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = \-- Arballo Finance Team | Text UNITE to 25002 to receive special text message updates from our campaign! Message & data rates may apply. | Paid for by Arballo For Congress P.O. Box 3406, Fresno, CA 93650 www.philarballo.com Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District against Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who has turned his back on Central Valley families for two decades. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. One more thing: Devin Nunes is terrified of losing to us. We came so close in 2020, even though Nunes outspent our campaign four-to-one. ---
I’m truly honored by the outpouring of support we’ve received from grassroots conservatives like you ever since we launched our campaign for governor.

_Which is why it pains me to have to tell you that, as things stand, we’re $29,645 behind on our goal with our FIRST fundraising deadline of the campaign nearly here._

I’m counting on your sustained support at this pivotal moment to ensure we meet our first deadline to TAKE THE LEAD in this TOSS-UP race.

We’ve seen time and again just how far national Democrats are willing to go to hold onto to such a crucial battleground state like Wisconsin.
---
_In fact, Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer were just in Wisconsin this summer helping state Democrats fill Tony Evers’ warchest._
---

clean_body: Our FIRST deadline of the entire campaign. | Friend, I’m truly honored by the outpouring of support we’ve received from grassroots conservatives like you ever since we launched our campaign for governor. Which is why it pains me to have to tell you that, as things stand, we’re $29,645 behind on our goal with our FIRST fundraising deadline of the campaign nearly here. I’m counting on your sustained support at this pivotal moment to ensure we meet our first deadline to TAKE THE LEAD in this TOSS-UP race. We’ve seen time and again just how far national Democrats are willing to go to hold onto to such a crucial battleground state like Wisconsin. In fact, Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer were just in Wisconsin this summer helping state Democrats fill Tony Evers’ warchest. With our race already a 50-50 toss-up, we can’t waste a single moment in marshaling the resources to fight back -- especially with our FIRST deadline just hours away. Fellow Conservative,

It has been five years since I was elected to represent you in office, and it has been nothing short of an honor.

But our country is facing a huge problem... Democrats.

**Inflation is at an all-time high. COVID-19 numbers are soaring. Our nation’s borders are fully open to illegal migrants. Foreign policy has been completely abandoned. And innocent Americans are trapped with terrorists.** _What more could the Biden Administration ruin?_

The Biden Democrats are driving America into the ground, and if they are to continue to win, we might as well lose all hope.

But there is a chance to fix the mess, Fellow Conservative, which is taking back the majority this 2022. We only need **FIVE** seats to turn the House red, but that comes with ensuring we keep every seat we have. [**If you’re ready for the House to flip, please add your name below so I know you’re with me!**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=03d1861e04ce4c64b19cb63e0ea94d9b&_e=dgInsAoGKJ3wVwKjYKMzu8eULhBbz-2h_o_3PYQfYkQLqhGRmH8CksWC3nbAZV8n_BCXjhK6I8ynYsRFT7-pOZwOhnc1cnGYm7AZZoZNATBeXTBkYrPAct7uQmYZFt2dD7sjgqXiUR478Ae2no4II-rzArA9izFnAyQjSvitAIF-hZIerLgJfXyVqzWL9BUy6Ic6obxWfHACUKMrrzPy-Y2TI4uGvkrIjNGn5ahdCxGoHeEX8HgMZizj88mTL75e3TDAawxgwL_T5KZj5Z31o0mU9v4MFEiIA5uB6hgeIABy0dEPeR-tQ2MbikFw-03wHIdREgaSF4Qut0t0KomjebGb-WNLtuElbHqMfJdgMaaO32Nr-I29OXfC5hPFA4105ThGU5vfLbx2V2i5znaN-J-xHTS4fdvps4Ys_AqpJubUSJio5j85H4fNLr2w7V5piKDAZfu7JvOJ8JjMLIl2xwO05qR_VNXk9mq7uKx8v4rMBBUjUlSVdY96CdngoHvO3tIoY6VBUqkJSirpTuXrTW2Fa63x_NYDsI1PXNlS-iA%3D)

[**_FLIP THE HOUSE_**

This is nothing new, Fellow Conservative - Democrats Pelosi and Schumer have been using the same playbook to carry out their wretched, inefficient radical agenda for years.

_Enough is enough._

It’s time to put an end to the Democrats’ “America LAST” agenda and expose them for the damage their radical policies are having on this country.

I’m committed to firing Pelosi, to exposing Biden’s reckless agenda, and to ensuring freedom for generations to come. But I need to know I have your support, Fellow Conservative.

[**Would you consider adding your name to my list of patriots that are furious with the Democrats running our country and are dedicated to taking back the House in 2022?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=03d1861e04ce4c64b19cb63e0ea94d9b&_e=dgInsAoGKJ3wVwKjYKMzu8eULhBbz-2h_o_3PYQfYkQLqhGRmH8CksWC3nbAZV8n_BCXjhK6I8ynYsRFT7-pOZwOhnc1cnGYm7AZZoZNATBeXTBkYrPAct7uQmYZFt2dD7sjgqXiUR478Ae2no4II-rzArA9izFnAyQjSvitAIF-hZIerLgJfXyVqzWL9BUy6Ic6obxWfHACUKMrrzPy-Y2TI4uGvkrIjNGn5ahdCxGoHeEX8HgMZizj88mTL75e3TDAawxgwL_T5KZj5Z31o0mU9v4MFEiIA5uB6hgeIABy0dEPeR-tQ2MbikFw-03wHIdREgaSF4Qut0t0KomjeVmXb7Eu7_UrJgOofY3nc8FslZvbTj-GS7u6HZ5Mno_YFdhpLxd12ImkLkDAmcVH7pEYzO7SsYOr6w4rzuao0OYDSIH8JVQI18nOtDFoNidgq6icI6hsPfwRVKpJ6K7El-LrvrmBKO8j4Gd7v6tKIC4i8D7yS-Xctw0dJTmSxWzv4iwqCFe1c6uthXjkONMlNhsn9dzXPBvapl5QAGGhyv0%3D)

[**_FLIP THE HOUSE_**

It’s time to put an end to the Democrats’ “America LAST” agenda and expose them for the damage their radical policies are having on this country. I’m committed to firing Pelosi, to exposing Biden’s reckless agenda, and to ensuring freedom for generations to come. But I need to know I have your support, Fellow Conservative. It’s never been so important to take back leadership and get our country back on track. I, for one, can’t sit back and watch Democrats ruin our country for another second, so I hope you add your name today. For America, Drew Ferguson | | PAID FOR BY DREW FERGUSON FOR CONGRESS Thank your for your support! If you would like to send a check by mail please post it to: Drew Ferguson For Congress PO Box 71067 Newnan, GA 30271 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Peter Franchot
subject: You’re invited to my Campaign HQ Grand Opening!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
It is my privilege to invite you to my upcoming Campaign Headquarters Grand Opening! On Saturday, October 9, I’m excited to meet with supporters at our Campaign Headquarters in Bowie to kick-off the 2022 election and share my bold vision for the future of our state. This will be an action-packed community day with free food, fun activities for kids, and live entertainment. This is a FREE event, so make sure to bring your family and friends!
Together, we’re going to create 100,000 new jobs for our working families, take bold action on climate change, build a statewide public transit system that connects our communities, and so much more.
Our Headquarters is located at 4831 Tesla Dr, Bowie, MD 20715, and our event will be held from 2:00 PM to 4:00 PM. Click here to RSVP. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/yFqVkZugUkezpiJ1p5JnWQ2]
More details can be found on the link above. I hope to see you there!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em092921&amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

name: Senator Chris Murphy
subject: Will you donate to Giffords before tomorrow’s fundraising deadline?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The gun lobby has a hold on many members of the Senate and has spent millions of dollars halting and unraveling gun safety progress.
#

Friends -
As a U.S. senator, one of the most pressing issues I see facing our nation is gun violence -- and I continue to be stunned by my colleagues’ unwillingness to act to save lives.
The gun lobby has spent millions of dollars on disinformation campaigns to convince my colleagues in the Senate to oppose my universal background checks bill.
Even with universal background checks passing the House, and President Biden rolling out executive actions in April to address gun violence, we have faced an uphill battle in the Senate.
And the truth is, there is no executive action that can fully address the scale of this crisis. Without bold action from Congress, a quarter of all gun transfers will continue to happen without a check.
That’s why I’ve been working with Republicans and Democrats on legislation to expand background checks in the Senate. Giffords is my teammate in all of this. They are doing everything they can to make sure background checks get passed and signed into law. So I need to ask:
[**Will you make a $3 contribution to Giffords before tomorrow’s fundraising deadline? Your donation will be put straight to work to pass universal background checks and save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210929-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1041_3935704_ibbAy1&akid=1041%2E3935704%2EibbAy1)

The gun lobby has a hold on many members of the Senate and has spent millions of dollars halting and unraveling gun safety progress.
We need your help to keep the pressure on my colleagues and fight back against the gun lobby. Only Congress can close the gaping loopholes in our background checks system.
Background checks are supported by more than 90% of Americans. That does not happen without the support of the overwhelming majority of Republicans, conservatives, and gun owners. I believe we can and must get this done.
[**Victims of gun violence have long waited for action. Help us pass universal background checks and save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210929-1-15&t=26&refcode2=1041_3935704_ibbAy1&akid=1041%2E3935704%2EibbAy1)

Chris Murphy

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Aadland for U.S. Senate Newsletter
body:
News from Erik Aadland
---
| | | | | | Volume 10 | September 29 2021
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| Chaos. That's the word that best describes the situation in Del Rio, Texas, where 15,000 Haitian migrants have crossed the border and set up camp. By failing to enforce immigration laws and end illegal crossings, Joe Biden continues to allow dangerous conditions to threaten the safety and protection of our nation and its citizens. Meanwhile, Michael Bennet turns a blind eye to the crisis.
And another crisis is brewing in D.C. as Democrats are moving to raise the nation's debt ceiling. It's like a credit card company that keeps raising the limit on a bunch of teenagers who spend like there is no tomorrow. What does that mean to you? As the debt spins out of control, you will feel the impact at the grocery store. Inflation will continue to rise to disastrous levels, taking its toll on every American. Add to it a $3.5 trillion infrastructure spending spree, the majority of which doesn't go to infrastructure. You deserve to keep more of your hard-earned money, and I will see to it that the government stops writing checks you can't cash.
Finally, in a Democrat-controlled, one-party-rule in Washington, Michael Bennet and John Hickenlooper failed Colorado once again. The headquarters for the Bureau of Land Management will head back to Washington rather than being located in Grand Junction. Exactly what are Bennet and Hickenlooper doing for Colorado?
Despite this, I offer you hope, as Coloradans are rising up and demanding more. As your U.S. Senator I will fight for immigration laws to be enforced, protecting our nation and its people from foreign invasion. I will demand accountability in government spending. And I will fight for Colorado each and every day I serve in the Senate.
It's time for change. Join me in the fight to bring sensibility back to the Senate.
Erik
---
| | | Visit our Website
---
| | |
---
| Upcoming Events
---

* Sep 30 - Erik will attend Cigar Night with Dennis Prager: 7101 S. Clinton St Centennial CO. 6-9pm

* Oct 2 - Hear Erik at La Plata County Lincoln Day Dinner 5-9pm 256 Rancho Milagro Way Hesperus, CO

* Oct 7 - Hear Erik on Peter Boyles radio show on 710am KNUS. 7-7:30am

---
|
---
| | |
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
Erik has been traveling all over the state of Colorado to meet people who are tired of politics and want real answers.
In September, he has traveled from Eagle to Weld County and down to Canon City. Erik spoke to the state Republican Party in Pueblo about establishing unity within the party.

Erik has just returned from a successful fundraising visit to Texas where he met with other liberty-loving supporters who want to see the Republican party take back the U.S. Senate.
Finally, Erik will travel to La Plata County on Oct. 2 for their Lincoln Day Dinner.

We are excited to see the grassroots support of Erik grow as he shares his solutions for the many issues we face today.
| |
---
| An important fundraising deadline looms
---
|
---
| Show the Dems we're serious
---
Tonight, is an important deadline for fundraising, and the Democrats are amassing a huge campaign war chest. We want Michael Bennet and the Democrats to know we intend to take this U.S. Senate seat and stand up to tyranny.
Please join our cause and donate by midnight, Sept. 30, to demonstrate your support for freedom.

Peter,
We’ve got some big updates for you ahead of our biggest fundraising deadline to date. We set an ambitious fundraising goal because we have to maintain momentum every quarter to make it to our primary next year and have a winning chance. **Just one week ago we were $25,000 behind our goal. **

The good news is that hundreds of grassroots donors from around the country have chipped in and helped us over the last seven days. We’ve raised $18,000 in just this week and we’re so close to the finish line. **The bad news is we still need to raise another $7,000 by midnight tomorrow if we want to hit our target.**

**[Can you send a $10, $15, or $25 donation and help us stay on track to reach our goal by MIDNIGHT tomorrow?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36700061/308910638/195484124?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWVkMmRhNy01YjIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GbyM15sGwxZ9ira2ifOPKBIlPDfn8hiUPFbLIyHQdTo=)**

name: Brent Bozell
subject: You are being lied to
body:
The radical left-wing media can be summarized with this quote
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zucagv1dm76mbditm64vuokev0i9qik6jqtf5hs8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjgmco72cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqcdtjmpqj4srk65qb6t9j6toj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onichh75cjme4rmfdpmeuqndd70scqj4plgetib6obm6lqm0sdm68r64s30maqbfduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75cj66arjbdhnmth6cc3gm9h3csh5u)
[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zmqg3qce0gj6jcr94joua55jqrnas9pqc31b3p78_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjgmco72cph2bs)
Friend,

The radical left-wing media can be summarized with this quote about Soviet propaganda:
_" They lie to us, we know they're lying, they know we know they're lying, but they keep lying to us, and we keep pretending to believe them."_

It makes you wonder. How can the left-wing media keep up the charade? How can they keep on lying to the American people and get away with it? How can they push such an obvious left-wing agenda, despite dramatic falls to their viewership?

Answer: The left-wing media is being funded by George Soros and other "champagne communists".

**Since 2003, George Soros has donated over $10 MILLION to news organizations like Young Turks, NPR, and journalism schools. **

Unfortunately, too many voters still believe the left-wing media. They used their lies and propaganda to steal the election in 2020. We cannot let them get away with it again in 2024.

[**_Friend, this is a direct call to action for your support. I am asking you to donate $10, $35, $50, $100, or more today to help us expose the left-wing media 's lies. Donate here >>_**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zfi38b1kf82moee74h04suhphv5j54niu8j2k4a0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjgmco72cph2bs)

**Let me introduce myself briefly**. I am the Founder and President of the **Media Research Center (MRC).** MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media.

_When the MRC was founded in 1987 over 75% of Americans trusted the leftwing media ... now 90% DO NOT trust the Fake News media_.

Before MRC, voters would believe their evening news. We have shown Americans how much they are being lied to. With the internet, they no longer need to receive news from a Soros-funded organization like NPR or journalists from Soros-funded college programs.

**I am asking for your immediate support today to help me raise $48,000 in the next 48 hours.**
[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z4d0mi6s3hqe3u4procj4v9g0haaqlods49trj8g_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjgmco72cph2bs)
I do not have a billionaire backer like George Soros. I rely 100% on Americans who believe in our mission to expose and neutralize the propaganda arm of the Left: the national news media.

Help us expose their agenda. Help us prepare for the fight ahead. If we do not expose the bias, then the left-wing media will be able to get away with their massive propaganda operation.

[**Donate $10 >>
Donate $35 >>
Donate $50 >>
Donate $100 >>
Donate $250 >>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate Other >>**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5ui7f75r4jiqk6v667ipfekh4trnqkchqi5jpn0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjgmco72cph2bs)

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
President
Media Research Center

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Conservative FWD, [please use this preferences page](http://e.conservativefwd.com/prefs/9z2zg17ucqngp5go08ubeo17ibk0h0i1cmm5i1no9dg).
625 First Street #183 Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z8f768k81nrlug0v0pai157t7qnakvs5ko10va6o_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjgmco72cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Donna Imam via, VoteForDonna.com
subject: Can a Democrat defeat Abbott in Texas?
body:
Gov. Abbott’s approval in Texas is slipping after taking away voter rights, and reproductive healthcare rights but who will challenge him to flip Texas blue? |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36701261/308914930/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDdlZTgyOS01ZjIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uj5iQdLVS1N2u_Ilxd9hfv_X6JWAzlQ2xWK4yEQZHIQ=)
**Beto O'Rourke: "Very seriously" thinking about running for governor of Texas.**

**[GOP Governor Greg Abbott's approval numbers are slipping and Beto O'Rourke is "very seriously" thinking about running for governor. Will you rush in $3 before my first major FEC end-of-quarter goal so we can build on this momentum and finally turn Texas blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36701262/308914931/77586780?refcode=em-92921-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDdlZTgyOS01ZjIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uj5iQdLVS1N2u_Ilxd9hfv_X6JWAzlQ2xWK4yEQZHIQ=)**
| **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36701263/308914932/77586780?refcode=em-92921-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDdlZTgyOS01ZjIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uj5iQdLVS1N2u_Ilxd9hfv_X6JWAzlQ2xWK4yEQZHIQ=)**

* * *

This is huge, friend.

Texas Governor Greg Abbott's approval rating stands at just 42% approval amongst Texans. It's no wonder: Abbott failed to respond to the winter storm, left millions without power and over 200 Texans dead, he took away women's reproductive healthcare freedom, and he rammed through the worst voter disenfranchisement law in the country, in Texas, which was already the hardest state to vote in.

**This week Beto O’Rourke said he is “very seriously” thinking about running for governor in an interview at the Texas Tribune Festival. This could be our very best shot at turning Texas blue.**

None of this will be possible unless we build the biggest field operation in the history of Texas. We’re doing our part in Austin, Texas. Last year, we reached over 50,000 doors to mobilize Democrats, and we came closer than anyone thought possible to flipping TX-31 from red to blue. We'll have to expand on that effort in Austin if we're going to get this done.

I'm confident that with Abbott's dropping approval numbers and the team we're assembling (including you, friend!) -- we can do this. But that means hitting every fundraising mark with strength, and right now we're coming up $23,918 short of our very first FEC end-of-quarter goal.

**[Will you chip in $3 toward my end-of-quarter deadline? Let's show the country that we have what it takes to finally turn Texas blue. Anything you give will go straight toward building my field operation to turn out Democrats in Austin.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36701264/308914933/77586780?refcode=em-92921-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDdlZTgyOS01ZjIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uj5iQdLVS1N2u_Ilxd9hfv_X6JWAzlQ2xWK4yEQZHIQ=)**

subject: We know a phony when we see one
body:
First, Anna Paulina Luna "avidly" supported the disastrous Obama/Biden ticket, giving us 8 years of radically liberal policies from the White House... |
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=f544d86620&e=c2296cffff)
---
| | Dear Friend, First, Anna Paulina Luna "avidly" supported the disastrous Obama/Biden ticket, giving us 8 years of radically liberal policies from the White House. Then, Luna gave an interview (and a photoshoot) to an adult magazine called SKYN and said **“I’m able to take on different personalities depending on what image I am going for. I think getting into character of what you are selling is super important.”** So now, after changing her name, moving to Florida, and registering as a Republican for the first time, Luna is trying to sell Florida Republicans on her latest character. **_But we aren't buying it: we know a phony when we see one._

Our district has had enough phoniness with our current congressman, Charlie Crist. We can't afford another dishonest politician like him. And let's be clear: that's exactly who Luna would be: just Crist in a skirt.** **I'm running to give Republicans in our district a better choice. ** I have a proven, long standing conservative record. While Luna was busy promoting herself on social media, I was in the trenches serving as an Election Integrity attorney for President Trump during the Wisconsin recount, promoting our Republican values on Newsmax, and visiting the Southern Border to see for myself the crisis Biden has created. **You have my word that I will _NEVER_ betray our values just to climb the political ladder.** But to give our district the representation we deserve, it's going to take all of us true conservatives working together. That's why I'm asking you to **[click here](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=9457307818&e=c2296cffff)** and help our campaign reach our fundraising goal before Thursday's midnight deadline. [**Every single contribution matters. So whether it's $500, $50, or $5 - please join this effort and let's restore our values to Florida's 13th District!**](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=ef8a1d8b98&e=c2296cffff)
---
| [SUPPORT AMANDA MAKKI FOR CONGRESS](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=6d0217bdb5&e=c2296cffff "SUPPORT AMANDA MAKKI FOR CONGRESS")
---
| God Bless,
_Amanda Makki_
---

name: Ken Russell
subject: I’m counting on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ken Russell for Florida
body:
In order to truly make a difference, we need to defeat Republicans in Florida who are working right now to combat all our efforts for real change.

|
---

| | I’ve been so inspired by grassroots Democrats like you, Peter.

As I travel up and down the state of Florida, I’ve met so many of you who are determined to stand up and fight for your beliefs.

**But in order to truly make a difference, we need to defeat Republicans in Florida who are working right now to combat all our efforts for real change.**

So I’m coming to you with a critical choice for you to make, Peter.

You can either sit back, stay on the sidelines and allow Republicans to continue their reign here in Florida, where their devastating agenda is harming our great citizens.

**Or you can step up and join me and my campaign as we fight back against this Republican nightmare.**

I know we have what it takes to win, Peter. But we need to lay a strong foundation for our campaign to make it to the finish line.

I’m counting on your support before the End of Quarter Deadline to make this happen.

clean_body: In order to truly make a difference, we need to defeat Republicans in Florida who are working right now to combat all our efforts for real change. | | | I’ve been so inspired by grassroots Democrats like you, Peter. As I travel up and down the state of Florida, I’ve met so many of you who are determined to stand up and fight for your beliefs. But in order to truly make a difference, we need to defeat Republicans in Florida who are working right now to combat all our efforts for real change. So I’m coming to you with a critical choice for you to make, Peter. You can either sit back, stay on the sidelines and allow Republicans to continue their reign here in Florida, where their devastating agenda is harming our great citizens. Or you can step up and join me and my campaign as we fight back against this Republican nightmare. I know we have what it takes to win, Peter. But we need to lay a strong foundation for our campaign to make it to the finish line. I’m counting on your support before the End of Quarter Deadline to make this happen. clean_body: | = | | Team -- let us catch you up to speed: FIRST: Trump and his MAGA allies declared that the path to their victory depends on flipping Nevada bright red. THEN: National Republicans spent MILLIONS to unseat Susie in 2020 and shrank our margin of victory by six points. NOW: Susie is already facing FIVE Republican opponents and the GOP has already spent over $1.2 million attacking her \-- that’s almost half of what they spent TOTAL last cycle and we're still more than a year away from election day. | | | = It’s not even 2022 yet and NV-03 is already one of the most competitive Congressional seats in the country, which means we’re going to need all hands on deck to defend it. The fact that National Republicans are spending so much money this early in the game means they’re planning to do whatever it takes to finish what they started last cycle and roll back all the progress we’ve made. The stakes could not be higher. We have to put in the work to make sure Susie’s campaign is well-resourced, and that starts with hitting our crucial FEC fundraising deadline tomorrow night. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for your help, Susie Lee HQ | | = If you'd like to support Susie Lee For Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. body:

Peter,

Governor DeSantis is the #1 target for the radical Left and Democrats across the country. Why? Because he’s putting Florida FIRST and protecting our American values from the Left’s insane agenda.

Just this year, Governor DeSantis has:

✅ Held Big Tech accountable

✅ Stood strong AGAINST the Chinese Communist Party

✅ Kept our state OPEN for business and kids in the classroom

✅ Signed anti-rioting legislation

✅ Protected women’s sports

✅ Banned Critical Race Theory in schools

✅ Strengthened Election Integrity by banning ballot harvesting and prohibiting Zuckerbucks

✅ Banned Vaccine Passports

And he's just getting started.

So, our team wants to know…

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Angry, but not surprised
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
I need everyone on this team to make the commitment to keeping the Senate blue in 2022.
#
I’ll be frank, Peter:
**I’m angry about Senate Republicans’ behavior this week, but not surprised.**
Instead of voting to pay down the debt that Republicans racked up during the Trump Administration, they want to run out on the tab.
I’m doing everything I can to keep this from happening, Peter. _But that’s not all._
I need everyone on this team to make the commitment to keeping the Senate blue in 2022.
**We can’t afford to hand control back to Mitch McConnell and the Senate GOP.**
**[Tomorrow, we have the opportunity to show the Republicans we’re ready to win. We can’t afford to come up short with so much at risk. Will you chip in $5 before the deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36703462/308924717/-2032228210?refcode=dd_em_210929_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzViZTQzZS02MzIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=41xiq_z7yvgQH9VCvIzlHZEAucG1tY4E3CQLWEXGe7o=)**

name: Alex Padilla
subject: Before tomorrow's official deadline:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
It’s going to take a massive organizing effort in every corner of the state to hold this seat and keep California blue, and the only way we’re going to be able to pull it off is if we start right away.
#

Friends,
I know my team has sent you a lot of emails over the past few days, so I wanted to take a minute to explain _why exactly_ our deadline tomorrow night is so important. Thanks for reading.
After every quarter, the Federal Election Committee requires candidates for federal office — like me — to publicly report how much money they’ve raised. The Q3 deadline is tomorrow at midnight.
And when this deadline passes and my team files our report, we need to make sure it sends a powerful statement about how our campaign is prepared _right now_ to take on whatever Republicans throw our way.
Because now that the recall is over, California Republicans will be setting their sights on this race. And they’ll be looking closely at our report for any signs of weakness. So I am asking you directly:
[**Can you please make a contribution to our people-powered campaign before our deadline at midnight tomorrow? I’m counting on lots of donations from grassroots supporters to power this campaign, so your donation means a lot to our success.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-sep21?refcode=em210929-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=360_159979_Tn5S8A&akid=360%2E159979%2ETn5S8A)
It’s going to take a massive organizing effort in every corner of the state to hold this seat and keep California blue, and the only way we’re going to be able to pull it off is if we start right away.
Your contribution today, before our official FEC deadline tomorrow night, will ensure we have the resources to do just that. Thank you.
\- Alex
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-sep21?refcode=em210929-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=360_159979_Tn5S8A&akid=360%2E159979%2ETn5S8A)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=360%2E159979%2ETn5S8A)

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: An urgent update for Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ItFlEBhm5jmcfZ%2FoXgUerI1AMh02gKSQ&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend, I have an urgent update that I'm personally reaching out to my supporters (including you) about:
My finance team just let me know we're still short of our goal with just hours until we have to close the books on the fundraising quarter. This means we might have to submit a public fundraising report to the FEC that shows us behind where we thought we'd be.
**Friend, I am counting on your donation to get us back on track before it 's too late. **
Missing goals like this is just what the Republican Party is betting on. With the Senate narrowly in Democrats' control, the GOP just needs to flip a single seat to put Mitch McConnell back in charge - and the political ground here in Connecticut is giving them hope: Republicans were recently able to flip a seat here - their first since President Biden was inaugurated.
With Senate control on the line, Republicans will surely be looking for weakness, and we cannot let them target us more than they already have. **The greatest way to show our strength, and prove to Mitch McConnell that this Senate seat won 't be an easy flip, is for every supporter reading this email to chip in whatever they can.**
**Can you please help me close this fundraising gap before midnight? Here 's the best link to give: [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1077-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thanks for stepping up when it's needed most.
Dick

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: Your personalized campaign update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We have a SUPER SPECIAL surprise for our biggest supporters.
#
We'll get straight to the point:
We’re **only 24 hours away** from our critical FEC fundraising deadline, and we want to take a moment to update you on where we stand (and make sure to read to the bottom of the email for a fun surprise 🤩):
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/18193?t=1&akid=505%2E3698%2EKKz2Mp)
We’re ***SO CLOSE*** to reaching our $100,000 fundraising goal, but we still have a gap to fill before tomorrow. **If you’re able, will you use your personal link to chip in $5 or anything you can today:**
**[https://act.ericaforus.com/go/18238?refcode=em-&t;=3&akid;=505%2E3698%2EKKz2Mp](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/18193?t=2&akid=505%2E3698%2EKKz2Mp)**
It’s essential that we reach this critical goal and post strong fundraising numbers for the quarter since they’ll be shared publicly with the WORLD.
**Posting a strong report will show North Carolinians and folks nation-wide that our moral movement is a force to be reckoned with.** It will show voters on the fence that Erica has a real shot at winning this U.S. Senate race. It can even stop more opponents from jumping into an already crowded and competitive race.
**Erica can’t do this alone — that’s why we’re giving you your own personal donation link right here:**
**[https://act.ericaforus.com/go/18238?refcode=em-&t;=5&akid;=505%2E3698%2EKKz2Mp](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/18193?t=4&akid=505%2E3698%2EKKz2Mp)**
**Oh and we have a SUPER SPECIAL surprise for our biggest supporters. ✨✨✨**
[****](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/18193?t=6&akid=505%2E3698%2EKKz2Mp)
**Erica will give EVERY — yes, every — donor in our last 24 hours a personal phone call.** No matter how big or small the donation, if you donate between now and midnight on September 30 you’ll receive a phone call from Erica. Donate through your personal link, and you will be automatically added to Erica’s call list:
**[https://act.ericaforus.com/go/18238?refcode=em-&t;=8&akid;=505%2E3698%2EKKz2Mp](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/18193?t=7&akid=505%2E3698%2EKKz2Mp)**
You’re a part of this team. We are a scrappy, grassroots campaign that depends on small-dollar donations from folks like you. We want to take this opportunity to show our gratitude.
Together,
Team Erica Smith for U.S. Senate
**P.S. Make sure to pick up if you see an unknown number from North Carolina calling. It could be Erica!**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210929-505-footer&t=9&refcode2=505_3698_KKz2Mp&akid=505%2E3698%2EKKz2Mp)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=10&akid=505%2E3698%2EKKz2Mp)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=505%2E3698%2EKKz2Mp)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Collier HQ
subject: Let’s not forget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Howdy friend, In 2018, thanks to supporters like you, Mike ran against Dan Patrick in the closest race for lieutenant governor in two decades — outperforming every other Democrat on the ticket in nearly two-thirds of Texas counties. Let’s not forget that the odds were heavily stacked against us due to Dan Patrick’s massive war chest and we were outspent 10 to 1. But that didn’t stop us from fighting for a future that represents all Texans then, and it’s not going to stop us now. We’re building a people-powered movement of everyday Texans ready for new leadership, and we will not take a single vote for granted. **We’re going to fight for every vote in every county of Texas to defeat Dan Patrick. Let’s not forget that the odds were heavily stacked against us due to Dan Patrick’s massive war chest and we were outspent 10 to 1. But that didn’t stop us from fighting for a future that represents all Texans then, and it’s not going to stop us now. You must have a lot of emails in your inbox, folks, so I’ll keep
this short:

According to a new poll, we’re beating my Republican opponent, JD Vance,
by a single percentage point.

The good news is we can flip Ohio blue next year. But the bad news is that
Vance has a $10 million super PAC behind him funded by a single right-wing
billionaire donor -- Peter Thiel.

Look, I’ll take grassroots support over a right-wing billionaire any day.
But it will take a whole lot of us to stop the GOP from buying this seat.
So, I’m asking:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4838?t=1007&akid=1037%2E3611125%2E6Xi7dO ]Can you help us compete with the massive amount of outside cash being
funneled into this race? Please, pitch in $25 before our end-of-quarter
deadline hits tomorrow.

I’m so grateful to have your support.

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD b
| | | This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zigvidplrt8t81ave8aea62hrh41rmehir4n562o_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjgm9oj0cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z8hssgcu9tjavir0fgosg5s73f1oce0q5nttk97g_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjgm9oj0cjh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zj72j36fe3bvipr5jjn16ni0m0l3guvvvsbou0eg_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cjgm9oj0cjh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844

| | I’m seriously concerned here, Derek.

My opponent, Glenn Youngkin, has been endorsed by Donald Trump four times. Four times! And he’s screaming from the rooftops that he’s _proud_ of it. He even said Donald Trump “represents so much of why [he’s] running!”

So after Virginia voted against an extremist like Donald Trump by ten points last year, you’d think a race against another radical like Youngkin wouldn’t even be a contest.

**But, Derek — get this — _Glenn is ahead of me in TWO RECENT POLLS_ , and _The Cook Political Report_ just shifted this race to a TOSS-UP.**

This is going to come down to a razor-thin margin, Derek, which is why it’s so critical that we hit our fundraising goals — that’s exactly why we activated our donor match program for one day in our end-of-September push.

_**[So I just don’t get why folks aren’t stepping up and taking advantage of this opportunity — your contribution will be matched, dollar for dollar, but you have to chip in before midnight tonight! body:
There’s nothing Republican Madison Cawthorn won’t say or do to score more political points

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36705640/308932578/1639334829?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWIzNGNlYy02ODIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zo1sXTk1EdzuX3WIx5hhbMMGJnCPdqAQMsJTfvfjGaY=)
---
I’m disgusted.

My opponent Madison Cawthorn should be spending his time helping my community.

**Instead, Cawthorn spreads dangerous misinformation.** He spoke in front of thousands and grossly lied about our vaccine rollout.

Team – You're probably getting a lot of emails about an "upcoming FEC fundraising deadline." Well, let us explain what that deadline means and why it's so important. The Federal Election Committee (FEC) collects and reports every federal campaign's activity, including what they've raised and spent every fiscal quarter. These reports are then published, giving political pundits and opponents a look into the strength of a campaign. Tomorrow is the next FEC deadline, and right now, our numbers are not where they need to be. With McConnell's hand-picked candidate eyeing this seat and another far-right candidate already in the race, we cannot afford to fall short. **[Can Maggie count on you to donate before the FEC deadline on September 30th? subject: I understand

body:
I know what it’s like...

|
---

| | I don't come from money.

My parents taught me to work hard for every dollar you earn.

They also taught me that there’s no shame in asking for help when you need it.

[**_So I’m reaching out to folks from Cresco to ask for your support. You see, my first End-of-Quarter Deadline is only 24 hours away -- but I’m still running $10,031 short. I’m going to explain why this deadline is so critical, but if you’re in a rush please chip in $14 now. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36706346/308934959/1129282168?refcode=20210929_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGI5MmMwNC02YjIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DW438ax69Zp0hAR01B5T4Oy_kohxVdAj1VZaLd9kvkI=)

Unlike a lot of people who run for office, I know what it’s like to struggle financially.

I grew up in poverty, but my parents never stopped fighting to create a better life for us.

I know the choices everyday Americans face.

I understand the pressures of living without a safety net.

So when my Republican Congressman, Don Bacon, voted to cut taxes for billionaires and corporations, instead of supporting hardworking families: [**_I said, 'Enough.'_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36706348/308934960/1129282168?refcode=20210929_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGI5MmMwNC02YjIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DW438ax69Zp0hAR01B5T4Oy_kohxVdAj1VZaLd9kvkI=) I know that if we want to see change, we need more everyday people like me in Congress.

[**But the truth is: running for office is incredibly expensive.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36706354/308934965/1129282168?refcode=20210929_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGI5MmMwNC02YjIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DW438ax69Zp0hAR01B5T4Oy_kohxVdAj1VZaLd9kvkI=)

[**_Hitting my End-of-Quarter Goal will be the difference between funding a winning campaign, or struggling to keep up. So I’m personally asking: will you chip in $14 now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36706360/308934972/1129282168?refcode=20210929_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGI5MmMwNC02YjIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DW438ax69Zp0hAR01B5T4Oy_kohxVdAj1VZaLd9kvkI=)

After midnight tomorrow, my first fundraising numbers will be locked in.

DC Republicans are going to be watching to see if my campaign is strong enough to flip this seat blue. [**I’m behind right now. But I know that if we all band together, we can defy the odds and win this race for everyday folks across the country. Can I count on your $14 to help me get there?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36706363/308934976/1129282168?refcode=20210929_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGI5MmMwNC02YjIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DW438ax69Zp0hAR01B5T4Oy_kohxVdAj1VZaLd9kvkI=) | | [Chip in $15 now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36706365/308934977/1129282168?refcode=20210929_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGI5MmMwNC02YjIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DW438ax69Zp0hAR01B5T4Oy_kohxVdAj1VZaLd9kvkI=)

| | Peter,

I’ve never been one to back down from a fight.

In the Colorado state legislature, I fought some big fights — and won. I fought to make prescription drugs more affordable, brought funding to the Colorado census, and delivered six paid sick days to every single person in Colorado.

**Now, I’m up against the biggest fight of my campaign yet. Late last night, Colorado’s independent redistricting commission agreed on a map that CPR says would make our district “by far the most competitive seat in the state.”

And — tomorrow night is my first end-of-quarter deadline.**

This map, which will be sent to the Colorado Supreme Court, would, per Politico, “give Republicans a decent shot at controlling four of eight House seats.” Republicans are just five seats away from taking back the House. We can’t let that happen.

The GOP and their special interests will pull out all the stops to defeat our grassroots movement.

Late last night, Colorado’s independent redistricting commission agreed on a map that CPR says would make our district “by far the most competitive seat in the state.” And — tomorrow night is my first end-of-quarter deadline. This map, which will be sent to the Colorado Supreme Court, would, per Politico, “give Republicans a decent shot at controlling four of eight House seats.” Republicans are just five seats away from taking back the House. name: Team Malcolm
subject: re: deadline tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
We need your help to hit our 15,000 donation goal
#

Friend, we’re emailing for $3.
**Why? Because we need your help to hit our 15,000 donation goal before our end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline tomorrow at midnight.**
We set a goal for a number of donations rather than a dollar amount, because for a grassroots movement like ours, the number of supporters we have shows just as much strength as the total amount of money raised.
Just one $3 donation makes a statement to everyone watching this race that working people demand to be in the rooms where decisions are made that affect our lives.
[So, what do you say? Can you chip in $3 — or any amount — to help us reach our goal ahead of our FEC fundraising deadline and elect a working-class champion as Pennsylvania's next U.S. Senator?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36707366/308938070/-353695395?refcode2=ad31797b-6d21-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&refcode=em210929-2-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDMxNzk3Yi02ZDIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QWdqt_wXmnI_nq24nYerkXEEmArzgMOm_z55oO_UBU4=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36707370/308938071/-353695395?refcode2=ad31797b-6d21-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&refcode=em210929-2-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDMxNzk3Yi02ZDIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QWdqt_wXmnI_nq24nYerkXEEmArzgMOm_z55oO_UBU4=)**
We are legally required to report our fundraising totals after tomorrow's deadline.
That means everyone watching our race will know exactly how much money we've got and where it came from.
And they'll use what's in our public report to determine the strength of our movement to deliver a government and democracy that works for working people.
Reaching our goal will show everyone that we have what it takes to win this race and help expand our Democratic majority in the Senate.
[But we need your help to do that, so we're asking: Can we count on you to make a $3 donation ahead of our FEC deadline tomorrow? Your donation means so much in this critical moment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36707374/308938072/-353695395?refcode2=ad31797b-6d21-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&refcode=em210929-2-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDMxNzk3Yi02ZDIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QWdqt_wXmnI_nq24nYerkXEEmArzgMOm_z55oO_UBU4=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36707376/308938074/-353695395?refcode2=ad31797b-6d21-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&refcode=em210929-2-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDMxNzk3Yi02ZDIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QWdqt_wXmnI_nq24nYerkXEEmArzgMOm_z55oO_UBU4=)**

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy Endorsed my Run for Congress in TX-38!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

The day after I announced my campaign to run in Texas' 38th Congressional district, the top Republican Leader in the House of Representatives, Kevin McCarthy, gave me his endorsement. I am extremely proud and humbled to have Leader McCarthy's endorsement. Please read his endorsement of me below!

"**_I am proud to endorse Wesley Hunt for Texas’ new Congressional seat in TX-38. Wesley is a strong conservative leader, devoted family man, West Point graduate and combat veteran. As a former Apache helicopter pilot who completed 55 combat missions in Iraq, Wesley has proven that he is just the type of battle-hardened leader and patriot we need in the halls of Congress. In order to stop Biden and Pelosi’s out-of-control tax and spending spree, secure our border and pull our economy back from the brink, we need fighters in Congress like Wesley. I look forward to supporting Wesley Hunt and working with him as a member of Congress,_" said Leader McCarthy. **

The gravity of this election has never been greater, and with your support and Leader McCarthy's support, I will fight to defend our values, protect our southern border, stop Critical Race Theory in our schools, secure our elections, and fight against Biden's out of control spending.

Sincerely,
Wesley

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=18f9cbe728194f3fb2f0986127025802&_e=Xet3mA6ZZVKp0srRFTnTJLlyYn847x2c4DYwAor76-pUH4nrhe0DvgqT8bxhBtI3iYCRRXrf3Itv5_gD2VHLKx6MKLo4HT3o0j7aIIPqkob0mvVZ09a0LCbqjtZUlMQ0ZMhoyLJ-IaSPyKZt_kxFpDP3bem59eeQ3zXYdoZ_92rIJ9f2W-477o8eYOzWpSYfePzTAx2VRGSRMhSJMto3bnFru_FING4lslU34lZb5fZ6zvp9_bA0Kj4W6bKpIq6lXkLETvySXMEoLYP9W_kTMwxwgP4kaDnrIzScecstrFM%3D)****

name: Team Inslee
subject: 108 degrees
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Let's meet this moment.

name: Madeleine Albright
subject: my critical request for you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_)
It's Madeleine Albright.

As the former U.S. Secretary of State and Ambassador to the United Nations, I've met my fair share of world leaders.

**That 's why, during Donald Trump's presidency, I was acutely aware of the damage he did to our reputation on the global stage.**

And that's why I've been so proud of President Biden's commitment to shoring up international alliances and leading the way on the world's toughest fights -- like climate change, countering authoritarianism, and standing up for human rights.

But I won't lie: **[I’m worried that all our progress could be lost if we let the Republicans hold power again. So at this history-defining moment, I’m personally asking for your help and your $3 to defend our House Majority. Can I count on you before our House Democrats’ End of Quarter Deadline in just 24 hours to protect our House Majority?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_GFax_-)**

Look: **Trump has made it clear he views the destruction of our House Majority as the first step in his return to the White House -- and he and his Republicans are wasting no time or money in getting the job done.**

To put it simply, the whole world is watching and waiting to see if Democrats have the support we need to build a lasting legacy and restore our standing abroad.

It's on us to show them that we do, which is why I'm making my own contribution to help make sure we elect Democrats in the House and reaching out today to ask you do to the same.

[**Please, can you chip in $3 to defend our critical House Majority and stop Republicans from marching back into power at this critical moment? With so much on the line, we can 't afford to let House Republicans take back control now. >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/-YK-)
| | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-)
---
| [**Chip in $35 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/z7-)
---
| [**Chip in $50 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/~j-)
---
| [**Chip in $100 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-cg_KN_)
---
| [**Chip in $250 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Or chip in another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Thank you,

Madeleine Albright
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45698730&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4NTEwMjQ4NgS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45698730&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4NTEwMjQ4NgS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

Photo courtesy of Lauren Bulbin.

name: Megan Nien-Yun Clark
subject: my bad 🙈
body:
OMG, wait a second, Peter.

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36708022/308940281/1300596418?refcode=210929_FR_EOQ1megan_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlYzRhNjdjLTZmMjEtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTEwYTQwNSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YZ6ggbsBNDiP91ptmGnZxnd4iKdHiJTXTgVPEKJ8lrw=)
---
30 days hath September... _**WAIT A SECOND, Peter.**_ OMG, how is September already over tomorrow?!

_I'm not going to lie -- I totally dropped the ball on kicking off our EOQ fundraising push yesterday._

In my defense, it's been a crazy busy month. We merged Pay Your Interns PAC under Barrier To Entry, which was a major move -- but ultimately, we feel that it will unify and strengthen our mission to dismantle socioeconomic inequities and bring job integrity to the progressive political space.

On top of that, we've been planning a big training retreat that's happening this weekend! Tomorrow, I'm flying out of my homebase in Miami to meet Eden in Kansas City before a group of young, hungry, and talented campaign staffers arrives to learn all about digital fundraising, call-time, and other necessary skills to break into the industry and help elect badass progressives, like our BTE candidates.

**But enough excuses from me. Our major end-of-quarter deadline is tomorrow, and we need to raise money,_FAST_. $3,500 to be exact.**

[**There are a lot of big things happening over here at Barrier To Entry, and we can’t wait to share the excitement with you as we grow our movement. clean_body: OMG, wait a second, Peter. | | | = 30 days hath September... WAIT A SECOND, Peter. OMG, how is September already over tomorrow?! I'm not going to lie -- I totally dropped the ball on kicking off our EOQ fundraising push yesterday. In my defense, it's been a crazy busy month. We merged Pay Your Interns PAC under Barrier To Entry, which was a major move -- but ultimately, we feel that it will unify and strengthen our mission to dismantle socioeconomic inequities and bring job integrity to the progressive political space. On top of that, we've been planning a big training retreat that's happening this weekend! Tomorrow, I'm flying out of my homebase in Miami to meet Eden in Kansas City before a group of young, hungry, and talented campaign staffers arrives to learn all about digital fundraising, call-time, and other necessary skills to break into the industry and help elect badass progressives, like our BTE candidates. But enough excuses from me. Our major end-of-quarter deadline is tomorrow, and we need to raise money,FAST. $3,500 to be exact. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ____= __= __= __= __= Onward! Let's go! We also serve as a resource for individual mentorship and training to ensure candidates and their staff feel supported and equipped to enter the political space. Here’s the deal: I just got off the phone with Steve and he let me know he’s falling short of his end of September fundraising goal.
But I said, “Governor, don’t worry about it. I’m going to shoot out an email to the list and Democrats from all over the country are going to chip in and get you back on track.”
_I’m known for telling it like it is -- so don’t make me a liar!_

name: Team AOC
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Since you’ve joined our movement, we’ve accomplished so much.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210929-2537-header&t=1&akid=2537%2E2526796%2EnYwaMB)
Since you joined our movement this year, we’ve accomplished so much.
Just this year, Alexandria has fought for and made progress on passing urgent climate action with the inclusion of the Civilian Climate Corps in the budget reconciliation package, helped cut child poverty in half with the expansion of the Child Tax Credit, assisted millions of families who’ve lost loved ones to Covid-19 with the Funeral Assistance program, and so much more.
Your dedication to our movement has helped us achieve so much in just three short years and win our first re-election to keep Alexandria in Congress — **_thank you._**
We’re up against a tight fundraising deadline and re-election next year, and your first $3 contribution to our campaign will help us protect Alexandria’s seat by posting our strongest September fundraising report yet.
[Can we count on you to make your first $3 contribution to help get us to our $1.7 million fundraising goal for this quarter and protect Alexandria’s seat in Congress?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210929-am-1?refcode=em20210929-2537-P_FND_EOQ_LGP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&refcode2=2537_2526796_nYwaMB&akid=2537%2E2526796%2EnYwaMB)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210929-am-1?refcode=em20210929-2537-P_FND_EOQ_LGP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&refcode2=2537_2526796_nYwaMB&akid=2537%2E2526796%2EnYwaMB)**
Alexandria’s political courage to tell it like it is and fight for the policies and protections that voters elected Democrats to win has made her a top target of GOP donors — and we can expect that they will spare no expense in trying to unseat her in Congress next year.
A strong fundraising report from our campaign will prove that our momentum continues to grow and that small-dollar, grassroots campaigns can compete and win against corporate PACs and dark money.
Potential opponents will use our report to gauge whether or not they jump into our race in 2022. That’s why it is so important we hit the $1.7 million goal we set for the end of this month before we report our numbers to the FEC.
[We can’t reach this goal without your help right now. Can you make a $3 contribution to our movement before tomorrow’s midnight deadline?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210929-am-1?refcode=em20210929-2537-P_FND_EOQ_LGP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&refcode2=2537_2526796_nYwaMB&akid=2537%2E2526796%2EnYwaMB)
Thank you for everything you do for our movement.
\- Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210929-am-1?refcode=em20210929-2537-P_FND_EOQ_LGP&t=11&refcode2=2537_2526796_nYwaMB&akid=2537%2E2526796%2EnYwaMB)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210929-2537-P_FND_EOQ_LGP&t=12&akid=2537%2E2526796%2EnYwaMB)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=13&akid=2537%2E2526796%2EnYwaMB) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=14&akid=2537%2E2526796%2EnYwaMB) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=15&akid=2537%2E2526796%2EnYwaMB)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=16&akid=2537%2E2526796%2EnYwaMB)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=17&akid=2537%2E2526796%2EnYwaMB)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Allison=20Russo?=
subject: We need another 52 volunteer shifts this weekend to hit our goal,
body:
Help us talk to voters before they cast their ballot ⏰ | | | |
---
| | | Hi ,

We only have **one weekend left before early voting begins** in the OH-15 special election, and we can't afford to fall behind on our voter contact goals now. We've knocked on over 30,000 doors so far, but we have a big push coming up this weekend and we won't be able to reach it without you. **, can you sign up for a volunteer shift this weekend?_We need to schedule another 52 shifts by Friday to meet our goal._**
---
|
---
| [TALK TO VOTERS BEFORE VOTING BEGINS](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=9694baa088&e=400a181d5a "TALK TO VOTERS BEFORE VOTING BEGINS")
---
| Research shows that field programs are especially important in special elections, where turnout is typically low and there is not incumbency advantage. **But we can't take advantage of the unique dynamics of this special election without your help.**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=a865af819b&e=400a181d5a)

Join Allison Russo and local Democratic candidates across the 15th Distrist this (and every) weekend to talk to voters about the special election. We have just over 5 weeks to go until Election Day, so there is no "later!"

RSVP: [Grove City](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=036f6abfe7&e=400a181d5a) | [Pickerington](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=6b34752d3c&e=400a181d5a) | [Hilliard](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=6a15e8bdce&e=400a181d5a) | [Lancaster](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=adf921c020&e=400a181d5a) | [Athens](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=efe3e1d6bd&e=400a181d5a) | [London](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=a1bf6bfbde&e=400a181d5a) | [UA](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=400db10065&e=400a181d5a)

clean_body: Help us talk to voters before they cast their ballot ⏰ | | | | | | | Hi , We only have one weekend left before early voting begins in the OH-15 special election, and we can't afford to fall behind on our voter contact goals now. We've knocked on over 30,000 doors so far, but we have a big push coming up this weekend and we won't be able to reach it without you. , can you sign up for a volunteer shift this weekend?We need to schedule another 52 shifts by Friday to meet our goal. | | "TALK TO VOTERS BEFORE VOTING BEGINS" | Research shows that field programs are especially important in special elections, where turnout is typically low and there is not incumbency advantage. But we can't take advantage of the unique dynamics of this special election without your help. | | RSVP: Join Allison Russo and local Democratic candidates across the 15th Distrist this (and every) weekend to talk to voters about the special election. We have just over 5 weeks to go until Election Day, so there is no "later!" RSVP: | | | | | | | | | FEATURED EVENTS THIS WEEKEND: | RSVP: Join State Rep. body:
I’m reaching out to you directly about the crisis at... Hi Peter ー Andrew here. I’m reaching out to you directly about the crisis at our border. I’ve been to the border and seen this crisis for myself. [](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=8cee03217f0f475d9ac66b289f935062&_e=3yLFR3qlp63MfAuzajBtniokPm0mZeyLKj9vy_LcCjGSR1CTkU-uue3_xF-nRPV64FnkIeDn5Idw49D3ATi3Ryqx2vVbaBBkoMoMOAZ2vbsV6D-esc87WPXdByHZ3SzE-ge5XmkeEvwhWKsvrGOMZqTqnk1_TiQbcQw-5LqP4CGvcxkwe8WnfthEnlXhKEawL1ylI9VwpAfAw-iZrfbU1XwIkMAnxBZhnXzKBgyGIcrJ6K0HMcfsQc0V7psL-WDPjmsQuwVpowkT423XgtyKNYVoOuH94Q5dwQ2MmZxoEfkULOLj3eTLIsfIq3s_hYXh_fUSX5HiwY52BHU0ogO71Xkn-ozA-oqrAJX-tbXeD3RpFRdwIqnjN9jQUmJf_lDYNpgIXDOE5hCOt7fpY5hZM-NGt5e583uRZSgf9x1Ju_Aa0r9N6sWHAnlOAmXQzEoDmGDH_4yO3K70lbZ-2GgkIA55gc00_-EheRJMtMh2OvGhdsBf5KOITOIoZgBP95iR) Over the course of this year, we have seen a record number of illegal border crossings. There are known _gang members_ and _individuals on the terrorism watch list_ exploiting the Administration’s weak policies.
* In July 2021, U.S. Customs and Border Protection reported over two hundred thousand apprehensions at the border – the highest in over two decades.
* Since January 2021, over EIGHT THOUSAND of those arrested at the border _have been convicted criminals._ This influx creates a dangerous threat to our national security.

Addressing the crisis at our southern border must be the utmost priority for Congress.****_**We must secure our borders now!**_ _[**Peter, will you ensure I can continue to fight for Secure Borders by helping me reach my End of Quarter goal?**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=8cee03217f0f475d9ac66b289f935062&_e=3yLFR3qlp63MfAuzajBtniokPm0mZeyLKj9vy_LcCjGSR1CTkU-uue3_xF-nRPV64FnkIeDn5Idw49D3ATi3Ryqx2vVbaBBkoMoMOAZ2vbsV6D-esc87WPXdByHZ3SzE-ge5XmkeEvwhWKsvrGOMZqTqnk1_TiQbcQw-5LqP4CGvcxkwe8WnfthEnlXhKEawL1ylI9VwpAfAw-iZrfbU1XwIkMAnxBZhnXzKBgyGIcrJ6K0HMcfsQc0V7psL-WDPjmsQuwVpowkT423XgtyKNYVoOuH94Q5dwQ2MmZxoEfmAzQ1Ll7yXUKjID9aGP-0y7HH0pa512M9qBKMKZhBLq4veuVsA9sVkvCskHTKfkj0zuPmT1xPRNOerpzLU2kB2k2n6Nve0coQKKvC0LHlbaul3HhkZRZRKdIdXxtQAXXX3h3RXFkzFM9yPu5wYL3_PtNo9sSeTaKNidgwK_oGKAvsZbmfChoyt7P5GW0jqfc0jV30uekG-eRV68-QFblvc)_ Thank you, Andrew Garbarino \---------- forwarded message below ---------- **From:** Border Alerts (Team Garbarino) **Date:** Tues.
