name: American Update
subject: Help us fight socialism
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8747%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=V%2baPqHosnQgmjamsY3bmjw&sysid=1)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04335%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rFbCHNs9ms33x04w%2fX6TmQ&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans--views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04336%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2OHhJfK1fdkrY9SRokocFQ&sysid=1)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive--and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c04337%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xC%2b48R9ySgE3%2fAYDJrFfng&sysid=1)
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8747%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=V%2baPqHosnQgmjamsY3bmjw&sysid=1)_

|

[**It would mean so much to me if you read the whole thing and considered donating $3 toward our $20,000 end-of-quarter fundraising goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36708939/308943513/2130246724?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20210929_EMDF_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODAyZWY5Ny03MDIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxYNiuWZa2-kxrIzAEY2TyxwiC5vrB_MtMhlOtJhS1U=) | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36708948/308943521/2130246724?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20210929_EMDF_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODAyZWY5Ny03MDIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxYNiuWZa2-kxrIzAEY2TyxwiC5vrB_MtMhlOtJhS1U=)
---
I am a Virginian, born and raised.

**And I uniquely understand the struggles of so many working families in our state — because I’ve lived them.**

Growing up, my immigrant family struggled to make ends meet.

And when I was pregnant, my job didn’t offer health insurance. When my son had health complications, Medicaid saved our lives.

From then on, I built my cybersecurity career while being a single mom.

I’m proud of where I came from, and I was so proud to bring a voice to Virginia’s 51st District as their Delegate since 2017.

**And as your Lt. Governor, I’m committed to celebrating Virginia’s growing diversity and supporting Virginians of all backgrounds.**

The hard-working people of Virginia deserve a Lt. Governor who understands their struggles, and works side by side with them to lift them up.

[**I can’t wait to do this together, Peter! But this won’t be possible if we fall short on Election Day this November. So I’m personally asking: Will you chip in $3 today to my campaign? clean_body: It would mean so much to me if you read the whole thing. | = Hi there, Peter: I’m going to ask you to chip in $3 at the end of this long email. = | = I am a Virginian, born and raised. And I uniquely understand the struggles of so many working families in our state — because I’ve lived them. Growing up, my immigrant family struggled to make ends meet. And when I was pregnant, my job didn’t offer health insurance. When my son had health complications, Medicaid saved our lives. From then on, I built my cybersecurity career while being a single mom. I’m proud of where I came from, and I was so proud to bring a voice to Virginia’s 51st District as their Delegate since 2017. And as your Lt. Governor, I’m committed to celebrating Virginia’s growing diversity and supporting Virginians of all backgrounds. The hard-working people of Virginia deserve a Lt. Governor who understands their struggles, and works side by side with them to lift them up. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Grateful for your support, Peter. = Hala Ayala Democratic Nominee for Virginia Lt. Hello Friend,

I'm writing to you today to ask you to join me in supporting my friend and colleague, Kirsten Engel, by **[making a crucial contribution before tomorrow's deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36708928/308943497/558373307?refcode=X_092921_EOQ_I&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTAyZWY5Ny03MDIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SJ6qHBKcZj8U96bYl3cOu4e1YZgijFQIxev6FSD7FNs=)**

I’ve served with both Randy Friese and Kirsten Engel. I thought we'd be in very capable hands with either of them as our Democratic nominee. Ultimately, I decided to support Randy, but now that he's withdrawn from the race, **I'm proud to support Kirsten.**

**I’ve seen firsthand how much Kirsten cares about issues important to Southern Arizonans, like fighting climate change and building an economy that works for everyone.** And I also know that she’s a fighter to her core. That’s probably why she’s never lost a race. We need that experience... that fight, to ensure this seat remains blue.

So, I'm asking all my fellow Friese backers to join me in putting all our support behind Kirsten. Send this email to a friend, follow Kirsten on Twitter, Instagram, and Facebook, and most importantly, **make a contribution today before this critical deadline.**

We need Kirsten Engel in Congress. **[I hope you will join me in supporting her with a contribution today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36708929/308943501/558373307?refcode=X_092921_EOQ_I&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTAyZWY5Ny03MDIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SJ6qHBKcZj8U96bYl3cOu4e1YZgijFQIxev6FSD7FNs=)**

Thank you,
State Sen. Rosanna Gabaldón

name: Sen. Tom Cotton
subject: Updates from Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress
body:
It’s game time.

| [](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=47f368e2db8d454e9418139ee1259b36&_e=Z-oA1rmtGB40YrVTaK-h5hI5CmV4Kafa0rwbz6q4MFBehh1NXwT5NL5X6YcmZLS9mrykfXK2qn1sGuF76ghSBVSeRxcF677GcMPsXAUy5mQ-p5nd2G1mcI8Ck6GlvOY5zKuZyde3rtDURqu3WmyKqOXQspCzbaAPMyV_D0rbdN8AKh4jbB57pXpbKLCJnjuSEAGUDqtXj9ueXLtoTueCXzN9SRoYJImpA6aDuUmgXMZ2yW-e-fOPLjNTIj2IAZv32H_AFCWOxAXxq4djgs2aaptU6_vNCkfThK_c6C-HuTf_lfktmZPzga15xfnk5JpCWx6v7Y8MLexVaWzOC9vwTtJ7Ob-S-zd-ZEXZkbc2uqqYizSNt9yOlfKwgGKcmC-RUBh1AaUzQfSdX4-OdyeqOTJ08MTQ8ce4Ur7n8GJXyS3h1G-2QJDX1vXAhfMS_dG20dfquQ7Nf4tHL0VBJ7GFiKmKywO-51ce9ZVqvNatyvOxYTUuLswVlt6Rt_64pbtg_goyqndIXNTLPEYffPFcOdkP3-sVLNJzkZymOGwN7g4%3D)
---
Friend,

Tom Cotton here. I was just in Iowa with Congresswoman Mariannette Miller-Meeks for her Inaugural Tailgate Celebration. It was a great event, and it’s more important than ever before that patriots like you stand strong with us to defend this seat.

Mariannette’s race was the closest in the country last year. She won by just six votes, and she needs all of us to step up and help her win again.

Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats are doubling down. They know that if they defeat Mariannette, odds are they keep the U.S. House. **We have to fight back harder than ever before — can we count on you to step up right now?**
| [**STEP UP NOW**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=47f368e2db8d454e9418139ee1259b36&_e=Z-oA1rmtGB40YrVTaK-h5hI5CmV4Kafa0rwbz6q4MFBehh1NXwT5NL5X6YcmZLS9mrykfXK2qn1sGuF76ghSBVSeRxcF677GcMPsXAUy5mQ-p5nd2G1mcI8Ck6GlvOY5zKuZyde3rtDURqu3WmyKqOXQspCzbaAPMyV_D0rbdN8AKh4jbB57pXpbKLCJnjuSEAGUDqtXj9ueXLtoTueCXzN9SRoYJImpA6aDuUmgXMZ2yW-e-fOPLjNTIj2IAZv32H_AFCWOxAXxq4djgs2aaptU6_vNCkfThK_c6C-HuTf_lfktmZPzga15xfnk5JpCWx6v7Y8MLexVaWzOC9vwThI4F9VOQGhhoT7RF92c0fdDUYvPF2DkxcK5r7OoOhUbykb4otHvx_Wkf1vdZblcg410q811N4ekPASJ1S-_hvLhnilvqQXyn2CrEeOFllhTDLC8x2HKGMBZmbwbPTMhzyk6wbqgQ_zSUfUygcg8gW6ROt6H2RTJk2VtHoOo8fn9ZHE1UVwGzN1kQfzcw5-y59y9s_5qHUpuyVKdTSPDFQQ%3D)
---

Pelosi’s handpicked candidate, Christina Bohannan, is going to do whatever it takes to defeat Mariannette. We **_must not_** allow that to happen. With your help, we can fire Nancy Pelosi, win back the House, and keep this seat red.
[**STOP THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=47f368e2db8d454e9418139ee1259b36&_e=Z-oA1rmtGB40YrVTaK-h5hI5CmV4Kafa0rwbz6q4MFBehh1NXwT5NL5X6YcmZLS9mrykfXK2qn1sGuF76ghSBVSeRxcF677GcMPsXAUy5mQ-p5nd2G1mcI8Ck6GlvOY5zKuZyde3rtDURqu3WmyKqOXQspCzbaAPMyV_D0rbdN8AKh4jbB57pXpbKLCJnjuSEAGUDqtXj9ueXLtoTueCXzN9SRoYJImpA6aDuUmgXMZ2yW-e-fOPLjNTIj2IAZv32H_AFCWOxAXxq4djgs2aaptU6_vNCkfThK_c6C-HuTf_lfktmZPzga15xfnk5JpCWx6v7Y8MLexVaWzOC9vwTso8k6CSHP1TFeC3y3mRVkeDJccWJJtAXZVkvFwdKfcG8tXQrPCmQ8cbh-TvKWUZQ9BGRNmDlOYTeiDt9jgXR_btxALtmFwW5rc3rYTWeVtYfUjvybCRRHkfZGmYceD-a9ryH916k-YHzuCkncYyTt010vsLNdAxC_P3bF6Clfvqq68ryN3Rbp10uUwoMCUXxGBn1jLji_cloRL9ew7ZQjk%3D)

body:

Friend,

Doug Collins here, reaching out with an urgent request for my friend, Gary Black.

Gary is Georgia’s Agriculture Commissioner. I’ve known him for many years, and I KNOW he’s a true conservative who puts Georgians and Americans first.

Now, Gary’s running for the U.S. Senate in Georgia against Raphael Warnock, the most radical senator in the country. The end of this month marks the end of the fundraising quarter, and for Gary to win, he MUST raise as much as possible before this crucial deadline.

Can I count on you to stand with Gary and me? Donate whatever you can RIGHT NOW. http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66706%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cUbuwoV4ILekKZhugb%2fOwQ&sysid=1

Gary Black knows how to win in Georgia. He’s done it before, and he will do it again. He’s the ONLY Republican who can defeat Raphael Warnock and, with it, restore the Republican Senate majority.

Raphael Warnock wants to undo everything we accomplished under President Trump.

Warnock wants to nationalize our elections and weaken voter ID. He didn’t say a word when Joe Biden left Americans stranded in Afghanistan. And he fully supports Biden’s agenda of higher taxes, record spending, and OPEN BORDERS.

To defeat Warnock, we must support the Republican who can win, who has the experience to do the job, and who will make conservatives proud.

I don’t care who else is running I’m supporting Gary Black. He’ll put Georgians and Americans first, champion our values, and end the nightmare that is Democrats running the U.S. Senate.

Can Gary and I count on you to help us take America back? Too much is at stake for you to sit on the sidelines, Friend.

name: Nancy Takano (Mark's mom)
subject: My son was outed as gay by his opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
I need you to know this story.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36710641/308949289/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjQwZjAxMS03NTIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKiO8LtzFA2adX-0USG7diyZPPiejJ75fNa-uYgtrto=)
---
Hi Peter,

It’s Nancy Takano again -- Mark's mom! I hope you don’t mind me reaching out, I just wanted to tell you something really important about Mark’s campaign.

I remember when Mark first ran for Congress. It was really hard for a lot of deeply personal reasons...

**Most people aren't aware of this, but his Republican opponent ran ads and sent mail that outed Mark as gay during the campaign before he had even come out publicly. He ended up losing that ultra-competitive race by just 519 votes.**

As a mother, I was furious and heartbroken for my son, whom I love unconditionally.

But I was so proud that Mark didn’t let bigoted attacks stop him -- he kept going. I’m not really surprised though -- our family has been through a lot and we’ve always persevered.

In fact, when I was young, my family and I were forced from our homes and unjustly interned in Japanese American internment camp. We lost everything and had to start over.

But now, we’re a family who is living the American Dream. And my son, Mark, after 20 years of teaching, did in the end become a U.S. Congressman.

Peter, I’m proud to live in this country -- but the current MAGA Republicans attacking Mark want us to go back to a time of bigotry just like the kind Mark faced in his first campaign, and racism just like the kind that put me and my family in a Japanese American internment camp.

I know you're probably getting a lot of emails, but I hope you'll do me a favor now:

Mark tells me that his campaign has a huge end-of-quarter fundraising deadline tomorrow -- it's required by law -- and they still need to raise $2,542!

[**But together, we can stand up and fight back against their hateful agenda. I'm so proud of my son and I know he's fighting so hard for working families and for progressive policies in Congress. So now, as Mark's mom, I'm asking: Can I count on you to join our fight by chipping in $3 to support Mark’s campaign? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36710642/308949290/446234574?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20210929_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjQwZjAxMS03NTIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKiO8LtzFA2adX-0USG7diyZPPiejJ75fNa-uYgtrto=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36710648/308949296/446234574?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20210929_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjQwZjAxMS03NTIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKiO8LtzFA2adX-0USG7diyZPPiejJ75fNa-uYgtrto=)

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. clean_body: I need you to know this story. | = Hi Peter, It’s Nancy Takano again -- Mark's mom! I hope you don’t mind me reaching out, I just wanted to tell you something really important about Mark’s campaign. I remember when Mark first ran for Congress. It was really hard for a lot of deeply personal reasons... Most people aren't aware of this, but his Republican opponent ran ads and sent mail that outed Mark as gay during the campaign before he had even come out publicly. He ended up losing that ultra-competitive race by just 519 votes. As a mother, I was furious and heartbroken for my son, whom I love unconditionally. But I was so proud that Mark didn’t let bigoted attacks stop him -- he kept going. I’m not really surprised though -- our family has been through a lot and we’ve always persevered. In fact, when I was young, my family and I were forced from our homes and unjustly interned in Japanese American internment camp. We lost everything and had to start over. But now, we’re a family who is living the American Dream. And my son, Mark, after 20 years of teaching, did in the end become a U.S. Congressman. Peter, I’m proud to live in this country -- but the current MAGA Republicans attacking Mark want us to go back to a time of bigotry just like the kind Mark faced in his first campaign, and racism just like the kind that put me and my family in a Japanese American internment camp. I know you're probably getting a lot of emails, but I hope you'll do me a favor now: Mark tells me that his campaign has a huge end-of-quarter fundraising deadline tomorrow -- it's required by law -- and they still need to raise $2,542! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you for everything. Sincerely, Nancy Takano Mark’s Mom = | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, our Democratic House Majority is seriously at risk. name: Laura Loomer
subject: I have a book for you!
body:
I'm so excited!

I just received an advance shipment of my FIRST book
| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/UA3NiyCZEVfCwDL5Trjv7Q/k8pZHtVm34jfrmmjQlT2ig) | Patriot,

I'm so excited!

I just received an advance shipment of my FIRST book: _LOOMERED: How I Became The Most Banned Woman In The World_.

The book won't be released until October 19th, **but I made sure the publisher sent me a few first prints to share with my supporters** before the book is sold to the public.

[**Get your SIGNED copy here.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/UA3NiyCZEVfCwDL5Trjv7Q/k8pZHtVm34jfrmmjQlT2ig)

It took me over a year and a half to write my book.

Any spare hour I had at night, I sat down to tell my personal story of how I ended up being the poster child of Cancel Culture - **and what I 'm doing about it so that it doesn't happen to you**.

If you [**support my work today with a donation of $50 or more**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/UA3NiyCZEVfCwDL5Trjv7Q/k8pZHtVm34jfrmmjQlT2ig), I'll be happy to send you a signed copy of my book before it's available to the public.

Once you get it, please let me know what you think, and if you're inclined, please leave a good review on Amazon before the Leftist trolls beat you to it . . . **or before Amazon bans it!**

Thanks so much for your ongoing support.

Warm Regards,

Laura Loomer

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | I know there’s a lot going on right now, so I really appreciate you taking the time to read my email. I’m emailing you because my husband, Dr. Raul Ruiz, needs your help. When my husband first became an emergency room physician, he took an oath to I know that Raul ran for Congress for the very same reason. I see it every day in the way he fights for vulnerable Americans during this health crisis. | | | | | | I know he hates to ask you for money, but the truth is, he can’t win reelection on his own. He needs your support to keep fighting to make this country a better place for us all. So can you do me a favor and chip in whatever you can afford to help my husband win? | Sincerely, Monica Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. name: Karen Bass
subject: How a $5 donation helps us win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022
body:
It's been a whirlwind since I announced my candidacy for Mayor of Los Angeles.

To everyone who sent a tweet, chipped in $5, or just said something kind: Thank you! Your support fuels this campaign, and I can't wait to travel to every corner of Los Angeles to hear what you want your next mayor to fight for in City Hall.

This is a grassroots campaign, and if we're going to win, I'll need support from people just like you, friend.

Thanks to LA's matching funds program, contributions up to $214 from residents are generally matched 6-1 by the city. That means a $5 contribution could become $35, or $50 could become $350. Every little bit goes a long way.

**[Our movement is powered by the people, so no single donation is too small. Will you chip in to help power this campaign?](https://act.myngp.com/el/avMrau0P3owKm_O16pNK38Ie8OE5h3PqTx0pRFv_3jI=/hYNYZCbQ_cg5uc2yLcxEX7c7eNkPxcwAbzcS3zJfG7w=?ms=em21_210929_lnch3_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&source=em21_210929_lnch3_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210929_lnch3_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 777 S Figueroa St STE 4050 Los Angeles, CA 90017 United States Additional information is available at =. = | = | = ---|---|--- We rely on this email to communicate with this grassroots team, but if you no longer want to receive our emails, please =.

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Your name on our list of Q3 donors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
With only 48 hours to go until our end of Q3 FEC fundraising deadline, here’s an update on our record of support for our campaign to elect John to the U.S. Senate.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210929-2825-header&t=1&akid=2825%2E434096%2EfhRyXG)
We’ve got under 48 hours to go, Peter, before our end of Q3 FEC fundraising deadline, our *biggest* deadline of the campaign thus far.
The simple truth is this, Peter: **Our opponents are looking at this deadline as a demonstration of the strength of our campaign.** The more donors that we have in the door by midnight tomorrow, the more that we can prove once more that John is the only candidate who can win statewide.
**[Ahead of tomorrow's deadline, I’ve taken a look at your supporter record. According to our data, you've never chipped in to John Fetterman's campaign to fight for us in the U.S. Senate — but there's never been a better opportunity to chip in than right now, with just a day before this crucial deadline.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32277?refcode=em20210929-2825&t=2&akid=2825%2E434096%2EfhRyXG)**
So what do you say, Peter? Can you make your first $5 donation to our campaign before midnight tomorrow? 👇
**_Peter's Official Team Fetterman Record_** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **2021 Donor:** No — not yet! **2021 Total:** $0.00 **Suggested Donation: $5** **[Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32277?refcode=em20210929-2825&t=3&akid=2825%2E434096%2EfhRyXG)**
---
At the very end of this month tomorrow, John is required by federal law to publicly report exactly how much we’ve raised this quarter to the FEC.
The reality is that, if we want to continue being *the* winning grassroots campaign in a crowded race for the #1 Most Likely to Flip Senate seat of 2022, then we MUST raise as much money as possible before tomorrow at midnight.
**[All eyes will be on our campaign — and I can’t tell you how grateful we would be if you would consider making *today* the day that you make your first $5 donation to elect John to the U.S. Senate.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32277?refcode=em20210929-2825&t=4&akid=2825%2E434096%2EfhRyXG)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32277?refcode=em20210929-2825&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2825%2E434096%2EfhRyXG)**
Thank you so much!
Eric 💙
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210929-2825-footer&t=24&refcode2=2825_434096_fhRyXG&akid=2825%2E434096%2EfhRyXG)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=2825%2E434096%2EfhRyXG)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2825%2E434096%2EfhRyXG)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Bernie says hold the line
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Conservative Democrats and corporate lobbyists are trying to BLOCK all
progressive policies. Joe Manchin, Kyrsten Sinema, Henry Cuellar, Wall
Street, Big Pharma, Big Tech, Big Oil...the list goes on — they all have
one thing in common: They don’t want Democrats to expand Medicare, address
climate change, increase corporate tax rates, and provide universal pre-K
and community college.

Justice Democrats and Bernie Sanders are holding the line. They won’t let
conservatives pass their Republican-backed infrastructure bill UNLESS the
$3.5 trillion spending bill is passed along with it. Alexandria
Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush, Rashida Tlaib, Bernie Sanders, and others are
using their power to win progressive priorities. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/71855?refcode=em20210929-19772&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=19772%2E1203867%2Ebic5cl ]If you’re down to hold
the line with us and want to elect more Justice Democrats to win
progressive policies, donate right now to fuel our fight.

Here’s Bernie not mincing words:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/71855?refcode=em20210929-19772&t=1003&akid=19772%2E1203867%2Ebic5cl ]Tweet from Senator Bernie Sanders yesterday at 3 p.m. that reads I
strongly urge my House colleagues to vote against the bipartisan
infrastructure bill until Congress passes a strong reconciliation bill.

What did Ilhan Omar have to say about progressive power? “We aren’t
bluffing.”

AOC? "Nothing would give me more pleasure than to tank a billionaire, dark
money, fossil fuel, Exxon lobbyist-drafted 'energy' infrastructure bill if
they come after our child care and climate priorities."

Justice Democrats are holding the line. But we can only support the Squad
and elect more Justice Democrats to Congress with your
help, Peter.
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/71855?refcode=em20210929-19772&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=19772%2E1203867%2Ebic5cl ]Rush your
first $3 donation to Justice Democrats
right now to back the Squad, hold the line, and expand progressive power
in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/71855?refcode=em20210929-19772&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=19772%2E1203867%2Ebic5cl ]Contribute

We can make real progress in this country, but only together.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=19772%2E1203867%2Ebic5cl ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=19772%2E1203867%2Ebic5cl ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20210929-19772-footer&t=1026&refcode2=19772_1203867_bic5cl&akid=19772%2E1203867%2Ebic5cl

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=19772%2E1203867%2Ebic5cl

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Mark Herring
subject: What this election is all about
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ONE COMMONWEALTH PAC
body:
This election is starting to feel like one of the most important ones Virginia will ever face. After electing Democrats, standing up to Donald Trump and making so much progress, now we are at risk of losing it all if Republicans defeat us this November. I hate to say it, but it’s the truth.
Friends,
This election is starting to feel like one of the most important ones Virginia will ever face. After electing Democrats, standing up to Donald Trump and making so much progress, now we are at risk of losing it all if Republicans defeat us this November. I hate to say it, but it’s the truth.
I know we won’t go back! We’re going to get out there, get out the vote for Terry, Hala and me, and show that we are standing true to our values that define our Commonwealth. Equality. Justice. Opportunity for all Americans. An Attorney General who will protect our rights and keep us safe, rather than a dangerous Republican who won’t.
That’s what this election is all about. And that’s why I need your support.
We’re facing the most critical fundraising deadline of this campaign, and maybe of my entire career considering how close the polls are looking in this race. We’re about to send in our next fundraising report against our Republican opponent and we need to show the strength of our campaign - not only with how much we raised in this final fundraising period, but more importantly, how many supporters like you chip in just because you believe in Virginia and you believe in what we can accomplish if we win this race together.
We’re falling short of our fundraising goal right now so I’m dropping a personal ActBlue link for you to contribute below. I'd so appreciate it if you could help us out today.
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/MHVA-AG-Email-Sept2021-FR-EOQ?refcode=Personal**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36711732/308952065/222984159?refcode=E11569-20210929-EOQ1-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjJlYTY5MS03ODIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jdZedLVu2t1nXSNspDxGeJ-v8Mxf8s3ehx_SxKl-jOA=)
Thank you so much for all of your support,
Mark Herring

body:

| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem and I am writing you today with an urgent request. We are at the end of the FEC fundraising quarter and the deadline is upon us.

[**We need to raise an additional $19,200 to reach our fundraising goal. Can you help?**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4127d7dca3&e=44b8c466b0)

In light of new information as a result of the devastating Maricopa Audit results, we are redoubling our efforts to make sure that Arizona’s elections are safe and secure for future elections.

| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7368c92621&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _But the media is doing everything it can to squash the results. What I am writing you about you will not hear from anyone else. They are deliberately misleading the American public by ignoring patriots like me and Senator Wendy Rogers who are on the ground here in Arizona every day._

**So we are not just fighting the Radical Left who stole the election from us in the dead of night. We are fighting against the main stream media and social media which are doing everything in their power to hide the results of this audit from the American public.**

[**_And this is where you come in._**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=20c548ea42&e=44b8c466b0)

We are moving forward with aggressive campaigning specifically designed to expand our grassroots movement, and gain support for the #Decertify movement.

_This is the only way to recall the electors. The American people need to speak up._

[**Every $10 you donate today can help us reach 100 people with the message of Election Integrity. With $100 you could help us reach 1000 people, and with $1,000 you can help us reach 10,000 people.**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5615a8a05f&e=44b8c466b0)

[_Can you help our campaign today with a donation of $10, $25, $100, $500, or $1,000 today? Your donation today has MAXIMUM impact on the election integrity of tomorrow._](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c5b850c9a7&e=44b8c466b0)

I have been reeling from the results of the Maricopa Audit. I have been disgusted, incensed, and enflamed by the results – and I have but one goal.

**Make sure this NEVER happens again. Are you with me? [Can you help me?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3c85f22167&e=44b8c466b0)**

_The Democrats win when angry Americans stay silent and do nothing. Will you help me turn this country around?_

[**We need to raise $19,200 by tomorrow night or the campaign for election integrity will be in big trouble.**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=423489c3e1&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---

Conservative

Peter,

Another outside spending group has launched an ad campaign targeting Abigail. They know how close her races were in 2018 and 2020, so they're spending money early in this race to try to turn the tide in 2022 and flip this seat.

We need to stand up to these outside groups and **show them that the Spanberger campaign is stronger than ever.** The FEC end-of-quarter deadline is tomorrow, and we need to release fundraising figures that project our strength.

Last election cycle, **outside groups spent over $15,000,000 -- yes, $15 million -- in Virginia's 7th District.** The fact that multiple ad campaigns target Abigail over a year before the 2022 election suggests that spending this cycle might be even higher.

We need the resources to get Abigail's positive message out to voters across Central Virginia. Instead of hearing distortions from the outside groups running ads about Abigail, voters need to know that Abigail is an advocate for her community and will work tirelessly to lower prescription drug prices, expand rural broadband, and invest in our schools.

| | It's the end of Quarter 3, which means we've been building this campaign for 9+ months, now, and it is amazing how much we've grown. This summer was enormous for us, we travelled across the entire state, from Pensacola to Miami, and even made it up to D.C. for the March for Medicare for All. Florida is an amazingly diverse state, but the one thing that remains constant everywhere we go is the response to our message, progressive policies are popular and people want their government to work for them. Republicans and Democrats alike keep openly telling me that Marco Rubio doesn't work for them, it isn't a secret. To those of you who we've met along the way, and have already become a supporter, I cannot thank you enough. If you're still getting familiar with the campaign, you can check us out at [www.JoshWeil.org](https://www.joshweil.org/so/ecNmorTcY/c?w=igDmmqvehNo0NLbk8ismZAQ-_oWP9qLK42qBZ98KIyY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuSm9zaFdlaWwub3JnIiwiciI6ImY1NGZlOWViLWFiMTctNGMyNC1hNWJmLWU1YWUyNzFhNWY1ZiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6Ijg5ZmI1NTQ5LTQ5MzQtNGM0OS1iZDRmLTRhZWEyZTg2MzgxNiJ9), and find us across social media at all of the links included at the bottom of this email. I am the Progressive Democrat running to #RetireRubio and represent the Great State of Florida. Every 90 days, every political candidate makes their last big push for money before the End-of-Quarter filing deadline. It's super important because these numbers are one of the factors many groups take into consideration when deciding which candidates to endorse. And it's not just about the money, it's the people. Your contribution shows you support our progressive platform, and that there is power behind this movement. I am asking now for your support, to be the candidate you stand behind over the next 13 and 1/2 months, and to become the one and only United States Senator from Florida who is actually working for you, the people. As little as $2 shows that you are tired of having corporate candidates dictate the platform, and bully their way through a primary with money from millionaires and corporate donors. There is a link below that will take you to our ActBlue page, please, donate today. Together, we can win! -Josh

clean_body: Wednesday, September 29, 2021 | It's the end of Quarter 3, which means we've been building this campaign for 9+ months, now, and it is amazi | | Can't see this message? | | | | | Josh Weil - Democrat for U.S. Senate (FL) | | | | Wednesday, September 29, 2021 | | | It's the end of Quarter 3, which means we've been building this campaign for 9+ months, now, and it is amazing how much we've grown. This summer was enormous for us, we travelled across the entire state, from Pensacola to Miami, and even made it up to D.C. for the March for Medicare for All. Florida is an amazingly diverse state, but the one thing that remains constant everywhere we go is the response to our message, progressive policies are popular and people want their government to work for them. Republicans and Democrats alike keep openly telling me that Marco Rubio doesn't work for them, it isn't a secret. To those of you who we've met along the way, and have already become a supporter, I cannot thank you enough. If you're still getting familiar with the campaign, you can check us out at , and find us across social media at all of the links included at the bottom of this email. I am the Progressive Democrat running to #RetireRubio and represent the Great State of Florida. Every 90 days, every political candidate makes their last big push for money before the End-of-Quarter filing deadline. It's super important because these numbers are one of the factors many groups take into consideration when deciding which candidates to endorse. And it's not just about the money, it's the people. Your contribution shows you support our progressive platform, and that there is power behind this movement. I am asking now for your support, to be the candidate you stand behind over the next 13 and 1/2 months, and to become the one and only United States Senator from Florida who is actually working for you, the people. As little as $2 shows that you are tired of having corporate candidates dictate the platform, and bully their way through a primary with money from millionaires and corporate donors. There is a link below that will take you to our ActBlue page, please, donate today. Together, we can win! -Josh | | | | | | | | Follow Us | | | | | | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . Friend, this isn't even just about Trump. The opponent he endorsed, Kari Lake (R), is extreme enough on her own. Arizona is next." _She's anti-abortion, anti-vaccine, supports building Trump's asinine border wall and refuses to accept that the 2020 election was legitimate.
**In short, she's everything Arizona needs LESS of, NOT more. But this Trump endorsement will open the floodgates to GOP dark money and attack ads – so if we don't hit our end-of-quarter goal and build the resources we need to fight back, she could actually win this TOSS-UP race and drive Arizona into the dark ages.**

name: Alex
subject: Campaign updates - Hitting the ground running!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ortega For Congress
body:
The People of CA-46 are demanding change. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36713982/308958222/1834523205?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDBkNTYwNC03ZTIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ex7VcYAovqMIC2Pa6rxSSU9l4xEGaymDpd_2VhenErs=) **Hitting The Ground Running
** A strong start for the people of Anaheim, Orange, and Santa Ana looking ahead to 2022. Friend, My wife and I are still in awe of our little baby Max. We've got a little rhythm going now - so I've begun to have more time between feeding, getting no sleep, and - well, getting no sleep. I've attended rallies to march with the youth-led movement for Climate Justice - and met with Latino grassroots organizations here in OC. The takeaway is clear - the incumbent, Lou Correa, does not represent the values, let alone the urgency of our district. Our people are fighting on the ground - and those efforts are being cut off by our elected Representative to Congress. That's where we come in. We're building a movement that aims to include our communities' grassroots organizations, leaders, and activists. Our campaign's #1 goal is to be a transmission from that level all the way to D.C. Because the change we need _there_ starts _here. _ But our efforts could use a boost. We're not taking any Corporate PAC money, while our opponent raises the lion's share of his funding from pharmaceutical corporations. And that's who he fights for. He's been fighting to weaken provisions in a bill to make prescription drugs more affordable. People die from the greed of these corporations - and our people know he's on the wrong side. It's been shown that [91% of our district supports the bill](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36713984/308958224/1898539911?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDBkNTYwNC03ZTIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ex7VcYAovqMIC2Pa6rxSSU9l4xEGaymDpd_2VhenErs=&emci=354e7d4d-5621-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=ed0d5604-7e21-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=12523946) \- so why does our Representative fight for corporations [that are running ads in his favor right now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36713985/308958225/1116185716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDBkNTYwNC03ZTIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ex7VcYAovqMIC2Pa6rxSSU9l4xEGaymDpd_2VhenErs=&emci=354e7d4d-5621-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=ed0d5604-7e21-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=12523946) ? It's clearly abhorrent. So we're asking you to chip in what you can - it's not our first _full_ quarter, but tomorrow night (Sept. 30) is the end of the Federal Election Commission's official quarter. We need to show Lou that the people are on **our** side. He may have huge donations from Corporate PACs, but our people-powered campaign will win. clean_body: The People of CA-46 are demanding change. = Hitting The Ground Running A strong start for the people of Anaheim, Orange, and Santa Ana looking ahead to 2022. Friend, My wife and I are still in awe of our little baby Max. We've got a little rhythm going now - so I've begun to have more time between feeding, getting no sleep, and - well, getting no sleep. I've attended rallies to march with the youth-led movement for Climate Justice - and met with Latino grassroots organizations here in OC. The takeaway is clear - the incumbent, Lou Correa, does not represent the values, let alone the urgency of our district. Our people are fighting on the ground - and those efforts are being cut off by our elected Representative to Congress. That's where we come in. We're building a movement that aims to include our communities' grassroots organizations, leaders, and activists. Our campaign's #1 goal is to be a transmission from that level all the way to D.C. Because the change we need there starts here. But our efforts could use a boost. We're not taking any Corporate PAC money, while our opponent raises the lion's share of his funding from pharmaceutical corporations. And that's who he fights for. He's been fighting to weaken provisions in a bill to make prescription drugs more affordable. People die from the greed of these corporations - and our people know he's on the wrong side. It's been shown that \- so why does our Representative fight for corporations ? It's clearly abhorrent. So we're asking you to chip in what you can - it's not our first full quarter, but tomorrow night (Sept. 30) is the end of the Federal Election Commission's official quarter. We need to show Lou that the people are on our side. He may have huge donations from Corporate PACs, but our people-powered campaign will win. = Yours in solidarity, Mike PS - Subscribe to our social media pages and give us a boost! = | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ortega For Congress Ortega For Congress PO Box 1271 Anaheim, CA 92815 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda is on the line this week, and Sara is working to make sure Congress keeps its commitment to children and families.

Sara is fighting for universal child care and pre-K, paid family leave, and urgent climate action. Most importantly, she is fighting to make the expanded Child Tax Credit permanent — an extraordinary investment that’s already reaching 90% of American kids and helping lift 5 million kids out of poverty _this year_.

[_**Sara’s FEC deadline is tomorrow and we need to show widespread grassroots support for her bold stance on President Biden’s transformative agenda. clean_body: Sara is working to make sure Congress keeps its commitment to children and families. | = | President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda is on the line this week, and Sara is working to make sure Congress keeps its commitment to children and families. Sara is fighting for universal child care and pre-K, paid family leave, and urgent climate action. Most importantly, she is fighting to make the expanded Child Tax Credit permanent — an extraordinary investment that’s already reaching 90% of American kids and helping lift 5 million kids out of poverty this year. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Sara ran for Congress because she believes it’s time for a new generation of leaders to advocate for bold, progressive policies in Washington. That’s exactly why she’s staying strong to get the Build Back Better Act across the finish line alongside the Bipartisan Infrastructure Deal. Both bills are crucially important to our recovery, and we can’t allow kids and families to be left behind. These comprehensive investments are the cornerstone of President Biden’s agenda, and Sara won’t let this opportunity pass us by. = | = In solidarity, Team Sara * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

Friend,

Our first major end-of-quarter deadline hits tomorrow night at 11:59 pm, so before I ask you to **[chip in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36714866/308960814/-686739743?refcode=em-92921-all-2-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWNlYzAxNy04MTIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=faeDfoTkrD0rYME3ljkvk4roS-T8OYpOTGnq-HrRi8M=)** to our campaign, I want to give you a few quick updates. It's important to me that you know what's going on: **• I'm running against GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy.** In the past month, he joked about “hitting” Nancy Pelosi with the gavel, obstructing the investigation into January 6th, and pledged to stop funding for working families over "his dead body."

**• We also got a look into his campaign playbook.** He has a team of people blanketing our community with misleading information about his record, but he's not fooling anyone. No matter what his glossy postcards say, he’s protecting Matt Gaetz and Marjorie Taylor Greene while our Central Valley community suffers.

**• In response, our team is ramping up our grassroots field efforts.** We're hiring bilingual canvassers to make sure everyone in CA-23 knows that I'm the viable Democrat running against him.

It's important to me that you know what's going on: • I'm running against GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. In the past month, he joked about “hitting” Nancy Pelosi with the gavel, obstructing the investigation into January 6th, and pledged to stop funding for working families over "his dead body." • We also got a look into his campaign playbook. He has a team of people blanketing our community with misleading information about his record, but he's not fooling anyone. No matter what his glossy postcards say, he’s protecting Matt Gaetz and Marjorie Taylor Greene while our Central Valley community suffers. • In response, our team is ramping up our grassroots field efforts. We're hiring bilingual canvassers to make sure everyone in CA-23 knows that I'm the viable Democrat running against him. • To fully fund our field operation, we have to hit our $50,000 goal before the end of the week, and unfortunately we're coming up $9,981 short today. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Too much is at stake for our working families, small businesses, and farmers -- and really, the entire country -- to miss the mark on this major goal. Hi friend, it’s Darin.

In less than a year, the Biden administration turned America’s secure southern border into an OPEN BORDER CRISIS.

**And now he has the gall to blame President Trump!**

Let’s recap how Joe Biden got us into this mess:

**❌ Stopped Construction of the Border Wall**
**❌ Revoked Trump’s Suspension of the entry of illegal immigrants during the pandemic**
**❌ Rescinded President Trump’s Remain in Mexico Policy**

**Joe Biden is overseeing the WORST BORDER CRISIS in the history of our country and tries to pass off the blame to his predecessor. **

That’s who Joe Biden has always been: a failed leader that is never accountable and sells out our country for more power.

**We can’t let him winーwe must save our country from Joe Biden!**

clean_body: In less than a year, the Biden administration turned America’s secure southern border into... | | Hi friend, it’s Darin. In less than a year, the Biden administration turned America’s secure southern border into an OPEN BORDER CRISIS. And now he has the gall to blame President Trump! Let’s recap how Joe Biden got us into this mess: ❌ Stopped Construction of the Border Wall ❌ Revoked Trump’s Suspension of the entry of illegal immigrants during the pandemic ❌ Rescinded President Trump’s Remain in Mexico Policy Joe Biden is overseeing the WORST BORDER CRISIS in the history of our country and tries to pass off the blame to his predecessor. That’s who Joe Biden has always been: a failed leader that is never accountable and sells out our country for more power. We can’t let him winーwe must save our country from Joe Biden! Peter, I am _**FURIOUS**_.

Furious for the border patrol agents who are begging Washington for help and getting nothing but denial in response...

Furious for the Texas communities being destroyed by Biden’s Border Crisis...

Furious for the American families whose health and safety have been threatened by liberal elites in Washington who haven’t so much as visited the border...

But mostly I’m furious at Joe Biden for ignoring his job, refusing to answer any questions, and sneaking back into hiding every chance he gets.

**America needs a****LEADER****, not a part-time president!**

As your congressman, I will _**NEVER**_ shy away when things get tough. I promise to roll up my sleeves and deliver _**SOLUTIONS**_ , not excuses.

But before I can do that, I have to defeat another Do-Nothing Democrat: Lucy McBath.

It has been a big month for our campaign between our statewide Freedom Tour and the launch of our first TV ad...now we need to end it on another high note by beating our fundraising goal. But here’s the deal: our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is tomorrow and we haven’t met Sarah’s goal yet, so I need your help to make it happen. name: Erik Aadland
subject: What will it be?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AADLAND for Senate
body:
It all comes down to one simple question. Do you want politicians or solutions?
I know you’re busy, Fellow American, but if you got a couple of minutes to spare, can you watch this video?

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=20bd93c6208141c6a184e3073bde8ef3&_e=yAxiUS-_7z2rWn3Ht5Qnb6tAcTmVviqE3jxlxEdcL934IGBz27xLel1MCoXyMcDHtlv36DoOqJGQThDcHrT7lDFyNtJt5kVvi1rHWW0MnZ4YaAbNctk3lVFN_zdUYgVuzhPHHQBixeFVmVX62TSX_d-RuIZ9f_28PUWjW_zwc8x_bQivDofE1e6WmitLXFp8FaeqZ0Rpma8iQwc1b0BXCvoSf6WmLUp4YuX4R4K3stMEHUFObJOgcrJ8UPoUJxJrciRj4qHXH7aVFJAFwsUmd3HDENu77bDOdSgkRH_1pfOKKmAGFoOWggUmq9HXllajQT8YvMdSVIYWg97Nujb2LsqhnG05pGazwGtACmvTwvCDtleK8NoJraJKfegiVxuFSYeksg3R9hyQeqUJMv3xvwoLp25nu6u8AjzB9DMeDPA%3D)
I know it’s been said before but, combat tours to Iraq and Afghanistan will put things into perspective. When I made it back home after my last deployment, the one thing that stood out to me was how we all have so much that unites versus divides us as Americans.

Despite that, we cannot ignore what’s happening in our country right now. **The radical left we see in America is not only a threat to our finances today, but to our freedoms tomorrow.** They want to distract us from our foundation of freedoms by dividing us. [**We can’t let them win.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=20bd93c6208141c6a184e3073bde8ef3&_e=yAxiUS-_7z2rWn3Ht5Qnb6tAcTmVviqE3jxlxEdcL934IGBz27xLel1MCoXyMcDHtlv36DoOqJGQThDcHrT7lDFyNtJt5kVvi1rHWW0MnZ4YaAbNctk3lVFN_zdUYgVuzhPHHQBixeFVmVX62TSX_d-RuIZ9f_28PUWjW_zwc8x_bQivDofE1e6WmitLXFp8CskAxm6o9Ar6C2MamxWC-5XuX95Mw5GCUjGrLwbIWDKmtCZ0n1BJcyi3gQYNzQUSoiImyln_y0q995qxamVeI6i0xi2L8M_P11dQarqxjIciFuwtB41M5UGvKdEH3kYzFC7z8Hyg_466EBlCxQP8-7RjAMN7jUfsMMtiqdND57ejut2mvQjdXgS47i1_cfLYAk9HnsmrIeGKFoe9pfjH3CCX6mmu2YfRXt6KxfirA_M%3D)

[** PITCH IN TO FLIP THE SENATE AND PROTECT OUR FREEDOMS **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=20bd93c6208141c6a184e3073bde8ef3&_e=yAxiUS-_7z2rWn3Ht5Qnb6tAcTmVviqE3jxlxEdcL934IGBz27xLel1MCoXyMcDHtlv36DoOqJGQThDcHrT7lDFyNtJt5kVvi1rHWW0MnZ4YaAbNctk3lVFN_zdUYgVuzhPHHQBixeFVmVX62TSX_d-RuIZ9f_28PUWjW_zwc8x_bQivDofE1e6WmitLXFp8SqBpuTUvLW1G-HDp73yhJiujiJufMkdj9Sa28jVeFrH8iYXLFN4Qxc2DLeo5_K0fcXrPlYzGH98DSD-PpfBkKszUBHNtdu84CQ4rIlJrM9pVMy3TX-TOZ0QkE5O3mG_XwFK_as3DLSikeU-SdfDwCjVz87s0pNTBIRs-NQ88xdNfyxfpSZ2DxSW8xISWAwKfZkhVws51kYQ4_82xsX4UFnRXHfMa92pppUzvHWYCyR0%3D)
**Even worse than the radical left is the politician that takes the same oath of office that I took in the Army, then ignores the very people they’re supposed to serve.** That’s why more Americans like you are asking the same questions- _“Are they doing everything they can to honor their oath in defense of freedom? Are they doing everything they can to represent our community?”_

**If you’re asking these questions, then you already know the answer.** [**It’s time we start fighting for this one nation under God that we all pledged our allegiance to;**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=20bd93c6208141c6a184e3073bde8ef3&_e=yAxiUS-_7z2rWn3Ht5Qnb6tAcTmVviqE3jxlxEdcL934IGBz27xLel1MCoXyMcDHtlv36DoOqJGQThDcHrT7lDFyNtJt5kVvi1rHWW0MnZ4YaAbNctk3lVFN_zdUYgVuzhPHHQBixeFVmVX62TSX_d-RuIZ9f_28PUWjW_zwc8x_bQivDofE1e6WmitLXFp8uJLYEu9-QkECFZrQoLLPaM5Zi6pQ2zJ029g-ANSoAnCZfKfrWJZPOWwPeGO0mR-Yz93Yt_rP5v-5KECMV7IFVZCsHQcCHkj2ztihhprkG88fnUVOM4Tt6OXVemxeGUnXZddew0ooHSsjBuGWVv7bmjlSL3kVNvpHl6i70IYOu8gs5yrIIPdoTU-nRepqqbcoP4VAUds1a7At7bSkTyipenwMbUPDzbpCvl4PjPl5UR4%3D) **because the very freedoms we take for granted are the same ones that can falter when good people do nothing.**

[**Help prevent that by joining this cause to flip the Senate and defend our freedoms by pitching in any donation that you can.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=20bd93c6208141c6a184e3073bde8ef3&_e=yAxiUS-_7z2rWn3Ht5Qnb6tAcTmVviqE3jxlxEdcL934IGBz27xLel1MCoXyMcDHtlv36DoOqJGQThDcHrT7lDFyNtJt5kVvi1rHWW0MnZ4YaAbNctk3lVFN_zdUYgVuzhPHHQBixeFVmVX62TSX_d-RuIZ9f_28PUWjW_zwc8x_bQivDofE1e6WmitLXFp8GnOwZ7WkRVljK00-BeV2yvY-BzLwvcPI792lYxmOCuJM5btYiqwjjZykd9CPVYZKYV8eMz_LycTj6rgMzV74gaTduuwaV0cq6IabAD0-pRuCF2AHKoMjeJqkA-aeCkAXfv8LbCMK4eF8NtuEDT0UJRuP5VbAHzvs4EmWajSiG7ZgRBIODsZ2cPUfKibly5TjEnnh8Jpcf-w9pCz4I0mWNULIzJuaOHWH6zPmsvmfAQA%3D) Just $10 can make a world of difference in a place like Colorado. Derek, every day I consider how lucky I am to have Zoë in my life.

I wanted to quickly forward her message from earlier, because our end-of-quarter deadline is just over a day away. Every bit of help that our grassroots campaign can get will go a long way.

[_**Can you chip in $5, $10, $25, $50, or any amount?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36715571/308966304/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_210929EOQ2_EOQ_CD_8_G_N_L1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzlhM2NjNC04MjIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BbKS49fz4d4zV-Xtqt5CPAAH99wAsdI3JNQrQFG52Cg=)

I really appreciate it,

Chris

_**\--- Begin Forwarded Message ---**_
> Hi Derek — I'm Zoë. I'd like to tell you a little about my husband Chris, why I'm so excited for him to be the next Congressman from PA-17, and why he needs your help before tomorrow's major fundraising deadline. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36715572/308966307/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_210929EOQ2_EOQ_CD_8_G_N_P1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzlhM2NjNC04MjIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BbKS49fz4d4zV-Xtqt5CPAAH99wAsdI3JNQrQFG52Cg=) Chris and I met in law school nearly a decade ago, and I could never have imagined where we or our country would be today. We've built a family of three amazing young children (plus our adorable pup, Yankee Doodle). Whether it's being a father or using the law to protect people's civil rights, Chris at every turn demonstrates compassion, honesty, and determination. And he never loses sight of what matters the most, for our family and for other families here in western Pennsylvania.
>
> These are the values we need more of in Congress, now more so than ever. No political race is easy — especially for a young family — but I believe strongly in what Chris has to offer western Pennsylvania. **He'll be a fearless advocate for policies that will protect our democracy and transform our economy for the better, and he won't let special interest groups tell him what to do.**
>
> So I'm doing all I can to help this campaign come out of the gate strong. Tomorrow is the first public fundraising deadline since Chris announced his candidacy, and he needs as much support as possible.
>
> [**I know that Chris will be an incredible representative for the people of PA-17. Please donate what you can before tomorrow night to help him win this race — he's just $3,048 away from reaching his goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36715573/308966309/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_210929EOQ2_EOQ_CD_8_G_N_L2&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzlhM2NjNC04MjIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BbKS49fz4d4zV-Xtqt5CPAAH99wAsdI3JNQrQFG52Cg=)
>
> Thank you so much,
>
> Zoë
| | | **Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy.** ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36715574/308966310/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_210929EOQ2_EOQ_CD_8_G_N_BioBox&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzlhM2NjNC04MjIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BbKS49fz4d4zV-Xtqt5CPAAH99wAsdI3JNQrQFG52Cg=)****

clean_body: | | Peter - all eyes are on us. Tomorrow is our important end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, and we're falling short. Here is why we urgently need your support NOW: After this deadline, our fundraising numbers will go public. And this has already been an incredibly tough month - a poll showed us down 7 points against a Republican opponent, we keep getting hit with more GOP attack ads, and the recall election results showed that our district was the top Democratic seat in California in danger of flipping red next year. That's why we need your support to show exceptionally strong fundraising numbers this quarter, with the help of as many individual donations as we can get - because the Republicans will be watching closely to see if they should go all in on taking out Josh. We are only five seats from losing our House majority, so this is a must-win for Democrats and there is no more important race to donate than to our toss-up race here in the Central Valley. Thanks for your support, Team Harder = =

name: Rand Paul
subject: This is how we end Biden’s Presidency
body:
I desperately need more allies in the U.S. Senate willing to join my fight to END all lockdowns, fire Anthony Fauci and the Mask Mafia, and to drain the swamp.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SW7ODpi0f4v6qG_yt3OO05pqVyswWyNAGloyOJZnc3TdyWzkqeuNMme8gFQ0_f4-am4_bWaxbQlSqDrbqn6IaSjhmDKQcoEc7lVNeaPoT0PK3l-u8dtB1ZyYOHtpX4tw8ghjLTm5uj0Z8U6gmJO8kwcB9-d55YDKizGVJ6OE3HFZXXYYRPxH_g==&c=-9rxUvS4iQscs3PtwV4ePk0k7LjChLv48CY0KjiWP0AGtKgM1BZiMA==&ch=Q717uJPXOBiSPfwxn1Qd3BNVRV5kUdpPmJ8NvAA1X4CTgd23XFSRng==)

| Peter,
I desperately need more allies in the U.S. Senate willing to join my fight to END all lockdowns, fire Anthony Fauci and the Mask Mafia, and to drain the swamp.
I am FULLY endorsing my friend Mike Gibbons for Senate in Ohio. He is an America-First champion, constitutional conservative, and is ready to fight side by side with me in the Senate and restore our Republic!
I believe we can end Joe Biden's Presidency by electing Mike Gibbons to the Senate. Here's how:

* By electing a conservative majority in the U.S. Senate, democrats can't pass insane $3.5 TRILLION spending bills.

* Mike Gibbons is fully committed to ending the Mask Mafia, lockdowns, and helping me TERMINATE Anthony Fauci's job.

* Once Mike Gibbons is elected to the U.S. Senate, he can help me hold the Biden administration accountable for their FAILURES in Afghanistan.

The open Ohio Senate seat is Biden's path to victory during the midterm elections. Biden, Pelosi, and Schumer are salivating over winning this seat... Let's elect Mike Gibbons to the U.S. Senate and end Biden's career in Washington!
[Please join me and support Mike Gibbons with a donation of $20.22, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount today:](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SW7ODpi0f4v6qG_yt3OO05pqVyswWyNAGloyOJZnc3TdyWzkqeuNMme8gFQ0_f4-am4_bWaxbQlSqDrbqn6IaSjhmDKQcoEc7lVNeaPoT0PK3l-u8dtB1ZyYOHtpX4tw8ghjLTm5uj0Z8U6gmJO8kwcB9-d55YDKizGVJ6OE3HFZXXYYRPxH_g==&c=-9rxUvS4iQscs3PtwV4ePk0k7LjChLv48CY0KjiWP0AGtKgM1BZiMA==&ch=Q717uJPXOBiSPfwxn1Qd3BNVRV5kUdpPmJ8NvAA1X4CTgd23XFSRng==)

subject: 100% Pro-Choice. Always.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRENT HENNRICH FOR WA**](https://www
body:
When it comes to being "Pro Choice" | I am 100% Pro-Choice. There can be no restrictions or hurdles placed between a person and th
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/2bNmlvThl/c?w=r2TtuVCP0t4vw4JNs8eUkM6O5gEFIuAJiM6y5RsDe7o.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlbnRoZW5ucmljaC5jb20vc28vMmJObWx2VGhsP2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0)_**
---
| | |
---
| | LET'S HEAL WASHINGTON!
---
| |
---
| | When it comes to being "Pro Choice"
---
| | I am 100% Pro-Choice. There can be no restrictions or hurdles placed between a person and their access to care. No one has a right to stand between them and the choices they can make about their own healthcare. This is not a stance I take lightly, it stems from a decision I had to make on behalf of my wife and I. To say that she would not be alive today without unfettered access to that care is the absolute truth, not hyperbole. On October 25th, 2012, my wife lay bleeding on a hospital bed. She was 20 weeks pregnant with our second child, a little girl we would name Addison, and had suffered a placental abruption. The long and short of the tale is she was hemorrhaging blood faster than her dedicated healthcare team could replace it.
---
| | | [**Donate today to help me fight to keep reproductive care legal and safe.**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/2bNmlvThl/c?w=81YFC9aLX-OqD8dkBNmRzTQFbFc9i2QSTge-I7fBFUQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3dhMDM_cmVmY29kZT1wcm9jaG9pY2VlbWFpbCZhbW91bnQ9MjUwIiwiciI6IjZmZDkyOTYwLTA3YzItNDNiOS00YmEzLWM1ZTk1NDU3MzU1OSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)
---
| | I was informed of two options - I could hope and pray for a miracle while my wife and unborn child bled out, or they could induce labor, saving Amber (my wife) and we would be able hold our daughter ( Addison ) as she faded over the next few hours. Time slowed to a crawl, and in that agonizing instant I considered every possibly conceivable outcome. Praying for a “miracle” wasn’t an option while my wife lay at death’s door. The choice was clear. I had to save my wife and we could hold our daughter while she faded. The Supreme Court decided to protect a woman’s right to choose on January 22nd, 1973. (Roe V Wade) Since that adjudication, that decision has been attacke. It has been dissected and challenged time and time again from every conceivable angle. Roe V Wade was not simply a judgment in favor of a person’s right to bodily autonomy. It allows educated healthcare professionals and informed families the option to choose a treatment that aligns with all of the factors they face, in ANY GIVEN HEALTHCARE SITUATION. There is no doubt that the drug (Pitocin) administered to my wife was done in her best interest, and as such saved her life. However, that drug has come under scrutiny in relation to labor induced terminations.Medicine is by far an imperfect science, and it is impossible to foresee every probability. With this ideal in mind, there can be no uncrossable line in the potential care of anyone, in any conceivable situation. No line can be drawn that covers any and all eventualities. No Doctor, no Nurse, no physicians assistant should hold sway over judgement of care at any point. That is why all potential avenues of reproductive care must be accessible and offered at all times to every patient, in any and all situations. EVERY. SINGLE. TIME.
---
| | | [**Donate today to help me fight to keep reproductive care legal and safe.**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/2bNmlvThl/c?w=SUKxOOW8KyiU2In3tnNBvIynGIwUIf4-u5U_nz5qoY4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3dhMDM_cmVmY29kZT1wcm9jaG9pY2VlbWFpbCZhbW91bnQ9MjUwIiwiciI6IjFjNGMwNWQ3LTFkNGEtNGEyMy1lOTNiLWQ1NzQzNmUyMTk0MiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)

clean_body: When it comes to being "Pro Choice" | I am 100% Pro-Choice. There can be no restrictions or hurdles placed between a person and th | | Can't see this message? | | | | | LET'S HEAL WASHINGTON! | | | | When it comes to being "Pro Choice" | | I am 100% Pro-Choice. There can be no restrictions or hurdles placed between a person and their access to care. No one has a right to stand between them and the choices they can make about their own healthcare. This is not a stance I take lightly, it stems from a decision I had to make on behalf of my wife and I. To say that she would not be alive today without unfettered access to that care is the absolute truth, not hyperbole. On October 25th, 2012, my wife lay bleeding on a hospital bed. She was 20 weeks pregnant with our second child, a little girl we would name Addison, and had suffered a placental abruption. The long and short of the tale is she was hemorrhaging blood faster than her dedicated healthcare team could replace it. | | | | | I was informed of two options - I could hope and pray for a miracle while my wife and unborn child bled out, or they could induce labor, saving Amber (my wife) and we would be able hold our daughter ( Addison ) as she faded over the next few hours. Time slowed to a crawl, and in that agonizing instant I considered every possibly conceivable outcome. Praying for a “miracle” wasn’t an option while my wife lay at death’s door. The choice was clear. I had to save my wife and we could hold our daughter while she faded. The Supreme Court decided to protect a woman’s right to choose on January 22nd, 1973. (Roe V Wade) Since that adjudication, that decision has been attacke. It has been dissected and challenged time and time again from every conceivable angle. Roe V Wade was not simply a judgment in favor of a person’s right to bodily autonomy. It allows educated healthcare professionals and informed families the option to choose a treatment that aligns with all of the factors they face, in ANY GIVEN HEALTHCARE SITUATION. There is no doubt that the drug (Pitocin) administered to my wife was done in her best interest, and as such saved her life. However, that drug has come under scrutiny in relation to labor induced terminations.Medicine is by far an imperfect science, and it is impossible to foresee every probability. With this ideal in mind, there can be no uncrossable line in the potential care of anyone, in any conceivable situation. No line can be drawn that covers any and all eventualities. No Doctor, no Nurse, no physicians assistant should hold sway over judgement of care at any point. That is why all potential avenues of reproductive care must be accessible and offered at all times to every patient, in any and all situations. EVERY. SINGLE. TIME. | | | | | | | | Keep up with my campaign! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . If you feel you received it by mistake or wish to unsubscribe, please _.

name: Mark
subject: Never believe what the media says
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri
body:
I’m certainly not a Washington insider – anyone who knows me can vouch for that. And my fundraising number can back up that assertion: I’ve taken no m One of the biggest lies ever told to the American people was when Joe Biden said he wanted to "Unify America".

| [](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=daf1fb80cb00422e9ca9b5ad90b04b80&_e=j3-JKG3yPQVX1xWYf4RF0igXLdpirF9haOJP4bsWG7x0rG_4i1nJzu-G0-BcxAcmEdZH0313ar_SEtrq2IgJGjkc_LEl4dxsgjgVrBGbv0nrpMOUV0_n7pQoXnfGHhYWqciLKLY0taex3-fMZ0MZx4xwWVBPPCPYFpqKW94yF8lwBVaEkdVV0atSwu1Tu7rRstBU1uDGbhOWwqHPelRNW6Fur_1l8sLzv_asOo76GS5f0QWdhCWKhwN6-5rSEOQewE7nCkoUcL5UDhiW1hV17BIPQ4uFngv1-7JU2U-3OfCjeeEoLoPb2nNG_g2N95k7wQuYd2SHNs7AVnos5OyfRHdA8bE5kOwuo-iAXlPsQfO8xL96He2A_ST46WZA6bo1mJgQnRbfXGPlHGgLpB63xbDW60Oeokd1h-Xj6BcZDhpTS0R0VbiGLn74RBcvmJrmSYyNlH4TaALkMSZqngPgPl6-KVHU9_zZoLhVo7uAm7I%3D)
---
Fellow American,

Voters in Missouri are really starting to take notice about my Senate candidacy.

From the day I announced my candidacy in May to today we’ve seen our support grow by leaps and bounds, and finally even the political class is taking notice.

And it’s because I’m not a novice. I’ve been around the block once or twice – I’ve lived a full life and I know what Washington needs – and it’s certainly not another career politician in the United States Senate. People in Missouri – and all across America – over the last several years have shown there is an appetite for ordinary Americans performing the duties of public servants, not career bureaucrats.

I’m certainly not a Washington insider – anyone who knows me can vouch for that. And my fundraising number can back up that assertion: **I’ve taken no money from corporate PACS.**

I’ve been hustling around the state – **doing 12, 14 events daily and accepting small dollar donations when people can spare a few bucks.**

Today, we’re 48 hours away from our September end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, and **[I’m asking you if you can spare a few bucks](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=daf1fb80cb00422e9ca9b5ad90b04b80&_e=j3-JKG3yPQVX1xWYf4RF0igXLdpirF9haOJP4bsWG7x0rG_4i1nJzu-G0-BcxAcmEdZH0313ar_SEtrq2IgJGjkc_LEl4dxsgjgVrBGbv0nrpMOUV0_n7pQoXnfGHhYWqciLKLY0taex3-fMZ0MZx4xwWVBPPCPYFpqKW94yF8lwBVaEkdVV0atSwu1Tu7rRstBU1uDGbhOWwqHPelRNW6Fur_1l8sLzv_asOo76GS5f0QWdhCWKhwN6-5rSEOQeePSOKQ4jdkbHnR3yQJlYeg9A4LvTjlmw3DVsroQnxCpYkPE2U0orF0JmCcUMfpy9DiVcr6eVz69A5ZHHtufoSQeOLtklhd5VQbMueRs7eha1dsfgPvtSgcK2uJwycFPoNudSaRkCSAPltJQFa6OcJeMHjwQk7-UEd1WxdTUfnRN-APxEDWjYA5SxOWrQXLRfsU08TWSqLgOP6zmTJ_dhcg2lip6u6WXWkclortPylFI%3D)**. I know I’ve said this before, but I’ll say it again right now: **the path to the Senate majority runs through Missouri** – and I am one of the only Republicans running who can hold this seat for our party.

[** CLICK HERE TO HELP TAKE BACK THE SENATE **](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=daf1fb80cb00422e9ca9b5ad90b04b80&_e=j3-JKG3yPQVX1xWYf4RF0igXLdpirF9haOJP4bsWG7x0rG_4i1nJzu-G0-BcxAcmEdZH0313ar_SEtrq2IgJGjkc_LEl4dxsgjgVrBGbv0nrpMOUV0_n7pQoXnfGHhYWqciLKLY0taex3-fMZ0MZx4xwWVBPPCPYFpqKW94yF8lwBVaEkdVV0atSwu1Tu7rRstBU1uDGbhOWwqHPelRNW6Fur_1l8sLzv_asOo76GS5f0QWdhCWKhwN6-5rSEOQeYGr0F-I5QsK0uWBlQxYaG2enadyN2zI-ICtC8_UDr8oxxd3TMYqDIJllGRmzoQPHqadac37cplnZTsJWS9bbHuVsCez02SNIj1M1Cahu7k_wAWlTJo3QxzJmgj2ZrrZ66RcUDIwRhVythdfwuEQvSzCxktTFh19BcnQYnPkyuLdBGHMSNkC9_QL6sCs7CtwLdmxiKqGCVa3UdklrcmEN-Qxs1g9Y14jvupiU8xQkvtQ%3D)
This campaign is something totally different than Missouri and the United States has seen before. I felt a calling, I am stepping up, and I’m ready to serve you.

I didn’t abandon my home when the mob came to burn it down. Just like I won’t abandon you as the socialists attempt to take over our country. I’ll fight like hell to keep this country great

I’ve spent 37 years defending the defenseless as a criminal defense attorney. Black white or otherwise. So, when my opponents say that I have no business running for office, I kindly disagree.

**[Do your homework. Check me out. Read about me and my story, and if you find yourself able to make a gift to my campaign, I’d like to thank you in advance.](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=daf1fb80cb00422e9ca9b5ad90b04b80&_e=j3-JKG3yPQVX1xWYf4RF0igXLdpirF9haOJP4bsWG7x0rG_4i1nJzu-G0-BcxAcmEdZH0313ar_SEtrq2IgJGjkc_LEl4dxsgjgVrBGbv0nrpMOUV0_n7pQoXnfGHhYWqciLKLY0taex3-fMZ0MZx4xwWVBPPCPYFpqKW94yF8lwBVaEkdVV0atSwu1Tu7rRstBU1uDGbhOWwqHPelRNW6Fur_1l8sLzv_asOo76GS5f0QWdhCWKhwN6-5rSEOQeQ4XWouB4AddIwgP4bX0ZKHkRpBv659Lwz8edEPmkr-1R5EUTXFXXADlAEugsrKrLP-qLKVGcq69KZjbV3H9N332rGvbPNIEweczLb7nnfwrTlESDIobN1ZP6ZC_vLNKnB8VkIni4BaEb650Qzd0DphfPaNG-mKtrOrPsEGBPS0yzE3lNbsEOqtbmJcHQ079aUtqYGObQdPHU6fNQidZMXlBSwE2FNAF77_gnTPfH-Q4%3D)**

For a better America,

Mark McCloskey
Republican for United States Senate

[** CLICK HERE TO HELP TAKE BACK THE SENATE **](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=daf1fb80cb00422e9ca9b5ad90b04b80&_e=j3-JKG3yPQVX1xWYf4RF0igXLdpirF9haOJP4bsWG7x0rG_4i1nJzu-G0-BcxAcmEdZH0313ar_SEtrq2IgJGjkc_LEl4dxsgjgVrBGbv0nrpMOUV0_n7pQoXnfGHhYWqciLKLY0taex3-fMZ0MZx4xwWVBPPCPYFpqKW94yF8lwBVaEkdVV0atSwu1Tu7rRstBU1uDGbhOWwqHPelRNW6Fur_1l8sLzv_asOo76GS5f0QWdhCWKhwN6-5rSEOQe4MYmMzjMPzuGuB4Diw45HETZYLXrhHqQM6PMYySCNTLRr6hXNMpJZuBwZcybhuEGmQmctPUWGqHf6M9aP4QDfEmrlPb_Pk0w8OL9UKppJymHKTcngPVnP1QdBl6yhFPUKzh5Qq_md_gcok8_qQkwk6ZHEJObAcjqIeda0QxEdRGuxQqAaBbMDDON2zd6DvWl9Elokn3IH0VVjWKoqUuN-WigfUo4PGfpfauRdxgZkv0%3D)
