body:
| | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=168c68685f&e=66979298f9)
---
| | | Friends, I’m reaching out to humbly ask for your financial support before tomorrow’s FEC deadline — a very important one for our team, our candidates, and for our entire progressive movement. Could you pitch in $5 today to help grow our grassroots campaigns and build an unstoppable movement nationwide?
---
| **[Count me in for $5.](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=72c8cf0c9e&e=66979298f9)**
---
| We are a youth-led, volunteer-run organization. It means we are all volunteers, dedicated to participating in the electoral process collectively. No special interests funding us, just the people. [**No, we are not cashing checks from Soros — but we have to compete with the Koch's of the world.**](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=8be12c480a&e=66979298f9) As we continue to navigate the COVID-19 pandemic, the way campaigns are run has been forever changed. To keep up the fight we must think of new innovative ways to reach voters, to vet candidates, and to provide grassroots candidates the tools and resources they need to win their races.

**[Will you chip in $5 today to ensure Erica Smith can flip North Carolina U.S. Senate and be our 51st vote — so that Bryan Osorio can reclaim Congressional District 21, which was lost to a Republican in 2018 in California?](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=02f0fd744c&e=66979298f9)**

Our work organizing for real progressive change in Congress and beyond is powered by you. The vast majority of the donations we receive comes from lots and lots of people chipping in small amounts when they can. We're so proud to fight for our progressive agenda alongside each and every one of you. The only way we’re going to win our fight is with each of us doing our part. Are you in? [**Use this link to chip in $5 or anything you can afford ahead of tomorrow’s FEC fundraising deadline.**](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=dd2d2358f3&e=66979298f9)

Thank you for not letting up — right now we rise and transform our nation into a more inclusive and equitable country. In solidarity, Roza Calderon
_Executive Director, Future Generations _

We're so proud to fight for our progressive agenda alongside each and every one of you. The only way we’re going to win our fight is with each of us doing our part. Are you in? Thank you for not letting up — right now we rise and transform our nation into a more inclusive and equitable country. In solidarity, Roza Calderon Executive Director, Future Generations | "CONTRIBUTE" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Future Generations PAC, All rights reserved.

body:
|
| | | I just received an extremely concerning text from Donald Trump Jr.:
---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c0fee614d2404bedbb7a9fdaaaccbd27&_e=Cqkw2vByRd2NTR_yj74ttVy8jGiwPhuduxzjnyWh61ihSzEVqRDEmLFsy5zPCS66k15ZrOGZbYfMfG6egRQvA3VNCC9dASm-D9SZNh7nx0ftNLpT8r4zMaGShorSLyvSuSMX8JRSAByHMQ_29fIPwNV8X3KsHSEZwZZaRZMqpmC7X773DT6vcHeta5Rs1XEbtQLY-SjIesQB53VMRa3FeWmT017Aqh5lxUFlwKwlgIXnAx4C5SpIkeQeMnL7F0N0jOdrszx_VxtULn7eog9XncQjOl74ewlZs-o3m1jKFuaVhjq-fp-KrxMxheJK_KTNT7J0-F3g2s0n13JfkosuFlvSDP0359ov9BHXBGLtcXXG12-ynTa-81_ucQ86K9eNwcUbvORiSEeOxn7yUAeZ1q-CXnbsfEWG38hCiDROYnei4dMiCWq-mrE8u8Ry0i8RhZVh1pPdTHh7p65CDSxE339EfMyNTSVNA22SQQ0orZRtaKmAsa9r2jReQs-YoqOMHMkYs7B6eb3VORIso0OvTw%3D%3D)
---
Our critical FEC deadline is tomorrow. That means we have less than 48 hours to crush our fundraising goal and secure the resources required to fight back against Speaker Pelosi's baseless smear campaigns. _I need you to understand just how critical this is:_

**If we fall short of our goal, Speaker Pelosi will open the floodgates and bury the vulnerable, top-targeted, toss-up seats that will decide this election in dark money. We will LOSE the House Majority for good and the Radical Left's Socialist agenda will be unstoppable.**

Don Jr. wouldn't reach out unless it was absolutely necessary, and I wouldn't reach out if I didn't believe we could win - that's why I'm coming to you with a small, humble ask:

**[Will you chip in $4 right now to take back the House?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c0fee614d2404bedbb7a9fdaaaccbd27&_e=Cqkw2vByRd2NTR_yj74ttVy8jGiwPhuduxzjnyWh61ihSzEVqRDEmLFsy5zPCS66k15ZrOGZbYfMfG6egRQvA3VNCC9dASm-D9SZNh7nx0ftNLpT8r4zMaGShorSLyvSuSMX8JRSAByHMQ_29fIPwNV8X3KsHSEZwZZaRZMqpmC7X773DT6vcHeta5Rs1XEbtQLY-SjIesQB53VMRa3FeWmT017Aqh5lxUFlwKwlgIXnAx4C5SpIkeQeMnL7F0N0jOdrszx_VxtULn7eog9XncQjOl74ewlZs-o3m1jKFuaVhjq-fp-KrxMxheJK_KTN26aLqlqEH3T7ofQUXU6hZHcIE1ucB40F1sULHgCcbRXzhOpgBEQZ__4t1qi2Xm4cAZQdyDwxH8XK7D27zyhCi2T1GKGLC2xDDzXhmrbZrMJ7plrUbxmE0nou9llcRqzEHZMAlG3YFWXHkQ7xHWRj7pCenjvrKLN6RurDiqLXdM8RVhHtI9uQfKg6-8mYXzVCpA-A9MbxTkVScXqixL2-6w%3D%3D "Will you chip in $4 right now to take back the House?")** We're just FIVE SEATS away from FIRING PELOSI, but we're also HOURS away from our most critical deadline yet... After that, our numbers go public and the media, pollsters, and pundits will take missing our goal as a sign of weakness the Democrats can - _and will_ - exploit.

**[Will you join me and rush $4 right now to push us over the finish line? Like I said, we have less than 48 hours to either make our mark or lose it all. If every person who gets this email steps up, we can leave the Democrats in the dust.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c0fee614d2404bedbb7a9fdaaaccbd27&_e=Cqkw2vByRd2NTR_yj74ttVy8jGiwPhuduxzjnyWh61ihSzEVqRDEmLFsy5zPCS66k15ZrOGZbYfMfG6egRQvA3VNCC9dASm-D9SZNh7nx0ftNLpT8r4zMaGShorSLyvSuSMX8JRSAByHMQ_29fIPwNV8X3KsHSEZwZZaRZMqpmC7X773DT6vcHeta5Rs1XEbtQLY-SjIesQB53VMRa3FeWmT017Aqh5lxUFlwKwlgIXnAx4C5SpIkeQeMnL7F0N0jOdrszx_VxtULn7eog9XncQjOl74ewlZs-o3m1jKFuaVhjq-fp-KrxMxheJK_KTNqLA04OAXCvWgDU96zSY7PdYUMMVO8c7uCCLisa16S-6eelz_a4-9nP66RnETkfpaoLUT-RWBln8Ik5YP7EZyFpF-QvKo7HUwKW-UjgDIOIC0ARL6c_pJFb-USe0wEuaUuArvYpERsjFMzjqGw7q-ajcZ8MDE9dsuarYorEzNNGUx8f1YjyfFR-q42KWqCnLA7goZrZJZ4h46bQayF7oEsA%3D%3D "Will you join me and rush $4 right now to push us over the finish line? Like I said, we have less than 48 hours to either make our mark or lose it all. If every person who gets this email steps up, we can leave the Democrats in the dust.")**

Let me speak candidly: I have experienced the wrath of the Radical Left first hand. They spent BIG trying to smear my name and buy this top-targeted seat out from under me. I can all but guarantee they will spend twice that to defeat me in this upcoming election... _because they know, just as well as we do, that their Majority is hanging on by a thread._

**They will stop at nothing to OBLITERATE anyone who doesn 't fall in line with their reckless agenda and DESTROY our chances of taking back the House for America First Patriots.**

**[I hope I can count on you to put an end to the Left's smear campaigns and dirty tricks once and for all.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c0fee614d2404bedbb7a9fdaaaccbd27&_e=Cqkw2vByRd2NTR_yj74ttVy8jGiwPhuduxzjnyWh61ihSzEVqRDEmLFsy5zPCS66k15ZrOGZbYfMfG6egRQvA3VNCC9dASm-D9SZNh7nx0ftNLpT8r4zMaGShorSLyvSuSMX8JRSAByHMQ_29fIPwNV8X3KsHSEZwZZaRZMqpmC7X773DT6vcHeta5Rs1XEbtQLY-SjIesQB53VMRa3FeWmT017Aqh5lxUFlwKwlgIXnAx4C5SpIkeQeMnL7F0N0jOdrszx_VxtULn7eog9XncQjOl74ewlZs-o3m1jKFuaVhjq-fp-KrxMxheJK_KTNoWWLu48RWiNFSpWZLiX6kwsQi2hIEebAO5bJ7fXPrVJo1l91hV_Pr79VkgcKra5dLEpSYCaq0L4EDQJWxL9Xd_IeisKXK1oOxEB5L9UdBXxKJGAh__jglL74EjUpZddhHsXJW6RhesdM9otB7_ou2gLyX27Ev-6wEKPz_kNCcxXibhKghrlIH7998hsjXIb_wEfdMzhWjEUEEsKRlbLFoA%3D%3D "%%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%, I hope I can count on you to put an end to the Left’s smear campaigns and dirty tricks once and for all.")**

I know, in my heart of hearts, that we can flip the House from BLUE to RED. But I also know it's impossible to do it without your support and becomes nothing but a pipe dream if we miss tomorrow's critical deadline.

**[We cannot take back the House without your help.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c0fee614d2404bedbb7a9fdaaaccbd27&_e=Cqkw2vByRd2NTR_yj74ttVy8jGiwPhuduxzjnyWh61ihSzEVqRDEmLFsy5zPCS66k15ZrOGZbYfMfG6egRQvA3VNCC9dASm-D9SZNh7nx0ftNLpT8r4zMaGShorSLyvSuSMX8JRSAByHMQ_29fIPwNV8X3KsHSEZwZZaRZMqpmC7X773DT6vcHeta5Rs1XEbtQLY-SjIesQB53VMRa3FeWmT017Aqh5lxUFlwKwlgIXnAx4C5SpIkeQeMnL7F0N0jOdrszx_VxtULn7eog9XncQjOl74ewlZs-o3m1jKFuaVhjq-fp-KrxMxheJK_KTNoe3VRfQ-_pjkoYe4T0hG-fb9ghmX2ioNX-7lEris7dcw2xRUz1WAUppLJieWBeOmzgJ6gpcuuvvcIUPA4mYPRvOklSeIoy0gkdwao5hpM4FIkfwWwYwowMjth5ERCXmfKJKTwS1GJhErZxW0YDhid3_IcBkr3iMTBtGg5tp8mWGAXbYGQlKeaYsbdLkBiKMPi9UquzsTzKY1kp_cU-15_w%3D%3D "We cannot take back the House without your help. ")**

Thank you,

Folks,

I’m Megan, the Digital Director here at Bruno Amato for Congress. It’s my job to make sure we’re reaching as many people as we can where they spend a lot of their time: online.

Since we’re running against one of the most reviled members of Congress, people from all fifty states want to see Bruno take McCarthy down in 2022. In order to reach them, we rely on early grassroots supporters -- like you -- chipping in whatever they can.

We’ve already been able to build a network of donors who have enabled our campaign to grow faster than any campaign I’ve ever seen, but now we need your support before this crucial deadline.

**Just one day from now is our Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing deadline. That means our fundraising numbers will go public, and it is so important that we show our grassroots strength on those fundraising reports.

[Can you chip in just $10 right now so we can hit our goal ahead of Thursday at midnight? We’re just $11,330 short of where we need to clean_body: Our digital outreach relies on getting people invested early | | | Folks, I’m Megan, the Digital Director here at Bruno Amato for Congress. It’s my job to make sure we’re reaching as many people as we can where they spend a lot of their time: online. Since we’re running against one of the most reviled members of Congress, people from all fifty states want to see Bruno take McCarthy down in 2022. In order to reach them, we rely on early grassroots supporters -- like you -- chipping in whatever they can. We’ve already been able to build a network of donors who have enabled our campaign to grow faster than any campaign I’ve ever seen, but now we need your support before this crucial deadline. Just one day from now is our Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing deadline. That means our fundraising numbers will go public, and it is so important that we show our grassroots strength on those fundraising reports. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks! Megan Russell Digital Director, Bruno Amato for Congress | | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

name: Erik Aadland
subject: Politicians or Solutions?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AADLAND for Senate
body:
It all comes down to one simple question. Do you want politicians or solutions?
I know you’re busy, Peter, but if you got a couple of minutes to spare, can you watch this video?

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b0a47771ea03492889460ff4a3e22e90&_e=tWW50Io1z3tLoPmitcZYqofV1pUQMiyF7Iaayyfb8ZKdHNI07TMqX4sP3wM3NfG_njByXl4NOA1fw9805bNOaMh39Tm8TbMfotgnVmwg7AvapE-gTnxO1-Bg88ubBzAZ2V-Ny4qy-OQaVULIRbaxnMkKsEwMH1NtbCFXUaJuO8RicWi50JUT4twh3C1wKzW8UwSwEOEsx2H2qFGeJ_fZUcFnfY8DyA5hJOEhiyul0QFPkHxKV1OkgVGLSOWS3LEPJcI13fo8sDWExKY8sgEJ9miMjsanAsmeXFSH0PwzX6C4k9jLoolhFmfjCodNQJDGb4oO8-3I5msO61FfS5f0uibbbACTJKgsx9ADjtnGalDp-krODKymRYpq5sNcDk39WCnD5TxhAJTTUA3WL78T5g3ZwDmHu547ZOWmVwvbHjw%3D)
I know it’s been said before but, combat tours to Iraq and Afghanistan will put things into perspective. When I made it back home after my last deployment, the one thing that stood out to me was how we all have so much that unites versus divides us as Americans.

Despite that, we cannot ignore what’s happening in our country right now. **The radical left we see in America is not only a threat to our finances today, but to our freedoms tomorrow.** They want to distract us from our foundation of freedoms by dividing us. [**We can’t let them win.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b0a47771ea03492889460ff4a3e22e90&_e=tWW50Io1z3tLoPmitcZYqofV1pUQMiyF7Iaayyfb8ZKdHNI07TMqX4sP3wM3NfG_njByXl4NOA1fw9805bNOaMh39Tm8TbMfotgnVmwg7AvapE-gTnxO1-Bg88ubBzAZ2V-Ny4qy-OQaVULIRbaxnMkKsEwMH1NtbCFXUaJuO8RicWi50JUT4twh3C1wKzW8NVZT41MIAfyHDxFyTYl2l1A5udjat_xxr8s7ilw2e-SRxbDCqy3c7TgwkjMkOhPVqkVKKjlSkRupu5Utx-GQ2j4CG46W2SInhFu395wFbXVKuYtbfH3tezPBYUTu5aqa2ZyuseiUOn22vGR9fvzeSupTwkdF-q1S4pgterA9nWQ9PWGV3Up4AIzYZ7MfpeZxjp5UvSicXMo7FDP4DWcTSl3u86oyItjgsn32LYf2ozA%3D)

[** PITCH IN TO FLIP THE SENATE AND PROTECT OUR FREEDOMS **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b0a47771ea03492889460ff4a3e22e90&_e=tWW50Io1z3tLoPmitcZYqofV1pUQMiyF7Iaayyfb8ZKdHNI07TMqX4sP3wM3NfG_njByXl4NOA1fw9805bNOaMh39Tm8TbMfotgnVmwg7AvapE-gTnxO1-Bg88ubBzAZ2V-Ny4qy-OQaVULIRbaxnMkKsEwMH1NtbCFXUaJuO8RicWi50JUT4twh3C1wKzW8uwwl7th3DDK_4cbB_aTv-bNONB1M4DUq4wAYsfwUWaQq2I4crzBf4bsW0dJWHVB_fqcz9h39rYL5xiMVDjkqz_yexFB7rxpJtxAoh6k-16jqBUGhdFL9jUihCiNAFjhv4izKOcu96QhjiiELpJrAyasDaFM7DbRQxns0E2KLIsYwC9uSegkHvaV_q7xPIjV-qydpLe5JO20ZcuVuStDZzlBY6tYTxm5geaD4Ql-Z3xI%3D)
**Even worse than the radical left is the politician that takes the same oath of office that I took in the Army, then ignores the very people they’re supposed to serve.** That’s why more Americans like you are asking the same questions- _“Are they doing everything they can to honor their oath in defense of freedom? Are they doing everything they can to represent our community?”_

**If you’re asking these questions, then you already know the answer.** [**It’s time we start fighting for this one nation under God that we all pledged our allegiance to;**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b0a47771ea03492889460ff4a3e22e90&_e=tWW50Io1z3tLoPmitcZYqofV1pUQMiyF7Iaayyfb8ZKdHNI07TMqX4sP3wM3NfG_njByXl4NOA1fw9805bNOaMh39Tm8TbMfotgnVmwg7AvapE-gTnxO1-Bg88ubBzAZ2V-Ny4qy-OQaVULIRbaxnMkKsEwMH1NtbCFXUaJuO8RicWi50JUT4twh3C1wKzW8FUMqC7sTGQSJWTujBzdd-210OshnogZA0v5C9godi7Yx7mK2kHdEk_FiDTHX020bc1XsbrmqBVbbZAmljIUJVEgutMd_ZQyV810YqF_jLfcCCbW680H3ygqsTtmVtiIxbzm0EyHJRm3sDcninAtxOkzwbzsVRtYb3qhEWR7ySSqPD8zfqD6LQULcv37UftRTASWl1bItRh8Zdj1s_hcvtE8Jtt_R4yOu3LA-HhA_3Bk%3D) **because the very freedoms we take for granted are the same ones that can falter when good people do nothing.**

[**Help prevent that by joining this cause to flip the Senate and defend our freedoms by pitching in any donation that you can.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b0a47771ea03492889460ff4a3e22e90&_e=tWW50Io1z3tLoPmitcZYqofV1pUQMiyF7Iaayyfb8ZKdHNI07TMqX4sP3wM3NfG_njByXl4NOA1fw9805bNOaMh39Tm8TbMfotgnVmwg7AvapE-gTnxO1-Bg88ubBzAZ2V-Ny4qy-OQaVULIRbaxnMkKsEwMH1NtbCFXUaJuO8RicWi50JUT4twh3C1wKzW8qn1g-vu-tGB8qOH9JAOKSr9YNMJU3KbHoz5n3xH3UFutvsTemVVCF6NzZEnsoU9tXlCC0GKcWFwTILmEcowV4D_cHMqwkFaevs4dD8qxPVGSHGAAN8LE0QQBwRqgZjGVAELD1Pwc291cWz8f7UaJdtd5jDj1WSpAuaMS_F7_YjJEfwizT4XRM5YVXa0ha2fe7uWsMg94spx0n-A4m0DSblRkGlgFyEJGAIMm2bGiQzw%3D) Just $10 can make a world of difference in a place like Colorado. No matter what you can give, know that it will end up being the reason why someone votes for the GOP to win back the Senate.

America needs you, and so do I.

V/R,

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b0a47771ea03492889460ff4a3e22e90&_e=tWW50Io1z3tLoPmitcZYqofV1pUQMiyF7Iaayyfb8ZKdHNI07TMqX4sP3wM3NfG_njByXl4NOA1fw9805bNOaMh39Tm8TbMfotgnVmwg7AvapE-gTnxO1-Bg88ubBzAZ2V-Ny4qy-OQaVULIRbaxnMkKsEwMH1NtbCFXUaJuO8RicWi50JUT4twh3C1wKzW89KdBKZ4oSez4Ycg5fdw3FjyEajG8ms-nLYX6ycJER48jEAg2UNnuBUjay24XMzPE91IpKdUCdw_Fe9jHun-FR1P3-uZCJ8TvqGWWbnZCINx1IWAY-GzpRoZ_mLt0jxOrWFLmF8t-7cNaHt4Ev33K5_fsjiMQxyVWRfhrpWxhTgc85qHcR24xBUTRCRghGrrdI-7Hlcl0kIyy9OqcmwoTTXB2auzDBqsMfYgtkegX8bQ%3D)
**Erik Aadland**
Candidate for the U.S. Senate

[** PITCH IN TO FLIP THE SENATE AND PROTECT OUR FREEDOMS **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b0a47771ea03492889460ff4a3e22e90&_e=tWW50Io1z3tLoPmitcZYqofV1pUQMiyF7Iaayyfb8ZKdHNI07TMqX4sP3wM3NfG_njByXl4NOA1fw9805bNOaMh39Tm8TbMfotgnVmwg7AvapE-gTnxO1-Bg88ubBzAZ2V-Ny4qy-OQaVULIRbaxnMkKsEwMH1NtbCFXUaJuO8RicWi50JUT4twh3C1wKzW8LPQcw1p1yA-2Nftb0PMGo9_cNrO8z_dvFe261wnBhvJgpnkAP42iMY2N_TohYq3JXOYESF0VyPitltdjVKZm4wp-E-APM_TVXrgbhtfj1kgYlCJDaSSy20O7MIFQQgMxi7GWO4AKQYx35pkV8C-h0v7mvfCo1uVdAjZCiS0qrj7eMokp6Xsvs8pNdR0ty2SzAcqNlRf-dwo9gDo-JdeoYLQEkfnO385_zlcP73l0Lho%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dustin=20White?=
subject: Help Take Back the Majority in Augusta
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b10f2482c40e/help-take-back-the-majority-in-augusta?e=20c6646994)
---
| | **MAINE VALUES PAC **
---
| | Dear Friend,

It should come as no surprise to any of you that our state and our country are on the wrong track. Massive inflation, an employment crisis, and continued possibility of pandemic lockdowns threaten to cause further hardship after such a difficult year. As we look forward to the next election, we see that we have the chance to reverse these terrible trends and send Maine back down the right path. Flipping the House in 2022 is not a distant hope. In fact, it starts right now. On November 2, 2021, we have the chance to start our work to bring Republicans back to the majority in Augusta. A special election will be held for House District 86, located in Augusta. The seat was vacated following the retirement of Rep. Justin Fecteau in July. I was proud to serve alongside Justin and know the importance of holding this seat for Republicans. I know how hard Justin worked every day, and I know we need to support someone with that same work ethic. James Orr will be that person. As an Army veteran he knows the value of hard work. He is exactly the type of person we need in Augusta. I am proud to support him, and now I am asking you to add your support. Our first priority in taking the House in 2022 is holding this seat in 2021. This is only possible through your generous support. Let us not sit by while our state goes the way of economic uncertainty and social upheaval. Now is the time to stand up and show Democrat leaders in Augusta that enough is enough. Donations can be sent to:

Maine Values PAC
P.O. Box 1654
Presque Isle, Maine 04769

Or you can donate right now online by clicking [HERE](https://hotmail.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39048de64d4f149e0189a9d66&id=5f79d8686b&e=20c6646994) Your donation will go directly towards this fight in House District 86. Now is the time for action. Can I count you in? Sincerely, Rep. Dustin M. White
Maine Values PAC
---
| | | | | | | [](https://hotmail.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39048de64d4f149e0189a9d66&id=8dd0a52cdd&e=20c6646994)

clean_body: | | | | | MAINE VALUES PAC | | Dear Friend, It should come as no surprise to any of you that our state and our country are on the wrong track. Massive inflation, an employment crisis, and continued possibility of pandemic lockdowns threaten to cause further hardship after such a difficult year. As we look forward to the next election, we see that we have the chance to reverse these terrible trends and send Maine back down the right path. Flipping the House in 2022 is not a distant hope. In fact, it starts right now. On November 2, 2021, we have the chance to start our work to bring Republicans back to the majority in Augusta. A special election will be held for House District 86, located in Augusta. The seat was vacated following the retirement of Rep. Justin Fecteau in July. I was proud to serve alongside Justin and know the importance of holding this seat for Republicans. I know how hard Justin worked every day, and I know we need to support someone with that same work ethic. James Orr will be that person. As an Army veteran he knows the value of hard work. He is exactly the type of person we need in Augusta. I am proud to support him, and now I am asking you to add your support. Our first priority in taking the House in 2022 is holding this seat in 2021. This is only possible through your generous support. Let us not sit by while our state goes the way of economic uncertainty and social upheaval. Now is the time to stand up and show Democrat leaders in Augusta that enough is enough. Donations can be sent to: Maine Values PAC P.O. Box 1654 Presque Isle, Maine 04769 Or you can donate right now online by clicking Your donation will go directly towards this fight in House District 86. Now is the time for action. Can I count you in? Sincerely, Rep. Dustin M. White Maine Values PAC | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Maine Values PAC, All rights reserved.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Darrell Issa for Congress
body:
The Democrat Majority is hanging by a thread. We only need five seats to take the gavel out of Nancy Pelosi's hands. The Democrat Majority is hanging by a thread. We only need five seats to take the gavel out of Nancy Pelosi's hands. | [](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=a446fe6395ed46bc9ec976e9cb10b2a4&_e=8rL0pvqjr6DofU-wKDCLMLaS45-EDGzsgnU1EMGomwbdF5Qtgb8ogKz7FKxfHJI4hfbojrsmIqGRMDQkl9FD2x4GPeshMZDPXXi6rR1uq8PpB4JvNwIJ8nYYV1pfB9PPZjVVBF5mke7rK3X6uLPC7d4K0LsNkXWk9oLCro1ID7B0vXrQqcHa_xWxdF52FsfAvZdtVFkaI8sHv_6eod9jb1A7TXm-1E7ghpxnc6VndtF6kVABnwSKrs7wd7OUs4I8EAVhZZtTn7eLfFNgY1mIy05hUXQWrwHbtb4woOoFeDwxfiHasvilYYpafQjDBK13j_A2P-biw6Ku4TXlAH57PXjFH-ivXA-K-suoiE7Gmuh4Rt5bV9sigDmpEzawnrN3Sg9gEqi-YycVzVCCpBj64ObK5TPTbP-XYH0l8S4--Ds%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

The Democrat Majority is hanging by a thread. We only need five seats to take the gavel out of Nancy Pelosi's hands.

And Democrats in Sacramento have passed unprecedented legislation that makes every single Republican Congressional District in California, including mine, a target. None of our seats are safe.

We were able to fight them off in 2020 and narrowly win this seat, but that was only because we had the support of thousands of grassroots Conservatives like you.

[**That's why I'm counting on more than 1,500 Conservatives to step up with a small contribution of just $5 before our End-of-Quarter deadline MIDNIGHT TOMORROW.**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=a446fe6395ed46bc9ec976e9cb10b2a4&_e=8rL0pvqjr6DofU-wKDCLMLaS45-EDGzsgnU1EMGomwbdF5Qtgb8ogKz7FKxfHJI4hfbojrsmIqGRMDQkl9FD2x4GPeshMZDPXXi6rR1uq8PpB4JvNwIJ8nYYV1pfB9PPZjVVBF5mke7rK3X6uLPC7d4K0LsNkXWk9oLCro1ID7B0vXrQqcHa_xWxdF52FsfA9vKR3LNBP9tdBLPVjKFeDLv2DBMcFEKAo7ORg_tooRjm4OAOLYqzLdnDONGWeCLa_b62T4mPMJ3VFLdpB9Xb1iYe-99c5_MrqxWVGCluA9MlI_mlOnuDcfT10VdbZh0yyPM25-DawO9wvd74dHrNUNYuEz7VQqfmTn7BD45AnLX4x8q9L84L4yCY2KwzqTkjOJlWnQejaZTeSoJlEDRadZqP7XetLETCt-U2Eqqh-gY%3D)

[**Chip in $5 ⇒**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=a446fe6395ed46bc9ec976e9cb10b2a4&_e=8rL0pvqjr6DofU-wKDCLMLaS45-EDGzsgnU1EMGomwbdF5Qtgb8ogKz7FKxfHJI4hfbojrsmIqGRMDQkl9FD2x4GPeshMZDPXXi6rR1uq8PpB4JvNwIJ8nYYV1pfB9PPZjVVBF5mke7rK3X6uLPC7d4K0LsNkXWk9oLCro1ID7B0vXrQqcHa_xWxdF52FsfAL6DZjVxDB5Fb4DUvK6lVk4vT4otVae-GoUOftNJ0lVmMpCcGS_GYl9oofRKzF2ucuIOJ4BzDPtlP1Q0BuFDGLzvxESao1Rj2-o-XXHfHxzMsXY00GcRiStXT0Amf9SyvTtnvln1N8x2YaG5ZD2Woo5fZSzMxt1SdWy8fqhOHhtaqPeSvFsmgD9zhal7uAlHr1eIULzhUZnblq2CepsQSGty5yVbR3UWNpa3hl8B2wig%3D)
[**Chip in More ⇒**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=a446fe6395ed46bc9ec976e9cb10b2a4&_e=8rL0pvqjr6DofU-wKDCLMLaS45-EDGzsgnU1EMGomwbdF5Qtgb8ogKz7FKxfHJI4hfbojrsmIqGRMDQkl9FD2x4GPeshMZDPXXi6rR1uq8PpB4JvNwIJ8nYYV1pfB9PPZjVVBF5mke7rK3X6uLPC7d4K0LsNkXWk9oLCro1ID7B0vXrQqcHa_xWxdF52FsfA0QOL-UOb2Q-5-i411mrBow9yCo3nbYAjFlz8NZjqA1t_Dd7TjlDtWUAol346cJ7uhXoob1h4Rc7Z5h_SKkkHGVqoNGR5aSXHQI8PzrXs10UVmp-yqoSRVkIQGtI9P711FR8Dk_pewwbpPjyGxeJbiZEHgKqYrqFciLL9uQs60SuE0a5tESCHMi0SorF4_FIdsjRQYH2cEPL_JxmYpSA42IanLfloIERdGxnI4uovmJs%3D)
Inflation is skyrocketing, crime is at historic highs, and Americans are still trapped in Afghanistan. Democrat leadership is failing this country and voters know it. **That's why the Democrats are using their authority to give themselves a significant step up in 2022.**

I'm 100% focused on retiring Nancy Pelosi and expanding our map, but we can't do that if we don't have the resources we need to protect this seat.

[**Please step up with a $5 contribution before our End-of-Quarter deadline so we can remove Pelosi from power once and for all.**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=a446fe6395ed46bc9ec976e9cb10b2a4&_e=8rL0pvqjr6DofU-wKDCLMLaS45-EDGzsgnU1EMGomwbdF5Qtgb8ogKz7FKxfHJI4hfbojrsmIqGRMDQkl9FD2x4GPeshMZDPXXi6rR1uq8PpB4JvNwIJ8nYYV1pfB9PPZjVVBF5mke7rK3X6uLPC7d4K0LsNkXWk9oLCro1ID7B0vXrQqcHa_xWxdF52FsfAwxB2Os6auB7xK1sJ5MEcgXVzMGG2MS1E_oJwbsEJgI7TKy6rlk3pq7wRTFzOf9oebbVMmE_3tWUxY59M_mhfi07EDdS4TIE288ey_dvEFrfKgML2ttDMRiD1EHYnmwFZ0niwzKkmVS4D713vssVrRsaAfT9QDOH6Ks2tMqv7Upq4pSjuq1QbDTk1EbkMdlq617VeQFnyjenyrUG122jHwqvZxYVtXzp-vPiKh3cD2T4%3D)

Sincerely,

Congressman Darrell Issa

[**Chip in $5 ⇒**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=a446fe6395ed46bc9ec976e9cb10b2a4&_e=8rL0pvqjr6DofU-wKDCLMLaS45-EDGzsgnU1EMGomwbdF5Qtgb8ogKz7FKxfHJI4hfbojrsmIqGRMDQkl9FD2x4GPeshMZDPXXi6rR1uq8PpB4JvNwIJ8nYYV1pfB9PPZjVVBF5mke7rK3X6uLPC7d4K0LsNkXWk9oLCro1ID7B0vXrQqcHa_xWxdF52FsfAL6DZjVxDB5Fb4DUvK6lVk7oawi2C2ky-SBrsHh_zm7wg6o6MKSiljOUzemaXXtAXRQ_KIe58wwzS-2FUwExNH_hzYEZ9DAnB_u-69jwKbVTrQV7jlhLHrkcMOD8c9L6j-FkF_VqKriI3PkWKU-hVqo0_dp-zn01V55gZZsRUFo0dXwhcs5523vu92cPSrubhTVqlErNYyzGxrOcKRO23pY7tuUeA1dTcaR340TRaFqk%3D)

Team Jacobs is in an all out sprint to the finish line with **less than a day left** until our campaign’s **biggest end of quarter fundraising deadline.** Click [**here**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=f046a062513743bd87453bac4c612a00&_e=cB4nFop2YqkISscT4-B3kR4cI_S00z3jyrHswuzR-qRyocXyH3UBN1E9VKyDRoQFozT3wUjtSgXqu2N9lVZp9lA61kui22olUsJUSusFLYuGrfcrNOzGhoPqqkiyhHHKoDcPQ0xMFE0M7iZx_YTxciQ4lttxTMNOlZTfQALN4rSt-mJhm_s4XMeiZyq-Nt346PrzrQXR1z8SCEQ5KtDsmHnnfW7oWcBLWzJih9AqbXZZkvs6-PWUUtRCagiehKHs933VTH_cEBwuUvC5QP3Qq9p1XQvn6x0PFNd4_jsYqBCQYN3oXgzoaCV_nPOC-bh7gIvdwsjEkXLa-9DZf2F2LoSQ-Cn6bvRX1BB19kuq4945wcTa_wEsLGvvAqZbG8_TmLjCODbDR_jMYgssWMZrtagvaMPBCu0G51wO7WXCI2hYexKsGyoArRDnkIjoOAv3oOWxog4o29pt9Bqd12mRR-czpYpiYms_FLSexAPkJZ4%3D) to help us close the gap and keep our momentum going strong. All the best, Noah Matt Jacobs for Congress (CA-26) Sent from my iPhone \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Team Jacobs** <[team@outreach.mattjacobsforcongress.com](mailto:team@mattjacobsforcongress.com "team@mattjacobsforcongress.com")>
Date: Thu, Sep 23, 2021 at 12:37 PM

Susie is going up against a swarm of MAGA Republican opponents bankrolled by the GOP war chest and right-wing Super PACs. We HAVE to meet this public end-of-quarter fundraising deadline so we can show them just how strong Susie’s coalition of supporters truly is. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for acting quickly. \- Team Susie Lee | | = If you'd like to support Susie Lee For Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to remove yourself from our list, click | Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress Susie Lee for Congress 5130 S Fort Apache Rd Ste 215-382 Las Vegas, NV 89148 mailto:info@susieleeforcongress.com

I’ll say it again, I am humbled and honored to be the only candidate in this race Endorsed by President Trump, but now, I need YOUR support if we’re going to deliver DEFEAT to Murkowski! name: Jimmy (iPhone)
subject: worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2020, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
Hi Peter,

I just spoke with my Finance Director, and we’re still not where we need to be before tomorrow night’s FEC filing deadline.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Too much on the line to stop now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Investing in roads and bridges is important, but so is investing in PEOPLE, their lives, their livelihoods, and their communities.
#
Peter, tomorrow is going to be a big day in Congress. We face two choices:
We can either do what progressives are asking and delay a vote on the small infrastructure bill until the popular Build Back Better Act — with long-overdue investments in economic relief and climate action — moves with it.
OR we can choose to leave behind all of our priorities — we can choose to leave behind parents who need child care, kids and grandchildren facing this climate crisis, immigrants on the frontlines, people struggling to afford health care, all those who can’t find affordable housing.
**There’s too much on the line to accept a “pinkie promise” deal, Peter.** We can’t just sit around hoping that they’ll finally get around to passing our priorities in the future. The plan is clear: The Build Back Better package and smaller infrastructure bill pass together. _Let’s deliver both to President Biden’s desk._
**[Progressives won’t back down. We’re fighting the people’s fight, and we’re going to deliver the President’s entire Build Back Better agenda. If you’re with us, can you contribute $3 or whatever you can afford toward our FEC end-of-quarter goal to power our movement forward?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210929?refcode=em20210929-676&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=676_420207_bEnEk1&akid=676%2E420207%2EbEnEk1)**
**[Chip in $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210929?refcode=em20210929-676&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=676_420207_bEnEk1&akid=676%2E420207%2EbEnEk1)**
Investing in roads and bridges is important, but so is investing in PEOPLE, their lives, their livelihoods, and their communities.
The Build Back Better Act is not some fringe list of policy priorities — it’s the President’s agenda just as much as it is ours. This bill will provide child care to women pushed out of the workforce. It will fund free community college and affordable housing. It will finally expand Medicare to cover dental, vision, and hearing benefits for our seniors. And it will take real, tangible action on climate change — funding green jobs to build our energy future.
Progressives are fighting to keep our promise to those who delivered _us_ the House, the Senate, and the White House during the last election. That’s what they sent us here to do, and we won’t stop fighting for them.
[**No matter what conservatives, Big Pharma, and corporate America try to throw at us, we’re holding the line and delivering. Chip in $3 before our FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline tomorrow to fuel my work to finally pass this bill and deliver on our promises to the people.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210929?refcode=em20210929-676&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=676_420207_bEnEk1&akid=676%2E420207%2EbEnEk1)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210929?refcode=em20210929-676&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=676_420207_bEnEk1&akid=676%2E420207%2EbEnEk1)**
Let’s get this done,

Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210929-676-footer&t=24&refcode2=676_420207_bEnEk1&akid=676%2E420207%2EbEnEk1)**

clean_body: Investing in roads and bridges is important, but so is investing in PEOPLE, their lives, their livelihoods, and their communities. Peter, tomorrow is going to be a big day in Congress. We face two choices: We can either do what progressives are asking and delay a vote on the small infrastructure bill until the popular Build Back Better Act — with long-overdue investments in economic relief and climate action — moves with it. OR we can choose to leave behind all of our priorities — we can choose to leave behind parents who need child care, kids and grandchildren facing this climate crisis, immigrants on the frontlines, people struggling to afford health care, all those who can’t find affordable housing. There’s too much on the line to accept a “pinkie promise” deal, Peter. We can’t just sit around hoping that they’ll finally get around to passing our priorities in the future. The plan is clear: The Build Back Better package and smaller infrastructure bill pass together. Let’s deliver both to President Biden’s desk. Investing in roads and bridges is important, but so is investing in PEOPLE, their lives, their livelihoods, and their communities. The Build Back Better Act is not some fringe list of policy priorities — it’s the President’s agenda just as much as it is ours. This bill will provide child care to women pushed out of the workforce. It will fund free community college and affordable housing. It will finally expand Medicare to cover dental, vision, and hearing benefits for our seniors. And it will take real, tangible action on climate change — funding green jobs to build our energy future. Progressives are fighting to keep our promise to those who delivered us the House, the Senate, and the White House during the last election. That’s what they sent us here to do, and we won’t stop fighting for them. Let’s get this done, Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

body:

Hey folks,

Mitch McConnell just threatened to block a Supreme Court nominee if
Republicans retake the Senate majority next year.

And here’s the scary part: the Senate is tied 50-50 right now. That means
Republicans only need to flip one single seat to take back total control.

We HAVE to expand our Democratic majority if we want any chance of
stopping McConnell. That’s why we can’t afford to lose this race. With
just over 24 hours to go, we’re behind on our FEC goal. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4945?t=1007&akid=1042%2E3611125%2E8hs9UI ]Can you chip in
now to elect Tim and expand our Democratic Senate majority?

that process.

The latest poll shows Tim is neck-and-neck with his Republican opponents
-- it’s clear Ohio will determine Senate control.

Tim can flip this seat blue and expand the Democratic majority, but only
with your help. With our end-of-quarter FEC deadline ending tomorrow at

fundraising goal to keep up with the millions of dollars national
Republicans are investing in this race.

name: Alicia Pardo
subject: Nikki is asking, team
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Team—

I need to make sure you saw Nikki’s message from this afternoon. It’s urgent.

We’re still $11,212 short of our digital fundraising goal for the month. I’m not sure where else to turn, team, so I’m reaching out again with just over 24 hours to go.

Staying on track with our fundraising is critical to fighting back against DeSantis’ anti-choice, anti-science agenda. If you can, please click here to chip in now and help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-september-eom]

Thanks!

Alicia Pardo
Finance Consultant

Begin Forwarded Message:
From: "Nikki Fried" <campaign@nikkifried.com>
Subject: My least favorite part of running for governor
Date: September 29, 2021 at 2:03:53 PM EDT
To: Alicia Pardo
Reply-To: campaign@nikkifried.com

Friends—Asking for money is my least favorite part of running for Governor. But it’s a necessity in order to do the work that matters most: building a movement from the Panhandle to Key West to break Florida’s rigged system and stop Ron DeSantis.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-september-eom?refcode=wed1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-september-eom?refcode=wed1]Here’s where we stand:

1. Ron DeSantis has raised $55 MILLION so far this cycle. 20% of that money came from Wall Street donors.

2. 42.5% of DeSantis donations came from OUTSIDE of Florida.

3. We’ve built a grassroots campaign, and the overwhelming majority of our contributions have come from Floridians . But we need to keep going and keep pace with DeSantis

4. Reaching our September goal is CRITICAL to building a winning movement against DeSantis, but as of right now, we’re still $13,211 short. I’m getting worried, team.

Friends, your donation before tomorrow at midnight helps us stay on track in the fight against DeSantis. If you’re in a position to give, please click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-september-eom?refcode=wed1]

Thank You,

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: One day
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We would not be asking here were it not so terribly important to this campaign, and to the future of the Senate.
#

One day.
Mark Kelly needs as many donations as we can generate before tomorrow at midnight if we are going to reach our goals before this FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close.
So far, Mark has received more donations than any other candidate running for U.S. Senate, and for that Mark is very thankful.
But he needs you to contribute today. When this deadline ends, we’re legally required to report our fundraising numbers. Everyone will be watching.
So what do you say? Can Mark count on you?
[**Please make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign for the U.S. Senate before tomorrow night’s FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close. We would not ask were it not so terribly important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210929-2-15&t=1&refcode2=1440_6688874_HZEJ_8&akid=1440%2E6688874%2EHZEJ_8)

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Dang!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The truth is we’ve fallen nearly $40,000 behind where we were at this point last time. We might not hit our goal.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210929-2824-header&t=1&akid=2824%2E434096%2EG-ri1A)
Peter,
This isn’t the email we want to be sending with 1 1⁄2 days left before our FEC deadline. Despite a ton of effort, it looks like we’re falling behind on our goal. And we don’t know if we can plausibly catch up.
**Truthfully, we’re a little more than $40,000 behind what we raised online by this point during our last end-of-quarter push.**
We’ve had almost the _exact_ same number of contributions come in so far in September compared to June (our last quarterly deadline). BUT, the average contribution size dipped considerably. So we’re behind on the total $$ raised.
A slowdown in summer fundraising is pretty normal for campaigns, but we were really hoping to beat our total from last quarter to show some momentum. Now, it’s looking unlikely unless we see a big surge during these final 1 1⁄2 days.
[**_Peter, do you think you could chip in for the first time before our big deadline? Any amount would help us close this shortfall — whether you can afford $5, $25, or more._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32253?refcode=em20210929-2824&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2824%2E434096%2EG-ri1A)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32253?refcode=em20210929-2824&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2824%2E434096%2EG-ri1A)**
Unless we turn things around in the final hours remaining, we could end the quarter well under our target number.
The Republicans, including Donald Trump's endorsed candidate for this Senate seat, would *love* to see us fall short — because they know John is the ONLY candidate beating every single GOP candidate in a hypothetical general election in the latest poll.
**That was the bad news, but here's the good news:** We’ve still got a day and a half left to turn this around. We *MIGHT* still be able to make up all this ground. Let’s leave it all on the field and see if we can close up as much of the gap as possible.
[**_Add your very first contribution right now to help us boost our numbers heading into deadline day. We've got a really good feeling that we can turn this around if we see more folks from 18326 chip in even a modest amount._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32253?refcode=em20210929-2824&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2824%2E434096%2EG-ri1A)
No matter what happens when the clock strikes midnight on Thursday, we should be proud of what we’ve accomplished so far. We’re running a competitive campaign — the kind that can WIN — and doing it with grassroots funding instead of the old school way of taking corporate PAC money and relying on big donors.
Thank you, truly, for being part of this momentous effort.
— Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210929-2824-footer&t=23&refcode2=2824_434096_G-ri1A&akid=2824%2E434096%2EG-ri1A)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=2824%2E434096%2EG-ri1A)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2824%2E434096%2EG-ri1A)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Terry (Personal)
subject: Final call for donation match, Derek!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
| | Derek, we only have until midnight, and this is your final chance to take advantage of our September matching program before our filing deadline tomorrow. _**[Can you contribute now and double your impact at a critical moment for our campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36718216/308992503/-2023814932?refcode=20210929.8_TM_9GM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDFkNzRmMS04ZDIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GVU1nbDE8II5HGoNYWjFGO5u7E4Ly5koXuHCfMlVPLg=)**_

My team and I have been doing our best to convince you just how important this matching opportunity is — not to mention September’s critical filing deadline.

But here’s the thing — way too many members of our grassroots team aren’t taking advantage of this golden opportunity.

_**What’s it going to take, Derek?**_

Let me remind you of the facts:

I’m up against a right-wing culture warrior who wants to defund Planned Parenthood and ban abortion.

He’s been endorsed by Donald Trump FOUR TIMES and considers Ted Cruz his mentor.

_And just last week, The Cook Political Report downgraded our race to true “toss up” status._

This is the most important race in the country, Derek, and Democrats have to win.

_**[Donor matching is only active until midnight and I’m asking you to step up. Your support can go twice as far, but only if you donate TONIGHT.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36718217/308992504/-2023814932?refcode=20210929.8_TM_9GM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDFkNzRmMS04ZDIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GVU1nbDE8II5HGoNYWjFGO5u7E4Ly5koXuHCfMlVPLg=)**_

Thank you so much,

Terry | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36718218/308992505/-2023814932?refcode=20210929.8_TM_9GM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDFkNzRmMS04ZDIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GVU1nbDE8II5HGoNYWjFGO5u7E4Ly5koXuHCfMlVPLg=)**

name: Tim Ryan
subject: I never imagined I would have to send this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Our FEC fundraising goal is taking a huge hit right before our numbers go public.
#
Hello,
I never imagined I would have to send this email, but as you might know, I recently tested positive for a breakthrough case of COVID-19.
I’m in good health, and at home following CDC guidelines. But I have to be honest about something: this pandemic has affected everything from schools to businesses and yes, even our campaign.
We’ve had to cancel all of our in-person fundraisers for the rest of the month. It was the right thing to do, and I’m proud of my team’s decision. **But this means our FEC fundraising goal is taking a huge hit right before our numbers go public. **
To make matters worse, a new poll was just released that shows me neck-and-neck with my GOP opponents. In other words, we really can’t afford to post a weak FEC report.
My team is working overtime right now to rework our strategy and ensure we have the resources necessary to lay the groundwork for victory. And messages like this are more critical than ever to help us reach our FEC goal.
**The truth is, we won’t reach our deadline in one day unless folks like you step up and chip in to this email. So I’m personally asking:**
**[Will you donate $5 or more to my campaign and Jacky Rosen’s right now? Your contribution before our FEC deadline will ensure we have the resources we need to fight off the GOP’s attacks, break the stalemate in the polls, and flip Ohio’s Senate seat blue. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36718404/308993306/-1976704292?refcode=jr_em_nd_210929_2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWE0MTFlNi04ZjIxLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OkfQmFeoVZiEZe_six7JvZC8YasBcPeZLzkKHgs7cRw=)**
Thank you for your support today. And I’m grateful to have the protection of a safe and effective vaccine that's kept my case fairly mild. Stay safe everyone,
Tim Ryan

name: David Chipman
subject: If not us, then who?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Earlier this month, the White House had to withdraw my nomination for ATF director.
#

Hello,
Earlier this month, the White House had to withdraw my nomination for ATF director. The National Shooting Sports Foundation waged a disinformation campaign against me, and unfortunately, too many senators bought their lies and unfounded conspiracy theories.
The gun lobby tried to silence me, but guess what... I’m not going anywhere—I’m staying in the fight to save lives from gun violence.
You might ask, why after that experience, do I continue to do this work?
To that I would say, if not me, _if not us_ —then who? So, I am going to reiterate my request:
[**Will you make a $3 contribution to Giffords before tomorrow’s end-of-month fundraising deadline? Your donation will help us show the gun lobby that we are fighting back. Pitch in here:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210929-2-15&t=1&refcode2=1048_3935704_itPbmy&akid=1048%2E3935704%2EitPbmy)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210929-2-15&t=20&refcode2=1048_3935704_itPbmy&akid=1048%2E3935704%2EitPbmy)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210929-2-15&t=21&refcode2=1048_3935704_itPbmy&akid=1048%2E3935704%2EitPbmy)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210929-2-15&t=22&refcode2=1048_3935704_itPbmy&akid=1048%2E3935704%2EitPbmy)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210929-2-15&t=23&refcode2=1048_3935704_itPbmy&akid=1048%2E3935704%2EitPbmy)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210929-2-15&t=24&refcode2=1048_3935704_itPbmy&akid=1048%2E3935704%2EitPbmy)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210929-2-15&t=25&refcode2=1048_3935704_itPbmy&akid=1048%2E3935704%2EitPbmy)**
---
****
To be honest, I am disappointed I will not have the opportunity to lead the ATF. But Gabby’s courage and activism after surviving an assassination attempt, evidenced by her returning to work tirelessly as a force for change, has inspired me to continue the fight.
It is clear that the NRA, NSSF, and the rest of the gun lobby will stop at nothing to line their own pocketbooks and continue the cycle of violence over saving the lives of Americans.
But with your help, we can make sure lives are prioritized over the gun lobby’s profits.
Thank you for supporting our mission.
All my best,
David Chipman

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: Just a small-town girl
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nicole for New York (Federal)

subject: We messed up

body:
Hey...

We messed up. My finance team just took a look at their projections and we still have a way to go to reach our FEC fundraising goal before the end of the quarter.

Look, we’re all human, and mistakes happen. But missing this goal would set us back significantly -- especially with Ron Johnson and the GOP already attacking me directly. We’re still about $9,827 behind and running low on time to catch up.

**I’m respectfully asking if you can rush a donation of any amount to help us get back on track before we need to report our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission. | | Dear ,

I am running for Arizona Secretary of State and am endorsed by President Trump, General Flynn, Jenna Ellis, Sen. Sonny Borrelli, and many others who love our country. They know that I am the one who will clean up this mess.

However, [I have a BIG deadline coming up tomorrow and I am still $16,718 short.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9d89c75957&e=44b8c466b0) These fundraising numbers are critical and I must meet it in order to stay on target to keep up with the Democrats, who are going to pour millions into this race against me.

I am fighting to restore our elections, starting with Decertifying the Arizona Presidential Election. Next, I am calling for an audit of Pima County and a statewide canvass of the voter rolls. I am also working on the Ballot Integrity Project that will secure our ballots keeping them from being able to be copied or printed by bad actors.

I must meet my goal. [Will you contribute whatever you can afford today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5c0ae8724e&e=44b8c466b0) Thank you so much.

name: Moms for Katie Porter
subject: fwd:Here is why this is so urgent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director

clean_body: [ Peter, Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter? Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right? She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat. Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat. Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [] In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign. None of this work would be possible without you. With gratitude, Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office #teamkatie [] DONATE [ [] [] [] Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . name: Erik Aadland
subject: Politicians or Solutions?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AADLAND for Senate
body:
It all comes down to one simple question. Do you want politicians or solutions?
I know you’re busy, Fellow American, but if you got a couple of minutes to spare, can you watch this video?

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=753fd343c3c3475c9e1369a0d039e8be&_e=5RiDlSk_H-fCdAfuOWGCX2DcZxKdEjwXA0OdS7tGS7Szxd-ClK-pe1G53-1aIWEPqojZn42pF0KGQBElxlZHQJjb_Wf_Z8z3Ts_rG3mgSZac1pmYOljK_t6Zid2i49uGQsYMqL3KCqotDOZRyZmgu5AHSTXOTqyhOIEGUoqFk6AGsYM4ZhCwlxynxsdB_Vc8L69yG83jYhmAeiARlSKUG3yOsZwhqKfUqmH0WX7ScMcqAFY6CnOuCwxPkxJSi2xP_uyQEQuqnu3aaIRPdUE0yifhMTutVF6jnuUDqBhcrdb4J3VaNGnk2qL2RBZFyEV94Y3MGwpSRRotl1ez6NezG2LESaFv58hSzmukAMp5SHMtkCB6h2s_VKCPa2p2Kuc4b2fQfRgEWxQUfVZ8jl9aBv-eJ1VKF5vJp2V6zsDneBo%3D)
I know it’s been said before but, combat tours to Iraq and Afghanistan will put things into perspective. When I made it back home after my last deployment, the one thing that stood out to me was how we all have so much that unites versus divides us as Americans.

Despite that, we cannot ignore what’s happening in our country right now. **The radical left we see in America is not only a threat to our finances today, but to our freedoms tomorrow.** They want to distract us from our foundation of freedoms by dividing us. [**We can’t let them win.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=753fd343c3c3475c9e1369a0d039e8be&_e=5RiDlSk_H-fCdAfuOWGCX2DcZxKdEjwXA0OdS7tGS7Szxd-ClK-pe1G53-1aIWEPqojZn42pF0KGQBElxlZHQJjb_Wf_Z8z3Ts_rG3mgSZac1pmYOljK_t6Zid2i49uGQsYMqL3KCqotDOZRyZmgu5AHSTXOTqyhOIEGUoqFk6AGsYM4ZhCwlxynxsdB_Vc8eXbdYfMsHTbDtkiGIYAP9CZhYHHKjm4aLb8q5bsqjATPDsEdy1DFPAZtlAnF-9BN1XoLZVB2fmWxYpr_GANcPvk6vUnHmOLeW-6IBCYvqkwAncQ-SVB0TuD_zCrSvc8J5IWbSEbuOMn9h7IVvG9PZkz_nBEDyzYPL7oohQD3gPXcvlcw2gxmqhhOp1IgiWa2PdvTWcf7UyN2_BZfLs9JZB0S0zlwmuNjHE4kXDLNsXQ%3D)

[** PITCH IN TO FLIP THE SENATE AND PROTECT OUR FREEDOMS **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=753fd343c3c3475c9e1369a0d039e8be&_e=5RiDlSk_H-fCdAfuOWGCX2DcZxKdEjwXA0OdS7tGS7Szxd-ClK-pe1G53-1aIWEPqojZn42pF0KGQBElxlZHQJjb_Wf_Z8z3Ts_rG3mgSZac1pmYOljK_t6Zid2i49uGQsYMqL3KCqotDOZRyZmgu5AHSTXOTqyhOIEGUoqFk6AGsYM4ZhCwlxynxsdB_Vc8pA9_hS4VgKw8Q13Rb0du4Aa0gxYRDcMgzR861e5VY9PoTwhftaFaRr8_uIOeWxaANc6v7ALMHG6xkQ2CTaPTyBpUdcxl6qdaZ26hmkAksOnG6USXunGLwn98fNbvLsgDyYhDxqw6wKGwY_rIKECAWNfcjKDIT_4hwoScrUKcLvMxKNEDNdbEvF-kBmydYSkj0Ap6B9DygnN-HElBofwn0mO3-7QdolUF9Qu6SDd392w%3D)
**Even worse than the radical left is the politician that takes the same oath of office that I took in the Army, then ignores the very people they’re supposed to serve.** That’s why more Americans like you are asking the same questions- _“Are they doing everything they can to honor their oath in defense of freedom? Are they doing everything they can to represent our community?”_

**If you’re asking these questions, then you already know the answer.** [**It’s time we start fighting for this one nation under God that we all pledged our allegiance to;**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=753fd343c3c3475c9e1369a0d039e8be&_e=5RiDlSk_H-fCdAfuOWGCX2DcZxKdEjwXA0OdS7tGS7Szxd-ClK-pe1G53-1aIWEPqojZn42pF0KGQBElxlZHQJjb_Wf_Z8z3Ts_rG3mgSZac1pmYOljK_t6Zid2i49uGQsYMqL3KCqotDOZRyZmgu5AHSTXOTqyhOIEGUoqFk6AGsYM4ZhCwlxynxsdB_Vc8OXtQ3iWKb8fHrfrfbnBvdfc7sp5exGwdoROUb93MzGkqV0FkD0V9QiYpEkYWzPKZ62LchoFCC39WfjQ7GVpvfWQWHeOwTtMXuut6aduIjCel3rMRQjKiZB4tXLF7IsHqpAx770O8ivgbiJtJakBXU04IcnHtRELQKTXjCslKij16O5XDRUQds5wUg-CZpgFkpeCEhB8sohcpK_Y74_nAFjl4hi5oVwhP7ZEyEqZsU0M%3D) **because the very freedoms we take for granted are the same ones that can falter when good people do nothing.**

[**Help prevent that by joining this cause to flip the Senate and defend our freedoms by pitching in any donation that you can.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=753fd343c3c3475c9e1369a0d039e8be&_e=5RiDlSk_H-fCdAfuOWGCX2DcZxKdEjwXA0OdS7tGS7Szxd-ClK-pe1G53-1aIWEPqojZn42pF0KGQBElxlZHQJjb_Wf_Z8z3Ts_rG3mgSZac1pmYOljK_t6Zid2i49uGQsYMqL3KCqotDOZRyZmgu5AHSTXOTqyhOIEGUoqFk6AGsYM4ZhCwlxynxsdB_Vc81xTmhlsVrs8crQYuaZ8_L1a--Xphc4kpOrTZL18w1SXciSFw9Alh_VdWyRf2cHAAXmC5lf_YAIxY8UTxP89HXUpPoLC2kMlONRAmb0QDk2Y6OsJ1xCFoH9wzigAValZVwCch6lAXSWDZ-SufgMRNEwg4ZSJGO3uMDYg8ywvuJZKuaOGnIzd9_hRlMj4n_G1w712KYA_LgDlAcvygYHtcmFNBT2KByXcbaPIUEwGml8g%3D) Just $10 can make a world of difference in a place like Colorado. No matter what you can give, know that it will end up being the reason why someone votes for the GOP to win back the Senate.

America needs you, and so do I.

V/R,

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=753fd343c3c3475c9e1369a0d039e8be&_e=5RiDlSk_H-fCdAfuOWGCX2DcZxKdEjwXA0OdS7tGS7Szxd-ClK-pe1G53-1aIWEPqojZn42pF0KGQBElxlZHQJjb_Wf_Z8z3Ts_rG3mgSZac1pmYOljK_t6Zid2i49uGQsYMqL3KCqotDOZRyZmgu5AHSTXOTqyhOIEGUoqFk6AGsYM4ZhCwlxynxsdB_Vc8fmWKnAnxAogTcY_s-jayUpm9aW4HdQ057v9-Kin-Z9vEx9NlM03MkViQYnAp22Mvw9NXv1CLb_1RqE4eYBh-QDhwV93tiqbFOdmeWKH-oaS9Xq6vylWlb-9O8Fvs_LFlowh94yU9eRcWmDp0GR1cpNDXs7LTTY8HWn_hVnYqB1C_0jjvTTy_sujVdvH-p3Dza22yxsIuRCkMk_r6EVNWtKFi67xecsMSIZoh_1oDLNs%3D)
**Erik Aadland**
Candidate for the U.S. Senate

[** PITCH IN TO FLIP THE SENATE AND PROTECT OUR FREEDOMS **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=753fd343c3c3475c9e1369a0d039e8be&_e=5RiDlSk_H-fCdAfuOWGCX2DcZxKdEjwXA0OdS7tGS7Szxd-ClK-pe1G53-1aIWEPqojZn42pF0KGQBElxlZHQJjb_Wf_Z8z3Ts_rG3mgSZac1pmYOljK_t6Zid2i49uGQsYMqL3KCqotDOZRyZmgu5AHSTXOTqyhOIEGUoqFk6AGsYM4ZhCwlxynxsdB_Vc8_05tpClqlQ492PjcSP6XQo01TSPj3_b1YTIUI6IgYsSUnS-RvYjzPy-2MofsG5dG0I6gy-K8JYjdKwozaExWLv9m059L_bVHDFIjl0Kc3OrQrKI_fNBRRqBQkEsY_R0rhG7Zu5tcB1nuR_-uQCIS_mbWdkZdmnG3XvTWcm-t7yi2Dps37oMhnldcekfgVvabt57y8RtPyjjiDbFSltvNyLvhUlDSKpmHvI-wiqN2ecA%3D)

body:
I’m a Hispanic conservative who is shaking up the status quo. Democrats can’t handle that they don’t own my vote. [I’m a Hispanic conservative who is shaking up the status quo. Democrats can’t handle that they don’t own my vote. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9ac9a165feea4a26a203ae7e778229e0&_e=8c0lebaK5gR2GJrvVG3tuV-i44RpTrtj080FGQkeQByXbtgQAd380zW__Nlm9FJgOb7-oreYn90LIPW3MzJSmScxNY8SfiUkxpFavgmgc1eLjxnCO3Ctn6O4IU6DkZVucrm086zP-ra8Pe7dbH5nFkCqBNIM5ByUYXUoHLa_CqAWc_eVhXP-m-ozQHChWMoRi33eFFDxJCmzZwzER8LNb9fKZCSGx6Oz3BkUEePd_RYWUuWIFHmgzl7R5RTQlGQerbZgEKmIFeblmv5qj47V5kBpuogPNlur3akUxiaZ9QYqS3v5CX7SoI8S6FOVIEBCtKm81Z0Ezd1OxwaIQX3R8R-ZYgW28fLysoMjt5knNpGxMUk_luELajNrTyQZ50TFAKilvcjjr9S3tMZ8OzYRMIcc4ykyU10UfZOKdqLAT6VsIWNLjJ2ZmpdvPrfcrmR5kUoLCIUOoLzLm7t1qN7NAw%3D%3D)

Fellow American

When you think of Joe Biden, what are the first three things that come to mind?

For me, it’s - -
1\. Failure
2\. Incompetence
3\. Delusional
The way the Democrats are running our country is an absolute train wreck. **__**It’s almost like they don’t want America to succeed.

We are in one of the biggest fights for the heart and soul of our nation to preserve our American values and create a better future for our kids and all future generations.

**The do-nothing career politician Democrats are not up for the job and neither is Joe Biden.**

I grew up in Honduras, so I know what it's like to live in a corrupt country. There's a reason I left it behind - and I don't want those socialist policies to be implemented into America. I want my daughter to grow with every opportunity that America has to offer. But we’ve got to get liberal logic out of lives if that’s going to happen.

I’m running for Congress because I want to secure our borders, create more jobs and opportunities, lower taxes on hardworking families, and protect the unborn.

**Here’s where you come in,** our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is TOMORROW and it’s the most important deadline of the year. [**I’m looking for 700 committed conservatives to make a gift to my campaign before the clock strikes midnight tonight. Can I count on you to chip in with a generous contribution to help me defeat the Democrats and flip a blue seat red in 2022?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9ac9a165feea4a26a203ae7e778229e0&_e=8c0lebaK5gR2GJrvVG3tuV-i44RpTrtj080FGQkeQByXbtgQAd380zW__Nlm9FJgOb7-oreYn90LIPW3MzJSmScxNY8SfiUkxpFavgmgc1eLjxnCO3Ctn6O4IU6DkZVucrm086zP-ra8Pe7dbH5nFkCqBNIM5ByUYXUoHLa_CqAWc_eVhXP-m-ozQHChWMoRi33eFFDxJCmzZwzER8LNb9fKZCSGx6Oz3BkUEePd_RYWUuWIFHmgzl7R5RTQlGQeXg4hpoL8pje8TMjfT2mLr_e7ZBudB_0mONPTaOruci7wzBnmOWVWKWVwxYHafNwy0LfS7XgB_sbQO_MbLFPnW2N3pcUPf50nJNPpr_-47AzK1JVEr-rdS_5tl7WOj6WzXixXLgcKAc3zcBcbn9mf7wQEUubJKHV3uztcm1_bwfScOK6uLHnNoz92BItU6J6j30_KUWuep2Z80F9qWyAOdw%3D%3D)

clean_body: I’m a Hispanic conservative who is shaking up the status quo. Democrats can’t handle that they don’t own my vote. Fellow American When you think of Joe Biden, what are the first three things that come to mind? For me, it’s - - 1\. Failure 2\. Incompetence 3\. Delusional The way the Democrats are running our country is an absolute train wreck. It’s almost like they don’t want America to succeed. We are in one of the biggest fights for the heart and soul of our nation to preserve our American values and create a better future for our kids and all future generations. The do-nothing career politician Democrats are not up for the job and neither is Joe Biden. I grew up in Honduras, so I know what it's like to live in a corrupt country. There's a reason I left it behind - and I don't want those socialist policies to be implemented into America. I want my daughter to grow with every opportunity that America has to offer. But we’ve got to get liberal logic out of lives if that’s going to happen. I’m running for Congress because I want to secure our borders, create more jobs and opportunities, lower taxes on hardworking families, and protect the unborn. Here’s where you come in, our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is TOMORROW and it’s the most important deadline of the year. The Washington insiders know I’m a threat because I’m a Hispanic conservative who is shaking up the status quo. Democrats can’t handle that they don’t own my vote. I’m not going to shy away from my opinions and I’m definitely not going to let the Left continue to create crisis after crisis. Together, we’ve got to fight for the American dream and defend our values. Thank you, Jose Castillo | | PAID FOR BY JOSE CASTILLO FOR CONGRESS Jose Castillo for Congress PO Box 2651 Davenport, FL 33836 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District against Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who has turned his back on Central Valley families for two decades. name: Dean Heller
subject: it’s time for a conservative comeback
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dean Heller for Nevada Governor |
body:
Under Governor Sisolak’s failed liberal leadership, our state is suffering. | |
---
|
---
Peter,

The radical Left in this country wants you to believe that there are no conservatives left in Nevada.

You and I both know that isn’t true. The conservative movement is alive and well, and I think you’ll agree with me when I say it is TIME for a conservative comeback.

Under Governor Sisolak’s failed liberal leadership, our state is suffering.

From crippling business lockdowns to rampant voter fraud, the Democrats are hurting Nevadans.

_That’s why the conservatives in this state have to stand up and take action to get Nevada back on the right track._

**_That’s why I am running for Governor. _**

Here’s how you can help. My campaign is approaching the end-of-quarter fundraising deadline on Thursday, and we have to raise $12,450 more to hit our goal.
Let’s show the radical Left that here in Nevada, the conservative movement is alive and kicking.

**[Make your donation today.](http://links.deanheller.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=49bd135d19924d96afc8c16d3cdbee2b&_e=TmJXcYvXLcY4Kv4vvioOj4WGuOIMFFRKnP1gq_4xrUJwOkW4OIJailq-h5hFmzVEQPnAFc7o4meHALdzsIjDPV36m3WQZ71D1BrGqojWknAzX1naLLytOM8K6yb2lf1SGdAEodoHgF0lXjK2MmvBhz9XQWaLO2IdZP29teMEMtwuE43H4uslK-XkB_WPzg4e9Sgdd4Q0CQWvUqWGRdzz0_I6m90Tx3_1PEzU5HjhIWtt_MJ_iZMAcuxHDCESTeJN8L8eJTNTSUpZ5mnao2k8MyB-FFPd0QEFsNf3uVKqldGGBWZBhPc4ofUs5wNCAVNmAlVxlLIf8_mJ_C7ZawYXIW_5DPaxLdFtH4OkGKS4RtdEt1tuzBIUCiFNdzOeQW6WFDlvSEQECwPl7CX-43RWf-a-owMQOGgXJXfY50xtJA6Y2zxyCHfCTM3jWOUZsRkcXOnBZl-qyGPzp6wNkE6_99D3kowHQCTx60Ggzi8IkwBXKdJ6WUVsbEazswU_wNxn)**

clean_body: Under Governor Sisolak’s failed liberal leadership, our state is suffering. | | | Peter, The radical Left in this country wants you to believe that there are no conservatives left in Nevada. You and I both know that isn’t true. The conservative movement is alive and well, and I think you’ll agree with me when I say it is TIME for a conservative comeback. Under Governor Sisolak’s failed liberal leadership, our state is suffering. From crippling business lockdowns to rampant voter fraud, the Democrats are hurting Nevadans. That’s why the conservatives in this state have to stand up and take action to get Nevada back on the right track. That’s why I am running for Governor. Here’s how you can help. My campaign is approaching the end-of-quarter fundraising deadline on Thursday, and we have to raise $12,450 more to hit our goal. Let’s show the radical Left that here in Nevada, the conservative movement is alive and kicking. The finish line is in Carson City, and I’ll see you there. See you on the road, Dean | | | Paid for by Dean Heller for Nevada Governor | | 18124 Wedge Pkwy #1044, Reno, NV 89511 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

Susie has always been a tireless advocate for Nevada on the issues that matter most: health care access, climate change, expanding education opportunities, and so much more.
I’m someone who benefitted from public education throughout my life, so it matters to folks like me that public servants like Susie have a track record of fighting to properly fund and equip public schools with the resources they need.
Like you and I, Susie knows that high-quality, affordable education opportunities build a stronger workforce in Nevada and across the country. That’s why she has worked to ensure that students are given 21st century job training that won’t leave them struggling with hundreds of thousands of dollars in student debt.
I hope I’ve made this point clear to you, folks. Susie’s in Congress for one reason: to serve the people of her district. We have to help her campaign hit their end-of-quarter goal so she can continue delivering for NV-03.
[**I’d be grateful if you could chip in to help my friend, Susie Lee, reach her goal and remain in Congress to help us keep up the good fight. body:
| **

Constitution allows Biden to mandate COVID vaccine. Federal government can do even more.**

* * *

Listen, we're trusting you to tell us the truth...

As you can see in the headline above, the liberal media outlets are pressuring for MORE vaccine mandates and we need to know if you think they're right.

| _The liberal media says_ the Constitution allows Joe Biden to impose a vaccination mandate on all airline travelers in the United States.

**Do you agree?**

[** ****No, it's an abuse of power ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ab0a7bb02dc1423796cd1e3f45b971ae&_e=vM3rHFVzSVbXGTYbYy_p6TFVDYnG69o743RqhfRIbPNQChmem9QK95tUNZzlfh6rcIAWrx_y8r_tB9yDzNxylJudyacJTxHh7y2PHMEn90yCwSXp1jakPd-KmO6eX_fIu1z-UUXJOEbv7f-cHm8khy6ORkb16_NkrpKdt8mpVLveI5lYzrDmOMHeIdfaGIMLDLWW56IcoWIRA-XOKJX1vl5w2BTU3eZLJ-Noje19sdXdNkK_ck9mgp0IBS5ZcWZ_ZxQt9sFe2fZBrS0_FenAVOXo9KoUG3gIlmDAaJxexhsw2ap6RIGHk45KLPCdeb3eUws8IK6yx1rEJ1J75vyLpN6vH2ypdRa8NbvQPaM9uEvVCV1E0HmQ2LrE2MVosD3p-LvaLSNH_7PCz6DRmM-Na2Y19yJkWmnevBU8KRtcSVioPco97SMO7IMXW0gGaZKoA6I7YWrvEP7DrzrtfdmF3Mhe-PSZKs_vQKZ-6yl0OSYKjbVc32MSpsmCkYMz954m)

[** ****Yes, I want him to ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ab0a7bb02dc1423796cd1e3f45b971ae&_e=vM3rHFVzSVbXGTYbYy_p6TFVDYnG69o743RqhfRIbPNQChmem9QK95tUNZzlfh6rcIAWrx_y8r_tB9yDzNxylJudyacJTxHh7y2PHMEn90yCwSXp1jakPd-KmO6eX_fIu1z-UUXJOEbv7f-cHm8khy6ORkb16_NkrpKdt8mpVLveI5lYzrDmOMHeIdfaGIMLDLWW56IcoWIRA-XOKJX1vl5w2BTU3eZLJ-Noje19sdXdNkK_ck9mgp0IBS5ZcWZ_ZxQt9sFe2fZBrS0_FenAVOIVZd9LTkyW_usyyvmh3FL6Mm81Lkz-NUvown0oQLPcJzdvcIYRPUnhS7-VIYiJAw77kbWjqt44yn63BigwGB4VL19eNBfKH3TJOo9qTZ2n6Nqjk5eV-S2RFb4PL9Y7z_qx-IqvuuTtDOsAcn4O_VvDh1bvJ73VF6fiHbz5QkHnISxVckkhOb6AgKFuZEgeK3e-27usa-9ub9Jkqv-zqzCsM3knwNgd57Hq9gmD4FUC)

This has not become a reality yet, but with the latest vaccine mandates impacting nearly 100 million Americans, there’s no doubt that requiring airline travelers to present proof of vaccination could be next.

body:
Why does a fundraising quarter matter, anyways? In just two days, the [third fundraising quarter](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ctdiyuk-ahkdjtlkr-r/) closes for Congressional races.Earlier this month, Nancy Pelosi's DCCC trimmed down their hit list from 39 seats to 21 seats, consolidating their efforts in a **desperate effort to hold on to their majority!!****WISCONSIN IS AT THE TOP OF HER LIST, with a top-tier MUST-HOLD seat in Western Wisconsin._And the actions our donors take in the next two days are going to tell her if Wisconsin is up for the taking! _** [Send Pelosi a Message >> DEFEND WISCONSIN!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ctdiyuk-ahkdjtlkr-y/) We're only five seats away from taking back the majority. But if our [end-of-quarter reports](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ctdiyuk-ahkdjtlkr-j/) show that enthusiasm is lagging on our side, they'll be ready to POUNCE and target their resources into the states that fall behind! **It all starts by meeting our critical end-of-quarter deadline this Thursday - that's less than 48 hours away.** As of this morning, we are within **$600** of our goal, with only two more days to go before our Thursday deadline. [**Will YOU step up NOW to make our goal?**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ctdiyuk-ahkdjtlkr-t/) [Major Deadline >> Chip In $20.22 NOW](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ctdiyuk-ahkdjtlkr-h/) Thanks,
Scott Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ctdiyuk-ahkdjtlkr-k/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ctdiyuk-ahkdjtlkr-u/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ctdiyuk-ahkdjtlkr-o/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ctdiyuk-ahkdjtlkr-b/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-ctdiyuk-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-n) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-u-ctdiyuk-ahkdjtlkr-p/)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: 1,000 donations needed before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
We’ve got a very important goal to meet by Thursday, and every dollar raised between now and then will be put toward making America Great Again Republicans only need to pick up a handful of seats to win back control of the House, and we need your help to do it.

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d06a539e7d894b8fbbfb59c6bc2a7fa8&_e=xU_gdvcxv0keR-4U1RiiUbcNIsrR0Lqy8vBPKjSk6mAbbrJ6kPxf0J_oF2JRIYkkZDkw7HiDKsZa06mDnSVejgFvh4g8FlaDabFpUDmh8_QW8Ra15-xl-sQMvc8dvBptl4lcjc4OzTLO6wT_fY-Ph4FQNDs-Qdj4Md8cqrAqEsxMmH3ZFY-knESCAqq1tkSqipF1uLMGuuGHcacq5lsz8AuGOSKg11VEF0fwBVWqYhtLJmCiW6y2ZC6W_F14AThrWW6iW8QdtMO1qD6rtXc7OpLM5njlXfNC7bIBoEj-xVmtGT_eGu3jNrr-FjXsfBvo3zSoxg8PsWE_Jlrzt8cyV41AeFncAqupcTQkFX_9G2Q%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

Joe Biden has embarrassed our country and made us the laughingstock of the world. A few months ago I wrote to you saying that 2021 is a repeat of 1979 – if we weren’t sure then, we definitely are sure of the comparisons now.

**Joe Biden is Jimmy Carter 2.0 - but much, much more dangerous.**

And right now, Republicans are fighting to stop Biden and Democrats from tripping over themselves and bringing further embarrassment on our great nation.

**Shameful.**

I’m writing to you because the truth of the matter is that we’re at a crossroads. We can’t reign in, or even soften the blow from President Biden’s worst impulses, without a majority in the House. **[But, Fellow Conservative, Nancy Pelosi’s grip on power is tenuous at best, and sending her into retirement starts with you making a donation toward our campaign’s efforts to take back control of the House.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d06a539e7d894b8fbbfb59c6bc2a7fa8&_e=xU_gdvcxv0keR-4U1RiiUbcNIsrR0Lqy8vBPKjSk6mAbbrJ6kPxf0J_oF2JRIYkkZDkw7HiDKsZa06mDnSVejgFvh4g8FlaDabFpUDmh8_QW8Ra15-xl-sQMvc8dvBptl4lcjc4OzTLO6wT_fY-Ph_3MJ360RwdMlZobuWNQnf_g3m7Gx4Y2ZiTpWr6CWaY8L44jg8IQi36iwiJzRgnUeViBHvKlza0MHUjCWjgHvyIWBAoS4OqEkBguYHVITSxVmvjDJ2TnqE-dRKTnbuZAt4LwC7tYwwuy2PRQ47tJ8UYZ8ZbtP0AwFTzCZyT490nIzr78hnkHB7dLv5qa3eoo0gk4f-YlZg6qmPhbEpn4ic8%3D)**

**[I’m not asking for much, just $5 or $10, even $1 will do the trick.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d06a539e7d894b8fbbfb59c6bc2a7fa8&_e=xU_gdvcxv0keR-4U1RiiUbcNIsrR0Lqy8vBPKjSk6mAbbrJ6kPxf0J_oF2JRIYkkZDkw7HiDKsZa06mDnSVejgFvh4g8FlaDabFpUDmh8_QW8Ra15-xl-sQMvc8dvBptl4lcjc4OzTLO6wT_fY-Ph8XT6sy5dnpzDzkUtOSOdBE6VzdPnyLSYtFHPEmziaSQC-ZSWkJ_TBnr2ldrSXMHVXYDZrPzaZmVK6_WMda_jdDkApizxFbhgRuj8SRa6nTJLUg712YccCCpSNjVv9brMVAK2B6I_CWnaZLOrIJVZyVpe15MO9fAvxf9uR0P0-wQ8-C4_NjDBVSHsQh8gVjmk7NpHXYNz6lpS4xnIbHtcZ0%3D)** We’ve got a very important goal to meet by Thursday, and every dollar raised between now and then will be put toward making America Great Again - and that begins with taking Pelosi’s House majority away from her.

| **TAKING BACK THE HOUSE $1 AT A TIME**
**NEEDED: 1,000 DONATIONS OF $1 OR MORE BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT**

[**HELP US REACH OUR SEPTEMBER END OF QUARTER GOAL ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d06a539e7d894b8fbbfb59c6bc2a7fa8&_e=xU_gdvcxv0keR-4U1RiiUbcNIsrR0Lqy8vBPKjSk6mAbbrJ6kPxf0J_oF2JRIYkkZDkw7HiDKsZa06mDnSVejgFvh4g8FlaDabFpUDmh8_QW8Ra15-xl-sQMvc8dvBptl4lcjc4OzTLO6wT_fY-Ph230jo4o8aOsg13eWJOsoXJLPt3X1K0Sjok2bUKKBMkb5nQHyjbL3rhDDWn34jFVf3HEjA58P5w89jX8HXT6L4AVa7K4MdW_bvQv8qO4k-HGujGtVBROUXBgUzFbHbmqLbfVZI5qoqoFOlKK_T-FcKZFl19xO2pJrf4yiejKgchEpttkFQnUfCzyt_N2_kdNI1jRMFv4_oXCLhmxH7NglT8%3D)

---

**America’s future depends on patriots like you.**

To our future,
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d06a539e7d894b8fbbfb59c6bc2a7fa8&_e=xU_gdvcxv0keR-4U1RiiUbcNIsrR0Lqy8vBPKjSk6mAbbrJ6kPxf0J_oF2JRIYkkZDkw7HiDKsZa06mDnSVejgFvh4g8FlaDabFpUDmh8_QW8Ra15-xl-sQMvc8dvBptl4lcjc4OzTLO6wT_fY-Ph5-tIconHTMOZsiaVRBU7EApmwEE_cLxtJcxOgZrGx_cgAFys5kE_kk5mtx9JKp5dxFT0cftyhKaijUgu2t9UPgElk3HOzMuzVq-GOXiD8iNWGYQ_YkU_p48hw0J5D-wpsvItBOEmgT88fXN0iROPotxvvsnOzmn0T8gVFlr_tHxAwlAJin0x5sp3qBBjdHDL4u3y8VswHQNXbxx_7HtuK8%3D)
Jim Jordan
